questions.question: In Strange World, what unusual creature becomes the Clade family's companion underground?
questions.explanation: Splat is a blob-like blue creature that befriends the Clades in the subterranean world.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what is the name of the crime boss shrew feared throughout Tundratown?
questions.explanation: Mr. Big is a tiny arctic shrew who rules as an intimidating crime boss.

questions.question: In Encanto, what animal does Luisa mention carrying could crush her under pressure?
questions.explanation: In 'Surface Pressure' Luisa sings of carrying and rerouting the town's stray donkeys.

questions.question: In Moana, what does Gramma Tala transform into after she dies?
questions.explanation: Gramma Tala's spirit appears as a glowing manta ray to guide Moana.

questions.question: In Ralph Breaks the Internet, what online video platform does Ralph become a star on?
questions.explanation: Ralph earns money making viral videos on the platform BuzzzTube.

questions.question: In Treasure Planet, what is the full name of the young protagonist who finds the treasure map?
questions.explanation: Jim Hawkins is the rebellious teenager who discovers Captain Flint's treasure map.

questions.question: In Atlantis: The Lost Empire, what is the name of the Atlantean princess who guides Milo?
questions.explanation: Princess Kidagakash, called Kida, helps Milo explore the lost city of Atlantis.

questions.question: In Brother Bear, who are the two comic-relief moose brothers Kenai encounters?
questions.explanation: Rutt and Tuke are Canadian-accented moose brothers who provide comic relief.

questions.question: In Meet the Robinsons, what is the name of the optimistic orphan inventor protagonist?
questions.explanation: Lewis is the young inventor who is whisked to the future by Wilbur Robinson.

questions.question: In The Great Mouse Detective, what is the name of Basil's kindly assistant, a mouse doctor?
questions.explanation: Dr. David Q. Dawson is Basil's loyal companion, echoing Dr. Watson.

questions.question: In Bolt, what is the name of the hamster who rides in a plastic ball and idolizes Bolt?
questions.explanation: Rhino is a fearless, TV-obsessed hamster who joins Bolt's cross-country journey.

questions.question: In The Emperor's New Groove, what is the name of Pacha's wife?
questions.explanation: Chicha is Pacha's supportive, pregnant wife who helps outwit Yzma.

questions.question: In Oliver & Company, what wealthy young girl adopts the kitten Oliver?
questions.explanation: Jenny Foxworth is the lonely rich girl who takes Oliver into her home.

questions.question: In The Rescuers Down Under, what is the name of the boy who befriends the great eagle?
questions.explanation: Cody is the Australian boy who protects the golden eagle Marahute.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, what is the name of Pocahontas's wise, spiritual grandmother figure?
questions.explanation: Grandmother Willow is a talking willow tree who counsels Pocahontas.

questions.question: In Frozen, what is the name of the trader whose shop Anna visits in the mountains?
questions.explanation: Wandering Oaken runs the trading post and sauna Anna stumbles upon.

questions.question: In The Emperor's New Groove, what is the name of Yzma's muscular, dim-witted henchman?
questions.explanation: Kronk is Yzma's good-natured but foolish assistant with a shoulder-angel conscience.

questions.question: In Hercules, what is the name of the beautiful woman Hercules falls in love with?
questions.explanation: Megara, called Meg, is the sardonic woman indebted to Hades whom Hercules loves.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, what is the name of the wealthy 'sugar baron' father of Tiana's friend?
questions.explanation: 'Big Daddy' La Bouff is Charlotte's wealthy father who hosts the masquerade ball.

questions.question: In Encanto, what is the name of Mirabel's grandmother, the family matriarch?
questions.explanation: Abuela Alma leads the Madrigal family and safeguards the miracle candle.

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, what is the last name of the glitch racer Vanellope?
questions.explanation: The candy-kart racer is named Vanellope von Schweetz.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, what is the name of Lilo's older sister and guardian?
questions.explanation: Nani is Lilo's overworked older sister struggling to keep custody of her.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, what is the name of the speed-loving daredevil member of Hiro's team?
questions.explanation: Go Go Tomago is the tough, fast team member who wields electromagnetic discs.

questions.question: In Fantasia, what character conducts the orchestra and shakes hands with the sorcerer Yen Sid?
questions.explanation: Mickey Mouse plays the apprentice and shakes hands with conductor Leopold Stokowski.

questions.question: In Dinosaur, what group of lemurs raises the orphaned Aladar?
questions.explanation: Aladar's egg is carried to an island where lemurs, including Plio, raise him.

questions.question: In The Rescuers Down Under, what poacher hunts the giant eagle Marahute?
questions.explanation: Percival McLeach is the ruthless Australian poacher pursuing the golden eagle.

questions.question: In The Emperor's New Groove, what does the villain Yzma want to do to Kuzco?
questions.explanation: Yzma plots to poison Kuzco to seize the throne, but the potion turns him into a llama.

questions.question: In Atlantis: The Lost Empire, who is the greedy commander who betrays the expedition?
questions.explanation: Commander Rourke turns on the crew, seeking to sell Atlantis's power crystal.

questions.question: In The Great Mouse Detective, what physical trait makes the villain Ratigan enraged when named?
questions.explanation: Ratigan flies into a fury whenever anyone calls him a rat rather than a big mouse.

questions.question: In Treasure Planet, what shape-shifting crew member schemes against Jim's captain?
questions.explanation: The spider-like Scroop is a mutinous, murderous member of the RLS Legacy crew.

questions.question: In The Black Cauldron, what does the Horned King seek to command an undead army?
questions.explanation: The Horned King wants the Black Cauldron to raise the Cauldron-Born army.

questions.question: In Sleeping Beauty, into what fearsome creature does Maleficent transform for the final battle?
questions.explanation: Maleficent becomes a towering black dragon to stop Prince Phillip.

questions.question: In Hercules, what does Hades unleash to defeat the gods on Mount Olympus?
questions.explanation: Hades frees the imprisoned Titans to storm Olympus and overthrow Zeus.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, what nickname is the villain Dr. Facilier known by?
questions.explanation: Dr. Facilier is called the 'Shadow Man' for his dark voodoo dealings.

questions.question: In Tangled, what is the name of the woman who poses as Rapunzel's mother?
questions.explanation: Mother Gothel abducts Rapunzel to keep her healing hair's youth-restoring power.

questions.question: In Aladdin, what does Jafar wish to become with his second wish to the Genie?
questions.explanation: Jafar first wishes to be sultan, then the world's most powerful sorcerer.

questions.question: In The Lion King, what pack of animals serves as Scar's henchmen?
questions.explanation: Scar allies with the hyenas Shenzi, Banzai, and Ed to seize Pride Rock.

questions.question: In Frozen, what is the true villainous plan of Prince Hans?
questions.explanation: Hans schemes to marry into and take over Arendelle's throne by eliminating the sisters.

questions.question: In The Hunchback of Notre Dame, what position of power does the villain Frollo hold in Paris?
questions.explanation: Claude Frollo is the Minister of Justice, a judge who persecutes the Romani.

questions.question: In Pinocchio, what villain runs Pleasure Island and sells the transformed boys?
questions.explanation: The sinister Coachman lures boys to Pleasure Island and sells them once they become donkeys.

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, who is the true identity of the villainous King Candy?
questions.explanation: King Candy is secretly Turbo, a racer who hijacked Sugar Rush's code.

questions.question: In Moana, what giant lava monster blocks Moana from restoring the heart?
questions.explanation: Te Ka is a fiery lava demon guarding the way to Te Fiti.

questions.question: In The Sword in the Stone, what evil sorceress does Merlin duel in a shape-shifting Wizards' Duel?
questions.explanation: Merlin battles the wicked Madam Mim in a magical duel of transformations.

questions.question: In Raya and the Last Dragon, who is Raya's rival warrior from the Fang land?
questions.explanation: Namaari is the Fang warrior whose betrayal fractured Kumandra.

questions.question: In Moana, what is the name of the fat, dim-witted rooster that travels with Moana?
questions.explanation: Heihei is the accident-prone rooster who stows away on Moana's canoe.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, what firefly falls in love with the star Evangeline?
questions.explanation: Ray is a Cajun firefly who believes the star Evangeline is his true love.

questions.question: In Hercules, what does Phil the satyr dream of one day training?
questions.explanation: Phil longs to train a hero so great his constellation will shine in the sky.

questions.question: In Frozen, what does Olaf the snowman dream of experiencing?
questions.explanation: Olaf innocently dreams of what summer would be like, unaware heat would melt him.

questions.question: In Aladdin, what magical item becomes a loyal, playful sidekick to Aladdin?
questions.explanation: The sentient Magic Carpet becomes a helpful and expressive companion to Aladdin.

questions.question: In Mulan, what animal is Mushu, Mulan's guardian companion?
questions.explanation: Mushu is a diminutive dragon sent to help restore the Fa family's honor.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, what small hummingbird accompanies Pocahontas alongside her raccoon?
questions.explanation: Flit is a stubborn hummingbird who watches over Pocahontas.

questions.question: In Brother Bear, what does the bear cub Koda hope to reach at the salmon run?
answers: The place where lights touch the earth
questions.explanation: Koda journeys with Kenai toward the salmon run where the northern lights touch the earth.

questions.question: In Bolt, what one-eyed cat reluctantly guides Bolt across the country?
questions.explanation: Mittens is a jaded stray cat who becomes Bolt's guide and friend.

questions.question: In Tangled, what is the special ability that makes Pascal a useful sidekick?
questions.explanation: Pascal the chameleon changes color, letting him hide and signal Rapunzel.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, what nervous fish is Ariel's best friend?
questions.explanation: Flounder is Ariel's anxious but loyal fish companion.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, what is the name of the timid one-antenna'd alien partnered with Pleakley?
questions.explanation: Jumba Jookiba, Stitch's creator, is paired with Pleakley to recapture Stitch.

questions.question: In Cinderella, what are the names of the two mice who are Cinderella's closest friends?
questions.explanation: Jaq and Gus are the devoted mice who help sew Cinderella's dress.

questions.question: In The Jungle Book, what quartet of birds mimicking a famous band befriends Mowgli?
questions.explanation: Four mop-topped vultures befriend Mowgli and sing 'That's What Friends Are For.'

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, what is the name of the good-guy repairman with a magic hammer?
questions.explanation: Fix-It Felix Jr. repairs what Ralph breaks using his golden hammer.

questions.question: In Winnie the Pooh, what gloomy donkey is always losing his tail?
questions.explanation: Eeyore is the perpetually gloomy donkey whose tail keeps falling off.

questions.question: In The Black Cauldron, what is the name of the bard companion who joins Taran?
questions.explanation: Fflewddur Fflam is a wandering minstrel whose harp strings snap when he lies.

questions.question: In Wish, what kind of creature does the wishing star become when it comes to Earth?
questions.explanation: The wish upon a star manifests as Star, a playful little celestial being.

questions.question: In The Hunchback of Notre Dame, what are the names of Quasimodo's three gargoyle friends?
questions.explanation: Victor, Hugo, and Laverne are the gargoyles who keep Quasimodo company.

questions.question: In Tangled, what dream does the thug Big Nose reveal in the Snuggly Duckling tavern?
questions.explanation: In 'I've Got a Dream,' Big Nose longs to find love despite his fearsome looks.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what is the name of the lush rainforest district with sprinkler-fed trees?
questions.explanation: The Rainforest District is kept humid by artificial sprinkler-topped trees.

questions.question: In The Emperor's New Groove, where does Kuzco want to build his summer home, Kuzcotopia?
questions.explanation: Kuzco plans to demolish Pacha's village hilltop to build Kuzcotopia.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, the city San Fransokyo blends San Francisco with what other city?
questions.explanation: San Fransokyo is a fictional hybrid of San Francisco and Tokyo.

questions.question: In Moana, what glowing realm of monsters does Moana enter to find Maui's fish hook?
questions.explanation: Lalotai is the Realm of Monsters where Tamatoa hoards Maui's hook.

questions.question: In Aladdin, what desert cavern only allows the 'diamond in the rough' to enter?
questions.explanation: The Cave of Wonders admits only Aladdin, the prophesied diamond in the rough.

questions.question: In Atlantis: The Lost Empire, what powers and protects the underwater city?
questions.explanation: The Heart of Atlantis, a floating crystal, sustains and shields the city.

questions.question: In Encanto, in what country is the Madrigal family's town set?
questions.explanation: Encanto takes place in a mountainous village in Colombia.

questions.question: In Frozen, what is the name of the ruler's residence overlooking the fjord?
questions.explanation: The royal family lives in the castle of Arendelle beside the fjord.

questions.question: In The Rescuers, what riverboat serves as the villain Medusa's hideout?
questions.explanation: Madame Medusa hides in an old riverboat in Devil's Bayou.

questions.question: In Hercules, what city does Hercules save and become a celebrity in?
questions.explanation: Hercules gains fame protecting Thebes, 'the Big Olive.'

questions.question: In Tangled, where is Rapunzel imprisoned for most of her life?
questions.explanation: Mother Gothel keeps Rapunzel locked in a tall, isolated tower.

questions.question: In The Lion King, what desolate area is Simba forbidden to go by Mufasa?
questions.explanation: Mufasa warns Simba never to visit the shadowy elephant graveyard.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, what large aquatic park does Nani hope to get a job at?
questions.explanation: Nani applies at several tourist spots including a luau resort to keep her job.

questions.question: In Raya and the Last Dragon, what are the five lands of the divided realm named after?
questions.explanation: Kumandra's lands—Heart, Fang, Spine, Talon, Tail—are named for parts of a dragon.

questions.question: In Pinocchio, what seaside village setting does Geppetto live in as a woodcarver?
questions.explanation: Geppetto works as a woodcarver in a quaint alpine European village.

questions.question: In The Rescuers, what organization sends Bernard and Bianca on missions?
questions.explanation: The Rescue Aid Society is a mouse organization based beneath the U.N.

questions.question: In Fantasia 2000, what bird features prominently in the Igor Stravinsky Firebird Suite finale?
questions.explanation: The Firebird Suite depicts a destructive fire spirit and a sprite renewing a forest.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what is the motto or slogan associated with the city of Zootopia?
questions.explanation: Zootopia's ideal is that anyone can be anything, a place where predator and prey coexist.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, in what decade is the film's New Orleans setting?
questions.explanation: The Princess and the Frog is set in Jazz Age 1920s New Orleans.

questions.question: In Moana, what does Maui use to shapeshift into different animals?
questions.explanation: Maui's enchanted fish hook lets him transform into creatures like a hawk or shark.

questions.question: In Cinderella, what does the Fairy Godmother turn into Cinderella's carriage?
questions.explanation: The Fairy Godmother transforms a pumpkin into a golden coach.

questions.question: In Aladdin, besides the lamp, what magical object carries Aladdin and Jasmine on a ride?
questions.explanation: The Magic Carpet carries the pair during 'A Whole New World.'

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, what enchanted object does the Beast give Belle to see her father?
questions.explanation: The Beast gives Belle a magic mirror that reveals anything she wishes to see.

questions.question: In Tangled, what object does Rapunzel use as a weapon against Flynn when he intrudes?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel repeatedly knocks people out with her trusty frying pan.

questions.question: In The Sword in the Stone, what words are inscribed near the legendary sword?
answers: Whoso pulleth out this sword is king
questions.explanation: The inscription declares whoever pulls the sword is rightful king of England.

questions.question: In Sleeping Beauty, what gift does the fairy Merryweather alter to soften Maleficent's curse?
questions.explanation: Merryweather changes the curse so Aurora will sleep, not die, until true love's kiss.

questions.question: In Encanto, what object holds the magic that gives the Madrigals their gifts?
questions.explanation: The everlasting candle embodies the family's miracle and powers their gifts.

questions.question: In The Black Cauldron, what item helps the heroes locate the Horned King's weapon?
questions.explanation: Hen Wen, an oracular pig, can reveal visions including the cauldron's location.

questions.question: In Wish, what magical outcome does King Magnifico grant only a chosen few citizens?
questions.explanation: Magnifico collects citizens' wishes and grants only the ones he chooses.

questions.question: In Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs, what does the Queen consult to learn she is no longer fairest?
questions.explanation: The Magic Mirror tells the Queen that Snow White is now the fairest.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In Frozen, what magical creation does Elsa build atop the North Mountain?
questions.explanation: Elsa conjures a towering ice palace during 'Let It Go.'

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, what does Dr. Facilier use to work his dark magic?
questions.explanation: Facilier relies on tarot cards and a shadow-summoning talisman for his voodoo.

questions.question: In Hercules, what item proves Hercules is the true son of Zeus?
answers: A medallion with the gods' symbol
questions.explanation: Baby Hercules wears a medallion bearing the symbol of the gods.

questions.question: In Raya and the Last Dragon, what shattered artifact once held back the Druun?
questions.explanation: The dragon gem repelled the Druun until it was broken into pieces.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, what famous singer's music does Lilo adore?
questions.explanation: Lilo is a devoted Elvis Presley fan and tries to make Stitch a 'model citizen' like Elvis.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, what does Baymax scan to assess a person's condition?
questions.explanation: Baymax scans patients to diagnose injuries and monitor vital signs.

questions.question: In Encanto, what is unusual about the bedroom door of Mirabel in the Casita?
answers: It is an ordinary door with no gift
questions.explanation: Unlike her relatives' magical doors, Mirabel's door never lit up with a gift.

questions.question: In The Rescuers, what precious gem is Penny forced to search for in the cave?
questions.explanation: Medusa forces Penny into a cave to retrieve the enormous Devil's Eye diamond.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland, what does Alice drink and eat to change her size?
questions.explanation: Alice drinks from a 'Drink Me' bottle and eats an 'Eat Me' cake to change size.

questions.question: In The Lion King, what does Scar tell Simba caused Mufasa's death?
questions.explanation: Scar manipulates Simba into believing he caused Mufasa's death and should flee.

questions.question: In Frozen, what happens when Elsa accidentally strikes Anna during the coronation events?
questions.explanation: Elsa's magic strikes Anna's heart, slowly turning her to ice until an act of true love.

questions.question: In Pinocchio, what happens to Pinocchio's nose when he tells a lie?
questions.explanation: The Blue Fairy's magic makes Pinocchio's nose grow whenever he lies.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, what breaks the enchantment on the Beast and his servants?
questions.explanation: Belle's tearful confession of love breaks the spell just in time.

questions.question: In Tarzan, what tragedy leaves baby Tarzan orphaned in the jungle?
questions.explanation: The leopard Sabor kills Tarzan's parents, leaving him to be raised by gorillas.

questions.question: In Moana, what does Moana discover her ancestors once were?
questions.explanation: Moana learns her people were wayfinders who explored the ocean generations ago.

questions.question: In Mulan, how is Mulan's secret identity as a woman revealed to the army?
answers: A wound is treated after battle
questions.explanation: After Mulan is wounded in the avalanche battle, the doctor reveals she is a woman.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, what does Ursula do after seizing King Triton's trident?
questions.explanation: Ursula grows to enormous size and controls the sea until Eric strikes her.

questions.question: In Encanto, what begins happening to the Madrigal family's magic during the story?
questions.explanation: Cracks appear in the Casita and the family's gifts begin to weaken and vanish.

questions.question: In Hercules, how does Hercules ultimately become a true hero and regain his godhood?
questions.explanation: Hercules willingly risks his life to save Meg, proving himself a true hero.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, what does Stitch initially want to do when he arrives on Earth?
questions.explanation: Programmed to destroy, Stitch causes chaos before Lilo teaches him about ohana.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what causes certain predators to turn savage in the city?
questions.explanation: A toxin from night howler flowers is used to make predators go feral.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, what happens to Tiana when she kisses Naveen the frog?
questions.explanation: Because Tiana isn't truly a princess, the kiss turns her into a frog as well.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, what does Hiro discover about the person behind the masked villain Yokai?
questions.explanation: Hiro learns the Kabuki-masked villain is Professor Callaghan, who faked his death.

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, why does Ralph leave his own game at the start of the film?
answers: To earn a medal and respect
questions.explanation: Tired of being the villain, Ralph goes game-jumping to win a hero's medal.

questions.question: In Chicken Little, what actually strikes Chicken Little on the head at the start?
questions.explanation: A hexagonal piece that looks like the sky hits Chicken Little, sparking panic.

questions.question: In Meet the Robinsons, what family motto guides the optimistic Robinson household?
questions.explanation: The Robinsons live by the motto 'Keep Moving Forward,' inspired by Walt Disney.

questions.question: In Brother Bear, why is Kenai transformed into a bear by the spirits?
answers: He killed a bear in anger
questions.explanation: The spirits turn Kenai into a bear to teach him love after he kills one in revenge.

questions.question: In Treasure Planet, what does Captain Flint's map ultimately reveal?
questions.explanation: The map opens a portal mechanism at the center of Treasure Planet.

questions.question: In Atlantis: The Lost Empire, how do Atlanteans stay alive for thousands of years?
questions.explanation: The Heart of Atlantis crystal grants the Atlanteans extraordinarily long lives.

questions.question: In Home on the Range, what trio of cows sets out to save their farm?
questions.explanation: Maggie, Grace, and Mrs. Calloway try to earn a bounty to save the Patch of Heaven farm.

questions.question: In The Fox and the Hound, what elderly woman takes in the orphaned fox Tod?
questions.explanation: Widow Tweed adopts and raises the young fox Tod.

questions.question: In Oliver & Company, what breed is the pampered dog Georgette?
questions.explanation: Georgette is Jenny's spoiled show poodle.

questions.question: In The Aristocats, what does Madame Adelaide plan to leave to her cats in her will?
questions.explanation: Madame leaves her fortune to the cats first, prompting Edgar's scheme.

questions.question: In Robin Hood, what animal represents the cowardly Prince John?
questions.explanation: Prince John is depicted as a thumb-sucking, insecure lion.

questions.question: In The Great Mouse Detective, whom does the villain Ratigan plan to replace on the throne?
questions.explanation: Ratigan schemes to install himself as ruler by replacing the mouse Queen with a robot.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, what does Governor Ratcliffe believe he will find in the New World?
questions.explanation: Ratcliffe is obsessed with digging up gold, singing 'Mine, Mine, Mine.'

questions.question: In The Fox and the Hound, what does the hound Copper's owner train him to become?
questions.explanation: Amos Slade trains Copper to be a hunting hound, straining his friendship with Tod.

questions.question: In Bolt, what does the network use to make Bolt believe his powers are real?
questions.explanation: Bolt is kept on a controlled TV set so he never learns his powers are fake.

questions.question: In Encanto, what gift does Mirabel's sister Isabela possess?
questions.explanation: Isabela can conjure flowers and plants, though she later grows uglier cacti too.

questions.question: In Encanto, what weather-controlling gift does Mirabel's aunt Pepa have?
questions.explanation: Pepa's emotions create clouds and storms above her head.

questions.question: In Raya and the Last Dragon, what mind-erasing plague turns people to stone?
questions.explanation: The Druun are dark spirits that petrify anyone they touch.

questions.question: In Strange World, what is the name of the legendary explorer father in the Clade family?
questions.explanation: Jaeger Clade is the famous explorer whose son Searcher chose farming instead.

questions.question: In Aladdin, what does the Sultan's law require Princess Jasmine to do?
questions.explanation: The law says Jasmine must marry a prince before her next birthday.

questions.question: In the animated Beauty and the Beast, what is the name of Gaston's bumbling sidekick?
questions.explanation: LeFou is Gaston's short, adoring companion who flatters him constantly.

questions.question: In the animated Pocahontas, which brave warrior does her father wish her to marry?
questions.explanation: Chief Powhatan hopes Pocahontas will wed the steadfast warrior Kocoum.

questions.question: What disguise does the Evil Queen use to offer Snow White the poisoned apple?
questions.explanation: The Evil Queen transforms herself into an old peddler woman, or hag, to trick Snow White into biting the poisoned apple.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In Pinocchio, what is the name of the island where misbehaving boys are turned into donkeys?
questions.explanation: Boys who misbehave on Pleasure Island are transformed into donkeys as punishment for their bad choices.

questions.question: What is the name of Dumbo's mother in the film?
questions.explanation: Dumbo's mother is named Mrs. Jumbo, and she is locked away after defending her son from teasing children.

questions.question: Which shy skunk becomes one of Bambi's closest forest friends?
questions.explanation: Flower the skunk, named ironically by Thumper, becomes one of Bambi's lifelong forest companions.

questions.question: In Cinderella, what are the names of the two mice who help sew Cinderella's dress?
questions.explanation: The mice Jaq and Gus gather scraps from the stepsisters' discarded ribbons to help finish Cinderella's dress.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland, who is anxiously late for a very important date at the story's start?
questions.explanation: The White Rabbit's frantic worry about being late for a very important date first lures Alice down the rabbit hole.

questions.question: In Peter Pan, what did the crocodile that stalks Captain Hook once swallow?
questions.explanation: The crocodile swallowed a ticking clock, which warns Captain Hook of its approach whenever he is nearby.

questions.question: What are the names of the mischievous Siamese cats in Lady and the Tramp?
questions.explanation: Si and Am are the troublemaking Siamese cats who wreak havoc while Aunt Sarah is watching Lady.

questions.question: What are the names of the three good fairies who protect Princess Aurora in Sleeping Beauty?
questions.explanation: Flora, Fauna, and Merryweather raise Aurora in a woodland cottage to hide her from Maleficent's curse.

questions.question: What are the names of Cruella de Vil's two bumbling henchmen in 101 Dalmatians?
questions.explanation: Jasper and Horace are hired by Cruella de Vil to steal the Dalmatian puppies for her fur coat scheme.

questions.question: What nickname is given to young Arthur throughout The Sword in the Stone?
questions.explanation: Young Arthur is affectionately nicknamed Wart by his family before Merlin discovers his destiny as king.

questions.question: Which two animals serve as Mowgli's primary guardians in The Jungle Book?
questions.explanation: The panther Bagheera and the bear Baloo both look after Mowgli as he travels toward the man-village.

questions.question: What is the name of the alley cat who helps Duchess and her kittens find their way home?
questions.explanation: Thomas O'Malley, a free-spirited alley cat, escorts Duchess and her kittens back to Paris after Edgar strands them.

questions.question: In Disney's Robin Hood, what kind of animal is Little John depicted as?
questions.explanation: Little John, Robin Hood's loyal companion, is portrayed as a bear in the film's cast of anthropomorphic animals.

questions.question: What is the name of the international mouse organization that Bernard and Miss Bianca belong to?
questions.explanation: Bernard and Miss Bianca are delegates of the Rescue Aid Society, a mouse organization devoted to helping those in danger.

questions.question: What is Taran's occupation at the beginning of The Black Cauldron?
questions.explanation: Taran begins the film as an assistant pig-keeper who tends to the oracular pig Hen Wen.

questions.question: What London street is home to the detective in The Great Mouse Detective?
questions.explanation: Basil of Baker Street, a mouse detective inspired by Sherlock Holmes, lives beneath the famous London address.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, what does Ariel give Ursula in exchange for human legs?
questions.explanation: Ariel signs a contract giving Ursula her beautiful singing voice in exchange for three days as a human.

questions.question: What is the name of King Triton's court composer crab in The Little Mermaid?
questions.explanation: Sebastian the crab serves as King Triton's court composer and is tasked with keeping an eye on Ariel.

questions.question: What is the name of the golden eagle Cody befriends in The Rescuers Down Under?
questions.explanation: Cody befriends Marahute, a majestic golden eagle hunted by the poacher McLeach for her rare feathers.

questions.question: What is the name of Belle's inventor father in Beauty and the Beast?
questions.explanation: Belle's father, Maurice, is an eccentric inventor whose imprisonment by the Beast sets the plot in motion.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, which household item has Cogsworth been enchanted into?
questions.explanation: The prim and proper Cogsworth is cursed to live as a ticking mantel clock in the enchanted castle.

questions.question: What is the name of Jafar's talking parrot in Aladdin?
questions.explanation: Iago is Jafar's sarcastic parrot sidekick who helps the sorcerer scheme to steal the sultan's throne.

questions.question: What is the name of Princess Jasmine's pet tiger in Aladdin?
questions.explanation: Jasmine's loyal pet tiger, Rajah, protects her throughout the film and is wary of strangers like Aladdin.

questions.question: What are the names of the three hyenas who serve Scar in The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Shenzi, Banzai, and Ed are the hyena trio who ally with Scar in his plot to seize Pride Rock.

questions.question: What species of animal is Rafiki, the wise advisor in The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Rafiki is a mandrill who serves as a shaman and wise advisor to the royal family of Pride Rock.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, what is the name of the hummingbird companion?
questions.explanation: Flit is the fussy hummingbird who travels alongside Pocahontas.

questions.question: What is the name of the English governor who leads the settlers as the antagonist of Pocahontas?
questions.explanation: Governor Ratcliffe leads the Jamestown settlers and is obsessed with finding gold at any cost.

questions.question: What is the name of the Captain of the Guard who befriends Quasimodo in The Hunchback of Notre Dame?
questions.explanation: Captain Phoebus, leader of Frollo's guard, defies his commander and helps protect Quasimodo and Esmeralda.

questions.question: What are the names of the three gargoyle friends who counsel Quasimodo?
questions.explanation: Victor, Hugo, and Laverne are the stone gargoyles who come to life to offer Quasimodo companionship and advice.

questions.question: Who narrates the story of Hercules through song throughout the film?
questions.explanation: A gospel-singing chorus of five Muses narrates Hercules's journey from infant god to legendary hero.

questions.question: In Hercules, what are the names of Hades's two bumbling minions?
questions.explanation: Pain and Panic are Hades's shape-shifting imp henchmen.

questions.question: What is the name of the small dragon who becomes Mulan's guardian and companion?
questions.explanation: Mushu, a tiny disgraced guardian dragon, appoints himself Mulan's protector as she serves in the army disguised as a man.

questions.question: What is the name of the gorilla who adopts Tarzan as her own son?
questions.explanation: Kala, a gentle gorilla who lost her own baby, rescues the orphaned infant Tarzan and raises him as her son.

questions.question: What animal does Yzma accidentally turn Emperor Kuzco into in The Emperor's New Groove?
questions.explanation: A mixed-up poison potion transforms the arrogant Emperor Kuzco into a llama instead of killing him.

questions.question: What is the name of the linguist who leads the expedition to find Atlantis?
questions.explanation: Milo Thatch, a museum linguist, joins an expedition using his grandfather's research to locate the lost city of Atlantis.

questions.question: What experiment number is Stitch officially designated in Lilo & Stitch?
questions.explanation: Stitch was created as Experiment 626, a genetic creation designed by Jumba to cause chaos and destruction.

questions.question: Who is the mentor cyborg that guides Jim Hawkins in Treasure Planet?
questions.explanation: The cyborg cook John Silver becomes an unlikely mentor and father figure to young Jim Hawkins during the voyage.

questions.question: What is the name of the firefly who befriends Tiana and Naveen in the bayou?
questions.explanation: Ray the Cajun firefly helps guide Tiana and the frog-turned Naveen through the bayou toward Mama Odie.

questions.question: What is Flynn Rider's real birth name, revealed during Tangled?
questions.explanation: The dashing thief known as Flynn Rider admits his real name is the far less glamorous Eugene Fitzherbert.

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, what video game does Vanellope von Schweetz belong to?
questions.explanation: Vanellope is a glitching racer from the candy-themed kart game Sugar Rush, one of the arcade's newest cabinets.

questions.question: Who is revealed to be the true identity of King Candy in Wreck-It Ralph?
questions.explanation: King Candy is unmasked as Turbo, a rogue racing game villain who hijacked Sugar Rush's code long ago.

questions.question: What is the name of Kristoff's loyal reindeer in Frozen?
questions.explanation: Sven the reindeer has been Kristoff's best friend and sled-puller since they were both very young.

questions.question: What is the name of Hiro Hamada's inflatable healthcare robot?
questions.explanation: Baymax is a soft, huggable healthcare companion robot built by Hiro's brother Tadashi to care for people.

questions.question: What is the name of the sly fox who partners with Officer Judy Hopps in Zootopia?
questions.explanation: Nick Wilde, a streetwise con artist fox, teams up with rookie officer Judy Hopps to crack a missing mammals case.

questions.question: What is the name of Moana's deceased grandmother who guides her spiritually?
questions.explanation: Gramma Tala encourages Moana's connection to the ocean and continues to guide her as a spirit after passing.

questions.question: In Frozen II, whose name is revealed to be the grandfather of Elsa and Anna?
questions.explanation: King Runeard is revealed as the grandfather whose betrayal of the Northuldra people caused the Enchanted Forest's curse.

questions.question: What is the name of the last dragon who helps Raya on her quest?
questions.explanation: Sisu is the last surviving water dragon who joins Raya to search for the pieces of a magical gem.

questions.question: What is the name of the magical house central to the Madrigal family in Encanto?
questions.explanation: Casita is the sentient, enchanted house that grants each Madrigal family member a unique magical gift.

questions.question: What is the name of the goat who accompanies Asha throughout Wish?
questions.explanation: Valentino is Asha's loyal pet goat, who gains the ability to speak after Star grants wishes upon Rosas.

questions.question: What is the name of the gritty racing game Vanellope discovers within the internet?
questions.explanation: Vanellope becomes enchanted by Slaughter Race, an intense online racing game she finds while exploring the internet.

questions.question: What is the name of the whale who swallows Geppetto and later Pinocchio?
questions.explanation: Monstro is the enormous, fearsome whale who swallows Geppetto's boat and later traps Pinocchio inside as well.

questions.question: What is the name of Prince Eric's loyal manservant in The Little Mermaid?
questions.explanation: Grimsby is Prince Eric's dutiful advisor and manservant who worries about the prince's romantic prospects.

questions.question: What is the name of Belle's horse in Beauty and the Beast?
questions.explanation: Philippe is the horse who carries Belle into the forest and later leads her back to rescue her father.

questions.question: What profession does Tiana dream of pursuing before she becomes a princess in The Princess and the Frog?
questions.explanation: Tiana works tirelessly saving money in hopes of one day opening her own restaurant in New Orleans.

questions.question: What is the name of Ariel's father, the ruler of Atlantica, in The Little Mermaid?
questions.explanation: King Triton rules the underwater kingdom of Atlantica and is fiercely protective of his youngest daughter, Ariel.

questions.question: What is the name of Mulan's father, whose place she takes in the army?
questions.explanation: Mulan secretly takes the place of her aging, injured father, Fa Zhou, when he is conscripted for war.

questions.question: What is the name of Simba's childhood friend who later becomes his queen in The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Nala grows up alongside Simba as a cub and later reunites with him as an adult to reclaim Pride Rock.

questions.question: What is Kristoff's occupation when he first meets Anna in Frozen?
questions.explanation: Kristoff makes his living as an ice harvester, cutting and selling blocks of ice with his reindeer, Sven.

questions.question: What is the name of the young inventor who is the protagonist of Meet the Robinsons?
questions.explanation: Lewis is the orphaned boy inventor whose time-traveling adventure reveals the family he is destined to have.

questions.question: What is the name of Hiro Hamada's older brother, who created Baymax in Big Hero 6?
questions.explanation: Hiro's brother Tadashi built Baymax as a healthcare companion before his death motivates Hiro's later journey.

questions.question: What is the name of the chief who is Moana's father in the film?
questions.explanation: Chief Tui leads the village of Motunui and initially forbids anyone from voyaging beyond the reef.

questions.question: What relation is Abuela Alma to Mirabel in Encanto?
questions.explanation: Abuela Alma is Mirabel's grandmother and the matriarch who founded the magical Madrigal family home.

questions.question: What nickname do other characters commonly use for Megara in Hercules?
questions.explanation: Megara, the witty love interest secretly working for Hades, is affectionately known to others as Meg.

questions.question: What is the name of Pocahontas's father, chief of the Powhatan people?
questions.explanation: Chief Powhatan leads his people and hopes his daughter Pocahontas will marry the brave warrior Kocoum.

questions.question: What is the name of the orphaned bear cub who befriends the transformed Kenai in Brother Bear?
questions.explanation: Koda is the talkative orphaned bear cub who travels with Kenai after Kenai is magically turned into a bear.

questions.question: What is the name of the Emperor's counselor who distrusts Mulan throughout the film?
questions.explanation: Chi Fu serves as the Emperor's uptight counselor and repeatedly doubts Mulan's worth as a soldier.

questions.question: What title does Maui use to describe himself when introducing his powers in Moana?
answers: Demigod of the wind and sea
questions.explanation: Maui proudly introduces himself as a demigod of the wind and sea, credited with pulling islands from the ocean.

questions.question: What creature does the Evil Queen keep as a companion in her castle in Snow White?
questions.explanation: A pet raven perches near the Evil Queen throughout the film, watching as she brews her poisoned apple.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: What is the name of Cinderella's cruel stepmother?
questions.explanation: Lady Tremaine is Cinderella's icy stepmother who forces her into servitude and tries to prevent her from attending the ball.

questions.question: What is the name of the tyrannical queen in Alice in Wonderland who constantly demands beheadings?
questions.explanation: The short-tempered Queen of Hearts rules Wonderland and repeatedly shouts for the beheading of anyone who upsets her.

questions.question: What is the name of the sorceress who curses Princess Aurora in Sleeping Beauty?
questions.explanation: Maleficent curses infant Princess Aurora to prick her finger on a spindle and fall into a deathlike sleep.

questions.question: What profession does Cruella de Vil hold that drives her scheme to steal puppies in 101 Dalmatians?
questions.explanation: Cruella de Vil is a wealthy fashion designer obsessed with fur, which motivates her plot to steal Dalmatian puppies.

questions.question: What is the name of the tiger who serves as the primary antagonist in The Jungle Book?
questions.explanation: Shere Khan is the fearsome tiger whose hatred of humans threatens Mowgli throughout the jungle.

questions.question: What is the name of Prince John's scheming snake advisor in Robin Hood?
questions.explanation: Sir Hiss is Prince John's hypnotic snake advisor who constantly flatters the cowardly, thumb-sucking ruler.

questions.question: What is the name of the sea witch who tricks Ariel into a dangerous bargain in The Little Mermaid?
questions.explanation: The sea witch Ursula offers Ariel human legs in exchange for her voice, hiding a treacherous catch in the deal.

questions.question: Who is the treacherous royal advisor who seeks the magic lamp in Aladdin?
questions.explanation: Jafar, the sultan's power-hungry vizier, schemes to obtain the genie's lamp to seize control of Agrabah.

questions.question: What is the name of the corrupt judge who is the primary antagonist in The Hunchback of Notre Dame?
questions.explanation: Judge Claude Frollo is the film's antagonist, whose obsession with Esmeralda drives much of the story's conflict.

questions.question: What is the name of the god of the underworld who serves as the villain in Hercules?
questions.explanation: Hades, the fiery-tempered lord of the underworld, plots to overthrow Zeus and take control of Mount Olympus.

questions.question: What is the name of the Hun leader who invades China as the villain in Mulan?
questions.explanation: Shan Yu leads the invading Hun army against China, forcing the Emperor to conscript soldiers, including Mulan's father.

questions.question: What is the name of the ruthless hunter who serves as the human villain in Tarzan?
questions.explanation: Clayton is the mercenary hunter who accompanies the Porter expedition and secretly plots to capture the gorillas.

questions.question: What is the name of the treasure hunter who is the primary antagonist in The Rescuers Down Under?
questions.explanation: Poacher Percival McLeach hunts the rare golden eagle Marahute and kidnaps a boy who tries to protect her.

questions.question: What is the name of the voodoo practitioner who serves as the villain in The Princess and the Frog?
questions.explanation: Dr. Facilier, known as the Shadow Man, uses dark magic to transform Prince Naveen into a frog.

questions.question: What is the name of the witch who kidnaps and raises Rapunzel in Tangled?
questions.explanation: Mother Gothel kidnaps baby Rapunzel to keep her magical hair's youth-restoring power for herself alone.

questions.question: What prince from the Southern Isles is revealed as the true villain of Frozen?
questions.explanation: Prince Hans courts Anna to gain the throne of Arendelle, only to betray her once his true intentions are revealed.

questions.question: What is the name of the cricket who serves as Pinocchio's conscience?
questions.explanation: Jiminy Cricket is appointed by the Blue Fairy to act as Pinocchio's official conscience on his journey.

questions.question: What is the name of the circus mouse who teaches Dumbo to fly?
questions.explanation: Timothy Q. Mouse befriends the outcast Dumbo and helps convince him he can fly using a magic feather.

questions.question: What is the name of Belle's sidekick teapot in Beauty and the Beast?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Potts, the warm and motherly castle housekeeper, was enchanted into a teapot along with her son, Chip.

questions.question: What is the name of Aladdin's loyal pet monkey?
questions.explanation: Abu is Aladdin's mischievous pet monkey who accompanies him on his adventures through Agrabah and the Cave of Wonders.

questions.question: What are the names of the meerkat and warthog duo who adopt Simba after he flees Pride Rock?
questions.explanation: Timon the meerkat and Pumbaa the warthog take in the young runaway Simba and teach him their carefree philosophy.

questions.question: What is the name of the hornbill who serves as Mufasa's royal majordomo in The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Zazu is the fussy hornbill who serves as the royal majordomo, keeping watch over the Pride Lands for Mufasa.

questions.question: What is the name of Pocahontas's hummingbird companion?
questions.explanation: Flit the hummingbird is fiercely protective of Pocahontas and is wary of the English settlers from the start.

questions.question: What nickname is commonly used for Philoctetes, Hercules's satyr trainer?
questions.explanation: Philoctetes, better known as Phil, reluctantly trains Hercules to become a true hero worthy of Mount Olympus.

questions.question: What is the name of the gorilla who becomes Tarzan's closest friend and confidant?
questions.explanation: Terk is the boisterous gorilla who grows up alongside Tarzan and remains his loyal friend into adulthood.

questions.question: What is the name of Yzma's henchman who ultimately helps Kuzco in The Emperor's New Groove?
questions.explanation: Kronk works as Yzma's dim but good-natured henchman before his conscience leads him to help save Kuzco.

questions.question: What is the name of Jim Hawkins's shape-shifting alien pet in Treasure Planet?
questions.explanation: Morph is a small, pink, shape-shifting alien creature that befriends Jim Hawkins and Long John Silver.

questions.question: What is the name of Rapunzel's pet chameleon in Tangled?
questions.explanation: Pascal is Rapunzel's expressive chameleon companion who has kept her company throughout her years in the tower.

questions.question: What is the name of the palace horse who befriends Flynn Rider in Tangled?
questions.explanation: Maximus is a determined palace guard horse who initially hunts Flynn Rider before becoming an ally.

questions.question: What is the name of the living snowman who befriends Anna and Elsa in Frozen?
questions.explanation: Olaf is the cheerful snowman unknowingly given life by Elsa's powers during her childhood.

questions.question: What is the name of the rooster who accompanies Moana on her ocean voyage?
questions.explanation: Heihei the rooster is a comically dim-witted stowaway who accidentally joins Moana on her journey across the ocean.

questions.question: What is the name of the talking teacup who is Mrs. Potts's son in Beauty and the Beast?
questions.explanation: Chip is Mrs. Potts's young son, an enchanted teacup who befriends Belle during her stay at the castle.

questions.question: What is the name of the underwater kingdom ruled by King Triton in The Little Mermaid?
questions.explanation: Atlantica is the underwater merfolk kingdom ruled by King Triton, where Ariel longs to become human.

questions.question: What is the name of the fictional city where Aladdin is set?
questions.explanation: Agrabah is the fictional Middle Eastern city that serves as the setting for Aladdin's adventures.

questions.question: What is the name of the rock formation that serves as the royal home of the lions in The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Pride Rock is the towering formation overlooking the Pride Lands where the lion king presents his heir to the kingdom.

questions.question: What cathedral serves as Quasimodo's home and sanctuary in The Hunchback of Notre Dame?
questions.explanation: Quasimodo lives hidden in the bell tower of Notre Dame Cathedral, cared for secretly by Judge Frollo.

questions.question: What is the name of the fantastical island where children never grow up in Peter Pan?
questions.explanation: Neverland is the magical island where Peter Pan and the Lost Boys live, and where children never grow old.

questions.question: What is the name of the kingdom where Rapunzel lives in Tangled?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel is the lost princess of the kingdom of Corona, hidden away in a remote tower by Mother Gothel.

questions.question: What is the name of the metropolis where predator and prey mammals coexist in Zootopia?
questions.explanation: Zootopia is the sprawling mammal metropolis divided into districts like Sahara Square and Tundratown.

questions.question: What is the name of Judy Hopps's rural hometown in Zootopia?
questions.explanation: Judy Hopps grows up on a carrot farm in the rural countryside town of Bunnyburrow before moving to the big city.

questions.question: In Moana, what is the name of the treasure-hoarding giant crab in Lalotai?
questions.explanation: Tamatoa is the glittering, treasure-obsessed coconut crab of the monster realm.

questions.question: What is the name of the underworld realm of monsters that Maui once raided in Moana?
questions.explanation: Lalotai is the fearsome realm of monsters beneath the sea, home to the treasure-hoarding crab Tamatoa.

questions.question: In Frozen, what does Elsa build for herself on the North Mountain?
questions.explanation: Fleeing Arendelle, Elsa conjures a towering ice palace on the North Mountain.

questions.question: What is the mysterious, mist-shrouded location Elsa journeys into in Frozen II?
questions.explanation: Elsa ventures into the Enchanted Forest, a magical realm sealed off by mist for decades, to learn her origins.

questions.question: What is the name of the rival trading kingdom whose duke is suspicious of Arendelle in Frozen?
questions.explanation: The small trading kingdom of Weselton sends its scheming duke to Arendelle's coronation in hopes of a trade deal.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, what instrument does the alligator Louis dream of playing?
questions.explanation: Louis is a jazz-loving alligator who longs to play trumpet among humans.

questions.question: Where does Ariel secretly keep her collection of human artifacts in The Little Mermaid?
questions.explanation: Ariel secretly stores her collection of human artifacts in a hidden grotto away from her father's watchful eye.

questions.question: What Greek city does Hercules call home throughout the film?
questions.explanation: Hercules grows up in the city of Thebes after being raised by kind mortal farmers who found him as a baby.

questions.question: What object does the Evil Queen consult to confirm Snow White is still the fairest in the land?
questions.explanation: The Evil Queen's enchanted Magic Mirror truthfully answers her questions, revealing that Snow White remains the fairest of all.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: What item does Cinderella leave behind at the ball that the Prince uses to find her?
questions.explanation: Cinderella loses one of her glass slippers while fleeing the ball at midnight, which the Prince later uses to identify her.

questions.question: What object does Maleficent's curse compel Aurora to prick her finger on in Sleeping Beauty?
questions.explanation: Maleficent's curse dictates that Aurora will prick her finger on a spinning wheel's spindle and fall into eternal sleep.

questions.question: What must happen before the last petal falls from the enchanted rose in Beauty and the Beast?
answers: The Beast must learn to love and be loved in return
questions.explanation: The enchanted rose will lose its final petal on the Beast's twenty-first birthday unless he learns to truly love.

questions.question: What magical item grants three wishes to whoever rubs it in Aladdin?
questions.explanation: The magic lamp houses the Genie, who is bound to grant three wishes to anyone who rightfully possesses it.

questions.question: What item do Aladdin and Jasmine ride during the song 'A Whole New World'?
questions.explanation: Aladdin borrows the enchanted magic carpet to take Jasmine on a nighttime flight around the world.

questions.question: What object does the Beast give Belle so she can see her father and the outside world?
answers: A magic mirror on the wall
questions.explanation: The Beast gives Belle an enchanted hand mirror that shows her anything she wishes to see, including her ailing father.

questions.question: What golden token does the Blue Fairy give Jiminy Cricket to mark him as Pinocchio's conscience?
questions.explanation: The Blue Fairy presents Jiminy Cricket with an official golden badge naming him Pinocchio's conscience.

questions.question: What weapon is Zeus commonly depicted wielding as a symbol of his power in Hercules?
questions.explanation: Zeus, king of the gods, is depicted wielding a mighty thunderbolt as the symbol of his divine authority.

questions.question: What do the three good fairies use to magically change the color of Aurora's gown?
questions.explanation: Flora and Merryweather use their magic wands to repeatedly change Aurora's gown between pink and blue.

questions.question: What magical candle grants the Madrigal children their unique gifts in Encanto?
questions.explanation: A miracle candle grants magical gifts to each Madrigal child when they come of age, except for Mirabel.

questions.question: What celestial object does Asha wish upon that comes to life as a character in Wish?
questions.explanation: Asha's heartfelt wish summons a literal ball of star energy to Earth, which becomes a mischievous, joyful character.

questions.question: What magical fish hook does Maui use to shapeshift and fight in Moana?
questions.explanation: Maui's magical fish hook allows him to transform into various animals and is central to his demigod powers.

questions.question: What sacred object must Moana return to restore Te Fiti in the film?
questions.explanation: Moana must return the stolen Heart of Te Fiti, a small green stone, to heal the goddess island and stop the darkness spreading.

questions.question: What is the name of the legendary sword young Arthur pulls from an anvil in The Sword in the Stone?
questions.explanation: Arthur unknowingly pulls the legendary sword Excalibur from its stone and anvil, proving he is the rightful king.

questions.question: What power does Rapunzel's magical hair possess in Tangled?
answers: It heals wounds and reverses aging
questions.explanation: Rapunzel's uncut golden hair glows and can heal injuries or restore youth when she sings a specific incantation.

questions.question: What does Gaston organize in an attempt to destroy the Beast in Beauty and the Beast?
questions.explanation: Gaston rallies the villagers into an angry mob, convincing them the Beast is a dangerous threat that must be destroyed.

questions.question: What does Scar convince Simba to believe about the circumstances of Mufasa's death?
questions.explanation: Scar manipulates the grieving young Simba into believing he is responsible for his father Mufasa's death.

questions.question: What is Aladdin's first wish when he rubs the magic lamp?
questions.explanation: Aladdin's first wish transforms him into Prince Ali so he can properly court Princess Jasmine.

questions.question: What does Pocahontas do to stop her father from executing John Smith?
answers: She shields him with her own body
questions.explanation: Pocahontas throws herself over John Smith just before his execution, persuading her father to spare his life.

questions.question: What heroic act does Quasimodo perform at the climax of The Hunchback of Notre Dame?
answers: He rings the bells to warn of invasion
He defeats Frollo alone in battle
He saves Esmeralda from being burned at the stake
questions.explanation: Quasimodo swings down from Notre Dame's tower to rescue Esmeralda just before Frollo can burn her at the stake.

questions.question: What must Hercules accomplish to reclaim his place among the gods on Mount Olympus?
questions.explanation: Hercules must prove himself a true hero through selfless acts before he can be restored to full godhood on Olympus.

questions.question: What does Mulan do to spare her ailing father from being drafted into the army?
answers: She begs the Emperor for mercy
She trains her father in secret
She secretly takes his place disguised as a man
questions.explanation: Mulan cuts her hair and steals her father's armor to secretly take his place in the army disguised as a soldier.

questions.question: What choice does Tarzan ultimately make at the end of the film about where he belongs?
answers: He chooses to stay in the jungle with the gorillas
He builds a treehouse for tourists
questions.explanation: Tarzan decides to remain in the jungle with his gorilla family, choosing them over life in human civilization.

questions.question: What happens to Kuzco at the very start of The Emperor's New Groove that sets the plot in motion?
answers: He is banished from the palace
Yzma poisons him and turns him into a llama
He loses his throne to Kronk
He is cursed by a village witch
questions.explanation: After Kuzco fires her, Yzma tries to poison him but accidentally transforms him into a llama instead.

questions.question: Why does Lilo initially bring Stitch home in Lilo & Stitch?
answers: She wins him at a carnival
Nani gives him to her as a gift
She mistakes him for a dog at the animal shelter
questions.explanation: Lilo adopts the crash-landed alien Stitch from a local animal shelter, mistaking his odd appearance for that of a dog.

questions.question: What happens to Tiana immediately after she kisses the frog Prince Naveen?
answers: She turns into a frog herself
questions.explanation: Rather than breaking the spell, Tiana's kiss backfires and transforms her into a frog as well, since she is not truly a princess.

questions.question: What happens to Rapunzel's magic hair after Flynn cuts it in Tangled?
answers: It transfers its power to Flynn
It loses its magical power and turns brown
questions.explanation: Once Flynn cuts Rapunzel's enchanted hair, it instantly loses its magic and turns from gold to brown.

questions.question: What does Elsa do immediately after her ice powers are exposed at her coronation in Frozen?
answers: She flees to the North Mountain
She locks herself in the castle
questions.explanation: Terrified and ashamed, Elsa flees Arendelle for the North Mountain, where she builds herself an ice palace in isolation.

questions.question: What sacrifice does Anna make to save Elsa near the climax of Frozen?
answers: She gives up her own royal title
She steps in to block Hans's sword, freezing solid
questions.explanation: Anna throws herself between Elsa and Hans's blade just as she begins to freeze, an act of true love that saves them both.

questions.question: What does Hiro initially want to do with Baymax after learning the truth about his brother's death?
answers: Use him to seek revenge on the villain
Rebuild him as a weapon for the city
questions.explanation: Consumed by grief and anger, Hiro reprograms Baymax with combat abilities, intending to use him for revenge.

questions.question: What must Moana do to restore balance to the ocean and stop the lava monster Te Kā?
answers: Return the Heart to Te Fiti
questions.explanation: Moana realizes that the fearsome Te Kā is actually Te Fiti, and restoring her stolen heart heals the goddess and the ocean.

questions.question: What does Mulan present to the Emperor as proof of her victory over Shan Yu?
questions.explanation: Mulan presents Shan Yu's sword to the Emperor, along with his crest, as proof that the Hun leader has been defeated.

questions.question: In Pinocchio, what is the name of the con-artist fox who calls himself Honest John?
questions.explanation: The scheming fox Foulfellow, aided by the cat Gideon, twice leads Pinocchio astray.

questions.question: In Fantasia's 'The Sorcerer's Apprentice,' what is the sorcerer's name?
questions.explanation: The sorcerer is named Yen Sid, which is Disney spelled backwards.

questions.question: In Dumbo, what is the name of the little circus train that carries the animals?
questions.explanation: The cheerful engine Casey Jr. hauls the circus from town to town in Dumbo.

questions.question: In Bambi, by what title is Bambi's father known?
answers: The Great Prince of the Forest
questions.explanation: Bambi's father is the majestic Great Prince of the Forest, its oldest and wisest stag.

questions.question: What is the name of Cinderella's loyal bloodhound?
questions.explanation: Bruno the bloodhound dreams of catching the wicked cat Lucifer in Cinderella.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland, which creature gives Alice cryptic advice while smoking a hookah on a mushroom?
questions.explanation: The Caterpillar puffs smoke letters and asks Alice 'Who are you?' before turning into a butterfly.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland, which pair recite the tale of the Walrus and the Carpenter?
answers: The Mad Hatter and March Hare
questions.explanation: The rotund twins Tweedledee and Tweedledum recount the story of the Walrus and the Carpenter.

questions.question: What is the name of Captain Hook's bumbling first mate in Peter Pan?
questions.explanation: The good-natured Mr. Smee loyally serves and often exasperates Captain Hook.

questions.question: What is the name of the Newfoundland dog who serves as nanny to the Darling children?
questions.explanation: Nana the Newfoundland acts as a devoted nursemaid to Wendy, John, and Michael.

questions.question: What are the names of the two dogs, a Scottish terrier and a bloodhound, who befriend Lady?
questions.explanation: The Scottie Jock and the old bloodhound Trusty are Lady's neighborhood friends.

questions.question: What name do the three good fairies give Aurora while hiding her in the forest?
questions.explanation: To hide her from Maleficent, the fairies raise Aurora as a peasant girl named Briar Rose.

questions.question: In 101 Dalmatians, what are the names of the dalmatian parents whose puppies are stolen?
questions.explanation: Pongo and Perdita lead the rescue of their stolen litter from Cruella de Vil.

questions.question: What is the name of Merlin's highly educated pet owl in The Sword in the Stone?
questions.explanation: The grumpy, learned owl Archimedes helps tutor young Arthur alongside Merlin.

questions.question: In The Jungle Book, what kind of animal is Colonel Hathi, who leads a marching patrol?
questions.explanation: Colonel Hathi commands a comical elephant patrol drilling through the jungle.

questions.question: What are the names of Duchess's three kittens in The Aristocats?
questions.explanation: Duchess's kittens are the prim Marie, the painterly Toulouse, and the musical Berlioz.

questions.question: What kind of animal is Robin Hood depicted as in Disney's Robin Hood?
questions.explanation: Disney's Robin Hood reimagines the outlaw hero as a clever fox.

questions.question: What are the names of the fox and hound whose friendship is central to The Fox and the Hound?
questions.explanation: The fox Tod and hound Copper are childhood friends divided by their natures.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, how many older sisters does Ariel have?
questions.explanation: Ariel is the youngest of King Triton's seven daughters, giving her six older sisters.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, what is the name of the asylum owner Gaston bribes to threaten Belle's father?
questions.explanation: Gaston pays the sinister Monsieur D'Arque to help commit Maurice unless Belle marries him.

questions.question: In Aladdin, what shape is the entrance to the Cave of Wonders?
questions.explanation: The Cave of Wonders rises from the desert as an enormous tiger's head.

questions.question: What is the name of Simba's mother in The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Sarabi is Mufasa's queen and Simba's mother in The Lion King.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, what is the name of the wise talking willow tree Pocahontas confides in?
questions.explanation: The ancient spirit Grandmother Willow offers Pocahontas guidance and encouragement.

questions.question: In The Hunchback of Notre Dame, who is the gypsy puppeteer that narrates the tale?
questions.explanation: Clopin, leader of the gypsies, opens and narrates the story through the bells of Notre Dame.

questions.question: In Hercules, what kind of creature is Pegasus, the gift given to Hercules?
questions.explanation: Zeus fashions Pegasus, a flying horse, from clouds as a companion for baby Hercules.

questions.question: In Mulan, what is the name of the lucky cricket that accompanies Mulan?
questions.explanation: The cricket Cri-Kee, given for luck, tags along on Mulan's journey with Mushu.

questions.question: In Tarzan, what is the name of the anxious young elephant who is Tarzan's friend?
questions.explanation: The nervous elephant Tantor is one of Tarzan's closest jungle companions.

questions.question: In The Rescuers Down Under, what kind of animal is Joanna, McLeach's pet?
questions.explanation: McLeach's greedy, food-stealing pet Joanna is a large goanna lizard.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, what kind of animal is Percy, Governor Ratcliffe's pampered pet?
questions.explanation: Ratcliffe's spoiled pug Percy eventually joins Pocahontas's animal friends.

questions.question: What princely alias does the Genie create for Aladdin to woo Jasmine?
questions.explanation: The Genie transforms Aladdin into the dazzling Prince Ali Ababwa to court Jasmine.

questions.question: In Hercules, which many-headed monster grows two heads for each one cut off?
questions.explanation: Hercules battles the Hydra, whose severed necks each sprout multiple new heads.

questions.question: In Mulan, what is the name of the captain who trains the recruits and leads them?
questions.explanation: Captain Li Shang trains the new soldiers and later leads the defense of the Imperial City.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, what kind of animal is Scuttle, who misidentifies human objects?
questions.explanation: The seagull Scuttle confidently but wrongly names human items like the 'dinglehopper.'

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, into what object has the opera-singing servant Madame been transformed?
questions.explanation: Madame de la Grande Bouche, the castle's diva, is enchanted into a large wardrobe.

questions.question: What brings Jane and Professor Porter to the jungle in Tarzan?
questions.explanation: Jane and her father Professor Porter travel to Africa on an expedition to study gorillas.

questions.question: In The Emperor's New Groove, what is the name of the kind-hearted village leader who helps Kuzco?
questions.explanation: The good-natured peasant Pacha reluctantly helps the transformed Emperor Kuzco get home.

questions.question: In Atlantis: The Lost Empire, what is the name of the Atlantean princess Milo befriends?
questions.explanation: Princess Kida guides Milo through the hidden city of Atlantis.

questions.question: In Treasure Planet, what is the name of the marooned, memory-loss robot Jim finds?
questions.explanation: The manic, forgetful robot B.E.N. helps Jim after years alone on Treasure Planet.

questions.question: In Brother Bear, what are the names of the two comic-relief moose?
questions.explanation: The bickering Canadian-accented moose Rutt and Tuke provide comic relief in Brother Bear.

questions.question: In Home on the Range, who is the cattle-rustling villain with a hypnotic yodel?
questions.explanation: The rustler Alameda Slim uses his yodeling to hypnotize and steal cattle.

questions.question: In Chicken Little, what does the panicked title character famously proclaim after being hit on the head?
questions.explanation: Chicken Little sparks townwide panic by crying that the sky is falling.

questions.question: In Meet the Robinsons, what is the name of the sentient robotic bowler hat that serves as a villain?
questions.explanation: The scheming robotic hat Doris manipulates the Bowler Hat Guy in Meet the Robinsons.

questions.question: In Bolt, what kind of animal is Rhino, Bolt's TV-obsessed companion?
questions.explanation: Rhino is a fearless, television-loving hamster who idolizes Bolt.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, who is the blind, ancient voodoo priestess who helps Tiana?
questions.explanation: The 197-year-old good voodoo priestess Mama Odie advises Tiana and Naveen in the bayou.

questions.question: In Tangled, what is the name of the tavern full of ruffians where Rapunzel sings 'I've Got a Dream'?
questions.explanation: The rowdy pub the Snuggly Duckling is where the thugs reveal their secret dreams.

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, what is the name of the good-guy hero in Ralph's own arcade game?
questions.explanation: Fix-It Felix Jr. is the golden-hammered hero of the game Ralph is cast as the villain in.

questions.question: In Frozen, what are the rock creatures who raise Kristoff called?
questions.explanation: Kristoff is raised by magical rock trolls led by the wise Grand Pabbie.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, what is the name of the fictional city that blends San Francisco and Tokyo?
questions.explanation: Big Hero 6 is set in San Fransokyo, a hybrid of San Francisco and Tokyo.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what kind of animal is Flash, the slowest worker at the DMV?
questions.explanation: Flash the sloth memorably takes forever to help Judy and Nick at the DMV.

questions.question: In Moana, what are the small coconut-armored pirates who attack Moana and Maui called?
questions.explanation: The Kakamora are tiny coconut-clad pirates who ambush Moana's canoe.

questions.question: In Encanto, which Madrigal has the power of super strength?
questions.explanation: Luisa Madrigal carries immense burdens with her gift of super strength.

questions.question: In Wish, what is the name of the king who rules the kingdom of Rosas?
questions.explanation: King Magnifico rules Rosas and secretly hoards his people's wishes.

questions.question: In Raya and the Last Dragon, what is the name of Raya's armadillo-like pet and mount?
questions.explanation: Tuk Tuk is Raya's loyal, rolling pill-bug-like creature and steed.

questions.question: In Strange World, what is the family surname of the explorers at the story's center?
questions.explanation: Three generations of the Clade family lead the adventure in Strange World.

questions.question: In Frozen II, what is the name of the fire salamander Elsa befriends in the Enchanted Forest?
questions.explanation: The tiny fire spirit salamander Bruni becomes fond of Elsa in Frozen II.

questions.question: From what fictional country does Prince Naveen hail in The Princess and the Frog?
questions.explanation: Prince Naveen comes from the fictional European country of Maldonia.

questions.question: In Disney's Winnie the Pooh, what is the name of the young kangaroo who is Kanga's son?
questions.explanation: Roo is the energetic joey who lives with his mother Kanga in the Hundred Acre Wood.

questions.question: In Bolt, what is the name of the young actress who is Bolt's owner and co-star?
questions.explanation: Penny is the child star who plays Bolt's person on their action TV show.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, which team member is a speed-loving engineer known for saying 'Woman up'?
questions.explanation: The tough, fast GoGo Tomago builds electromagnetic wheels for the team.

questions.question: In Moana, what is the name of Moana's pet pig?
questions.explanation: Pua is Moana's affectionate pet pig, though the rooster Heihei ends up voyaging with her.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what kind of animal is Officer Judy Hopps, the first of her kind on the force?
questions.explanation: Judy Hopps becomes the first rabbit officer in the Zootopia Police Department.

questions.question: In Encanto, what special gift does the youngest Madrigal, Antonio, receive?
questions.explanation: Antonio receives the ability to understand and speak with animals.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, what is the name of the English settler and captain Pocahontas falls in love with?
questions.explanation: Pocahontas forms a bond with the adventurous English captain John Smith.

questions.question: In Hercules, what are the three sisters who share a single eye and foretell the future called?
questions.explanation: The three Fates share one eye and hold the thread of every mortal life.

questions.question: In The Sword in the Stone, what is the name of the wicked witch who duels Merlin?
questions.explanation: Madam Mim challenges Merlin to a shape-shifting Wizards' Duel.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, what is the name of the four-eyed alien scientist who created Stitch?
questions.explanation: The 'evil genius' Jumba Jookiba engineered Stitch as Experiment 626.

questions.question: In Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs, whom does the Queen order to kill Snow White in the forest?
questions.explanation: The Queen commands the Huntsman to slay Snow White, but he spares her out of pity.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In The Emperor's New Groove, who is Kuzco's power-hungry former advisor plotting to kill him?
questions.explanation: The scheming Yzma poisons Kuzco, only to turn him into a llama instead.

questions.question: In Treasure Planet, what is the name of the menacing spider-like crew member aboard the Legacy?
questions.explanation: The vicious arachnid alien Scroop stalks the crew during the mutiny.

questions.question: In The Rescuers, what is the name of the greedy pawnshop owner who seeks a great diamond?
questions.explanation: Madame Medusa kidnaps orphan Penny to retrieve the Devil's Eye diamond.

questions.question: In Oliver & Company, what is the name of the ruthless loan shark who threatens Fagin?
questions.explanation: The cold-blooded loan shark Sykes menaces Fagin and his dogs.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, what masked identity does the villain adopt while controlling the microbots?
questions.explanation: The masked villain Yokai uses stolen microbots to enact revenge.

questions.question: In Zootopia, who is revealed to be the mastermind behind the missing predators?
questions.explanation: The meek-seeming sheep Bellwether orchestrates the plot to make predators go savage.

questions.question: In Ralph Breaks the Internet, what does Ralph accidentally unleash that nearly destroys the web?
questions.explanation: Ralph releases a cloning virus that duplicates his insecurities across the internet.

questions.question: In Wish, what does King Magnifico do with the wishes his subjects give him?
answers: He grants them all at once
He locks them away, granting few
questions.explanation: Magnifico keeps the citizens' wishes captive, granting only a chosen few.

questions.question: In The Black Cauldron, what is the name of the skeletal villain who seeks the cauldron's power?
questions.explanation: The undead Horned King wants the Black Cauldron to raise a deathless army.

questions.question: In Raya and the Last Dragon, what is the name of the Fang warrior princess who is Raya's rival?
questions.explanation: Namaari of Fang is Raya's cunning rival whose betrayal shatters the Dragon Gem.

questions.question: In The Aristocats, who plots to get rid of the cats to inherit their mistress's fortune?
questions.explanation: The butler Edgar dumps the cats in the countryside to secure the family inheritance.

questions.question: In 101 Dalmatians, what does Cruella de Vil want to make from the dalmatian puppies' fur?
questions.explanation: Cruella de Vil schemes to skin the dalmatian puppies for a spotted fur coat.

questions.question: In Peter Pan, what is Captain Hook's greatest fear?
questions.explanation: Hook dreads the crocodile that ate his hand and now ticks from a swallowed clock.

questions.question: In Snow White, what does the Queen demand the Huntsman bring back as proof of the deed?
