questions.explanation: The Queen orders Snow White's heart in a box, but the Huntsman substitutes a pig's.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In Mulan, what kind of animal is Hayabusa, Shan Yu's companion?
questions.explanation: Shan Yu's trained falcon Hayabusa scouts ahead for the Hun army.

questions.question: In Aladdin, how does the Magic Carpet communicate with Aladdin?
questions.explanation: The wordless Magic Carpet expresses itself through gestures and body language.

questions.question: In Mulan, what is the name of Mulan's family horse that she rides into battle?
questions.explanation: The loyal black stallion Khan carries Mulan through her military service.

questions.question: In The Great Mouse Detective, who is the kindly surgeon mouse who becomes Basil's partner?
questions.explanation: Dr. David Q. Dawson assists Basil of Baker Street, echoing Sherlock's Dr. Watson.

questions.question: In Pinocchio, what are the names of Geppetto's pet kitten and goldfish?
questions.explanation: Geppetto keeps the mischievous kitten Figaro and the goldfish Cleo.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, what is the name of Ariel's timid fish best friend?
questions.explanation: The nervous but loyal fish Flounder joins Ariel on her undersea adventures.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, into what object has the charming maitre d' Lumiere been transformed?
questions.explanation: The suave Lumiere is enchanted into a talking candelabra.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, what is the name of the one-eyed alien 'expert on Earth' partnered with Jumba?
questions.explanation: The nervous one-eyed Pleakley poses as Jumba's partner while hunting Stitch.

questions.question: In The Rescuers Down Under, what is the name of the brave local mouse who guides Bianca and Bernard?
questions.explanation: The daring Outback mouse Jake escorts Bianca and Bernard, charming Bianca.

questions.question: In Cinderella, which chubby mouse does Jaq befriend, teaching him to speak?
questions.explanation: Jaq rescues and renames the round little mouse Gus, who helps Cinderella.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what is the name of the small fennec fox who poses as a toddler in Nick's schemes?
questions.explanation: The tiny, gravel-voiced fennec fox Finnick masquerades as a baby in Nick's cons.

questions.question: In Bolt, what is the name of the cynical alley cat who reluctantly joins Bolt's journey?
questions.explanation: The streetwise cat Mittens becomes an unlikely traveling companion to Bolt.

questions.question: In The Jungle Book, what kind of animal is Bagheera, who escorts Mowgli toward the man-village?
questions.explanation: The sensible black panther Bagheera watches over the man-cub Mowgli.

questions.question: In Disney's Robin Hood, what kind of animal is Friar Tuck?
questions.explanation: The stout, kindly Friar Tuck is depicted as a badger.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, what kind of animal is Meeko, Pocahontas's playful companion?
questions.explanation: The food-loving raccoon Meeko is one of Pocahontas's animal friends.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, which laid-back team member wears a monster costume and loves comics?
questions.explanation: The comic-book fan Fred fights in a fire-breathing monster suit.

questions.question: In Mulan, what are the names of the three soldiers who become Mulan's friends in training?
questions.explanation: The trio Yao, Ling, and Chien-Po train alongside Mulan and become her allies.

questions.question: In Snow White, which dwarf is known for being perpetually grumpy and skeptical of Snow White?
questions.explanation: The scowling Grumpy is the most reluctant of the dwarfs to welcome Snow White.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In Encanto, in which country is the Madrigal family's magical home set?
questions.explanation: Encanto takes place in a hidden valley in the mountains of Colombia.

questions.question: In Raya and the Last Dragon, what is the name of the once-unified land now split into five regions?
questions.explanation: The divided land of Kumandra was named for its people's harmony with dragons.

questions.question: In Brother Bear, as what natural phenomenon do the spirits appear in the sky?
questions.explanation: Ancestral spirits appear to Kenai as the shimmering Northern Lights.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, in which American city does Tiana dream of opening a restaurant?
questions.explanation: Tiana works and dreams of her own restaurant in Jazz-Age New Orleans.

questions.question: In Hercules, what nickname is given to the troubled city of Thebes?
questions.explanation: Thebes is jokingly called 'The Big Olive,' a play on New York's Big Apple.

questions.question: In Mulan, what structure does Shan Yu's army breach to invade China?
questions.explanation: Shan Yu's Huns scale the Great Wall to begin their invasion of China.

questions.question: In Peter Pan, what is the name of the lagoon in Neverland where mermaids gather?
questions.explanation: Wendy visits the mermaids at Neverland's Mermaid Lagoon.

questions.question: In Frozen, what two services does Wandering Oaken advertise at his trading post?
questions.explanation: Oaken greets Anna at 'Wandering Oaken's Trading Post and Sauna.'

questions.question: In Zootopia, what is the name of the frozen, cold-climate district of the city?
questions.explanation: Tundratown is Zootopia's artificially frozen neighborhood.

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, what is the name of the hub connecting all the arcade games?
questions.explanation: Characters travel between games through Game Central Station inside the power strip.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, on which U.S. state's islands is the story set?
questions.explanation: Lilo & Stitch takes place on the Hawaiian island of Kauai.

questions.question: In Sleeping Beauty, where do the three fairies raise Aurora to keep her safe from Maleficent?
questions.explanation: The fairies hide Aurora as Briar Rose in a woodcutter's cottage deep in the forest.

questions.question: In The Sword in the Stone, in what city does the sword in the anvil await its rightful king?
questions.explanation: The magic sword sits in a churchyard anvil in London, awaiting England's true king.

questions.question: In Treasure Planet, what is the name of the inn run by Jim Hawkins's mother?
questions.explanation: Jim's mother Sarah runs the Benbow Inn before the treasure map appears.

questions.question: In The Hunchback of Notre Dame, what is the name of the hidden underground gypsy refuge?
questions.explanation: The gypsies shelter in the catacomb hideout called the Court of Miracles.

questions.question: In Atlantis: The Lost Empire, what is the powerful crystal that sustains the Atlantean people?
questions.explanation: The glowing Heart of Atlantis provides life and power to the sunken city.

questions.question: In The Black Cauldron, what dark power does the titular cauldron grant its user?
questions.explanation: The Black Cauldron can animate a legion of deathless warriors for its wielder.

questions.question: In Raya and the Last Dragon, what magical object must be reassembled to defeat the Druun?
questions.explanation: The shattered Dragon Gem holds the last of Sisu's magic against the Druun.

questions.question: In Sleeping Beauty, what two enchanted weapons do the fairies give Prince Phillip?
answers: Sword of Truth and Shield of Virtue
Sword of Light and Shield of Faith
Blade of Dawn and Shield of Hope
Sword of Kings and Shield of Honor
questions.explanation: The fairies arm Phillip with the Sword of Truth and Shield of Virtue against Maleficent.

questions.question: In Cinderella, what does the Fairy Godmother transform into a coach for the ball?
questions.explanation: With 'Bibbidi-Bobbidi-Boo,' the Fairy Godmother turns a pumpkin into a coach.

questions.question: In Snow White, what is the name of the curse the poisoned apple casts?
questions.explanation: The Queen's apple casts the Sleeping Death, broken only by love's first kiss.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In Tangled, from what did Rapunzel's magical healing hair originally derive its power?
questions.explanation: A magical golden flower born of a sundrop gave Rapunzel's hair its healing power.

questions.question: In Aladdin, what golden object splits and flies off to reveal the Cave of Wonders' location?
questions.explanation: Jafar's golden scarab beetle rejoins and glows to mark the Cave of Wonders.

questions.question: In Wish, in what form do the citizens' wishes physically appear in Magnifico's keeping?
questions.explanation: Wishes appear as luminous blue orbs that Magnifico keeps suspended in his study.

questions.question: In The Sword in the Stone, what spell does Merlin cast to make his belongings pack themselves?
questions.explanation: Merlin sings 'Higitus Figitus' to magically shrink and pack his cottage for travel.

questions.question: In Fantasia, what item gives Mickey the power to enchant a broom in 'The Sorcerer's Apprentice'?
questions.explanation: Mickey borrows Yen Sid's magic hat to bring a broom to life, with chaotic results.

questions.question: In Pinocchio, what visibly happens whenever the puppet tells a lie?
questions.explanation: When Pinocchio lies, his wooden nose comically grows, even sprouting leaves.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what are the Night Howlers that cause predators to turn savage?
questions.explanation: Night Howlers are toxic blue flowers whose serum drives mammals to feral rage.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, where does Ursula keep Ariel's stolen voice?
questions.explanation: Ursula traps Ariel's singing voice in the golden nautilus shell she wears.

questions.question: In Aladdin, what does Jafar use his cobra-headed staff to do to the Sultan?
questions.explanation: Jafar's snake staff emits a hypnotic glow he uses to manipulate the Sultan.

questions.question: In The Lion King, who ultimately turns on Scar during the final battle?
questions.explanation: After Scar betrays them, the hyenas overhear him and turn on him in the flames.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, how is Ursula finally defeated in the climactic storm?
answers: Ariel stabs her with a trident
Eric rams her with a ship's prow
questions.explanation: Prince Eric steers a wrecked ship's broken bowsprit through the giant Ursula.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, how does Gaston meet his end during the castle battle?
answers: The Beast drowns him in the moat
questions.explanation: After stabbing the Beast, Gaston loses his footing and plunges from the castle.

questions.question: In Aladdin, how does Aladdin trick Jafar into his own downfall?
answers: Goading him to wish to be a genie
questions.explanation: Aladdin tricks Jafar into wishing for genie power, trapping him in a black lamp.

questions.question: In Hercules, what selfless act finally proves Hercules a true hero?
answers: Risking his life to save Meg
questions.explanation: Hercules dives into the Styx to rescue Meg's soul, proving his true-hero heart.

questions.question: In Mulan, how does Mulan defeat most of Shan Yu's army in the mountains?
questions.explanation: Mulan fires the last cannon into a peak, burying the Hun army in an avalanche.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, why does John Smith return to England at the film's end?
answers: He is exiled by the chief
He is wounded and must heal
questions.explanation: Shot while shielding Chief Powhatan, John Smith sails home to recover.

questions.question: In Frozen, what happens to Arendelle after Elsa flees to the North Mountain?
questions.explanation: Elsa's uncontrolled magic plunges Arendelle into an unnatural, endless winter.

questions.question: In Tangled, why does the kingdom release floating lanterns each year on Rapunzel's birthday?
questions.explanation: The king and queen release lanterns yearly in hope their kidnapped daughter comes home.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, what happens to Ray the firefly near the end?
answers: He dies and becomes a star
questions.explanation: Ray dies after Facilier crushes him, then rises as a star beside his love Evangeline.

questions.question: In Big Hero 6, how does Baymax save Hiro from the collapsing portal?
answers: He shields Hiro with his body
questions.explanation: Baymax launches Hiro out with his rocket fist and stays behind, saving his chip.

questions.question: In Zootopia, what do Judy and Nick discover is turning predators savage?
questions.explanation: Judy and Nick expose a plot dosing predators with the Night Howler flower toxin.

questions.question: In Moana, what does Moana realize about the lava monster Te Ka at the climax?
answers: Te Ka is Te Fiti without her heart
Te Ka guards the real heart
Te Ka is the ocean's spirit
questions.explanation: Moana sees that Te Ka is the goddess Te Fiti, made monstrous by her stolen heart.

questions.question: In Encanto, what happens to the family's magic and house at the story's low point?
answers: The magic fades and Casita crumbles
questions.explanation: As the family's cracks deepen, the miracle candle dims and Casita falls apart.

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, how does Ralph destroy the Cy-Bug swarm in Sugar Rush?
answers: He leads them off a cliff
He erupts a Diet Cola volcano
questions.explanation: Ralph smashes Mentos into a Diet Cola volcano, luring the light-drawn Cy-Bugs to it.

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, how is Stitch allowed to remain on Earth at the end?
answers: He is pardoned for his crimes
He is accepted as Lilo's family
questions.explanation: The Grand Councilwoman spares Stitch, recognizing he now belongs to Lilo's ohana.

questions.question: In the animated The Rescuers, what is the name of the huge diamond Penny is forced to find?
questions.explanation: Medusa forces Penny into a cave to retrieve the enormous Devil's Eye diamond.

questions.question: In the animated Sleeping Beauty, what is the name of Prince Phillip's horse?
questions.explanation: Samson is Prince Phillip's loyal horse, coaxed along with promises of carrots.

questions.question: In The Great Mouse Detective, what is the name of Ratigan's pet cat?
questions.explanation: Felicia is Ratigan's plump cat, whom he uses to dispose of underlings.

questions.question: In the animated Oliver & Company, what is the name of the fast-talking Chihuahua?
questions.explanation: Tito is the excitable Chihuahua in Fagin's gang of streetwise dogs.

questions.question: In the animated The Fox and the Hound, what is the name of the vixen Tod falls in love with?
questions.explanation: Vixey is the spirited female fox who befriends Tod after he is released.

questions.question: In the animated The Black Cauldron, what is the name of the furry creature who joins Taran?
questions.explanation: Gurgi is the loyal, food-loving creature who helps Taran on his quest.

questions.question: Who is the cowboy toy and leader of Andy's toys in Toy Story?
questions.explanation: Woody the cowboy is Andy's favorite toy and the leader of his bedroom toys.

questions.question: What kind of toy is Buzz Lightyear in Toy Story?
questions.explanation: Buzz Lightyear is a Space Ranger action figure who believes he is a real astronaut.

questions.question: Who is Andy's next-door neighbor who destroys and mutilates toys?
questions.explanation: Sid Phillips is the destructive neighbor kid who takes apart and reassembles toys.

questions.explanation: Hamm is a plastic piggy bank toy known for his dry sense of humor.

questions.explanation: Rex is a nervous toy Tyrannosaurus who constantly worries he is not scary enough.

questions.explanation: Pizza Planet is the space-themed pizza restaurant Woody and Buzz visit while searching for Andy.

questions.explanation: Slinky Dog is a toy dachshund with a metal spring for a body.

questions.explanation: Mr. Potato Head is a toy with removable plastic parts like ears, eyes, and a mustache.

questions.explanation: Jessie is an energetic cowgirl toy introduced in Toy Story 2.

questions.explanation: Woody's Roundup was a 1950s puppet show starring Woody, Jessie, and Stinky Pete.

questions.explanation: Stinky Pete the Prospector was never opened and dreams of being displayed in a museum.

questions.explanation: The toys are mistakenly donated to Sunnyside Daycare instead of being placed in the attic.

questions.explanation: Lotso, a strawberry-scented bear, secretly rules Sunnyside Daycare as its harsh boss.

questions.explanation: Andy passes his beloved toys on to Bonnie, a young girl, before leaving for college.

questions.explanation: Forky is a craft-made toy Bonnie builds out of a spork, pipe cleaner, and googly eyes.

questions.explanation: Duke Caboom is a Canadian stuntman toy who once dreamed of daring motorcycle jumps.

questions.question: What kind of insect is Flik, the hero of A Bug's Life?
questions.explanation: Flik is an inventive ant who tries to save his colony from the grasshoppers.

questions.question: Who is the leader of the grasshopper gang that threatens the ant colony in A Bug's Life?
questions.explanation: Hopper is the intimidating grasshopper leader who demands food from the ant colony.

questions.explanation: Atta is the anxious princess of the ant colony who is next in line to be queen.

questions.explanation: Flik accidentally recruits a troupe of circus performer bugs instead of real warriors.

questions.question: What is the name of the big blue furry monster hero of Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: Sulley, short for James P. Sullivan, is the top scarer at Monsters, Incorporated.

questions.question: Who is Sulley's small, one-eyed green best friend in Monsters, Inc.?

questions.explanation: The monsters call the little girl Boo after she wanders through a closet door portal.

questions.explanation: Randall Boggs is a scheming lizard-like monster who can turn invisible.

questions.explanation: Monsters University is the school where Mike and Sulley first meet as students.

questions.question: What is Monsters University to the original Monsters, Inc. film?
questions.explanation: Monsters University is a prequel that shows how Mike and Sulley became friends in college.

questions.question: What kind of fish is Nemo in Finding Nemo?

questions.explanation: Dory is a cheerful blue tang with short-term memory loss who befriends Marlin.

questions.explanation: Crush is a 150-year-old sea turtle who gives Marlin and Dory a ride on the current.

questions.explanation: Syndrome was once an obsessed young fan of Mr. Incredible before becoming his enemy.

questions.explanation: Dash can run at incredible speeds, even fast enough to run across water.

questions.question: Who is the villain who hypnotizes people through TV screens in Incredibles 2?
questions.explanation: Screenslaver uses flashing screens to hypnotize and control victims in Incredibles 2.

questions.explanation: Baby Jack-Jack reveals a wide range of surprising superpowers in Incredibles 2.

questions.question: What kind of vehicle is Lightning McQueen in Cars?

questions.explanation: The Piston Cup is the top racing championship that McQueen is determined to win.

questions.explanation: Doc Hudson is a former champion racer who now serves as Radiator Springs' doctor and judge.

questions.explanation: Finn McMissile is a British spy car who mistakes Mater for a fellow secret agent.

questions.explanation: Cruz Ramirez is an energetic trainer who helps McQueen train for a comeback race.

questions.question: What kind of animal is Remy, the hero of Ratatouille?

questions.question: Which French vegetable dish shares its name with the movie Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Ratatouille is a traditional French vegetable stew that Remy famously prepares.

questions.question: What is the name of the young human kitchen worker who partners with Remy?
questions.explanation: Alfredo Linguini is the clumsy garbage boy who teams up with Remy to cook.

questions.question: Who is the strict, thin food critic who reviews the restaurant in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Anton Ego is a feared restaurant critic whose review can make or break a chef.

questions.explanation: Gusteau's is the famous Parisian restaurant where the story of Ratatouille takes place.

questions.question: What job does the robot WALL-E perform on Earth?

questions.question: What is the name of the sleek white robot WALL-E falls in love with?
questions.explanation: EVE is a scanning probe robot sent to Earth whom WALL-E quickly falls for.

questions.question: What is the name of the spaceship where the last humans live in WALL-E?
questions.explanation: The Axiom is the massive starliner where humanity has lived for centuries.

questions.question: What small pet creature does WALL-E keep as a companion?
questions.explanation: WALL-E keeps a resilient pet cockroach that follows him around during his work.

questions.question: What object does WALL-E find that proves Earth can grow life again?
questions.explanation: WALL-E discovers a tiny green seedling that proves plant life has returned to Earth.

questions.question: What does elderly Carl Fredricksen use to make his house fly in Up?
questions.explanation: Carl ties thousands of colorful balloons to his house so it can fly to South America.

questions.question: Which young Wilderness Explorer accidentally stows away on Carl's house in Up?
questions.explanation: Russell is an enthusiastic young Wilderness Explorer who ends up on Carl's flying house.

questions.question: What is the name of the talking golden retriever in Up?
questions.explanation: Dug is a friendly dog with a special collar that translates his thoughts into speech.

questions.question: What is the name of the large, colorful bird Carl and Russell protect in Up?
questions.explanation: Kevin is a rare, giant flightless bird that Russell and Carl try to keep safe.

questions.question: Who is the villainous explorer who hunts for the rare bird in Up?
questions.explanation: Charles Muntz is a once-famous explorer obsessed with capturing the rare bird Kevin.

questions.question: What South American landmark is Carl's house destined for in Up?
questions.explanation: Paradise Falls is the remote South American waterfall Carl promised to visit with his wife.

questions.question: What fantasy kingdom is Brave set in?
questions.explanation: DunBroch is the Scottish kingdom ruled by Merida's parents in Brave.

questions.question: What weapon skill is Princess Merida known for in Brave?
questions.explanation: Merida is a skilled archer who would rather shoot a bow than follow royal tradition.

questions.question: What animal does Merida's mother accidentally turn into in Brave?
questions.explanation: Queen Elinor is transformed into a bear after eating an enchanted cake.

questions.question: What competition do suitors take part in to try to win Merida's hand in Brave?
questions.explanation: The clans hold an archery contest so their sons can compete for Merida's hand.

questions.question: What is the name of the girl whose mind we see inside in Inside Out?
questions.explanation: Riley is the eleven-year-old girl whose emotions guide her through a big move.

questions.question: Which yellow emotion tries to keep Riley happy in Inside Out?
questions.explanation: Joy is the optimistic yellow emotion who leads Riley's team of feelings.

questions.question: Which blue emotion often feels overlooked in Inside Out?
questions.explanation: Sadness is the blue emotion who turns out to be essential to Riley's wellbeing.

questions.question: What city does Riley's family move to in Inside Out?

questions.question: What is the name of Riley's forgotten imaginary friend in Inside Out?

questions.question: Which red emotion represents anger in Inside Out?
questions.explanation: Anger is depicted as a short-tempered red emotion who often bursts into flame.

questions.question: What new emotion arrives when Riley becomes a teenager in Inside Out 2?
questions.explanation: Anxiety is a new emotion who barges into headquarters as Riley enters her teenage years.

questions.question: What sport does teenage Riley play in Inside Out 2?

questions.question: What kind of dinosaur is Arlo, the main character of The Good Dinosaur?

questions.question: What is the name of the human boy who befriends Arlo in The Good Dinosaur?

questions.question: Which Mexican holiday is central to the story of Coco?

questions.question: What is the name of the boy who dreams of becoming a musician in Coco?

questions.question: What realm does Miguel travel to for most of Coco?
questions.explanation: Miguel is magically transported to the vibrant Land of the Dead in Coco.

questions.question: What is the name of Miguel's skeletal dog companion in Coco?

questions.question: Who is the charming skeleton who helps Miguel in the Land of the Dead in Coco?

questions.question: What kind of fantasy creatures are the two brothers in Onward?

questions.question: What is the name of the younger brother who casts a spell to see his father in Onward?

questions.question: What is the name of the realm where souls prepare to be born in Soul?
questions.explanation: The Great Before is where new souls develop personalities before going to Earth.

questions.question: What are Luca and Alberto secretly, when they are out of the water in Luca?

questions.question: What race do Luca, Alberto, and Giulia enter together in Luca?

questions.question: What animal does Mei Lee transform into in Turning Red?

questions.question: What Canadian city is Turning Red set in?
questions.explanation: Turning Red takes place in Toronto, Canada, in the early 2000s.

questions.question: What boy band does Mei and her friends adore in Turning Red?
questions.explanation: 4*Town is the fictional boy band that Mei and her friends are obsessed with.

questions.question: What toy does Lightyear reveal was the inspiration behind, within the Toy Story universe?

questions.question: What is the name of Buzz Lightyear's robotic cat companion in Lightyear?

questions.question: What element is Ember Lumen, the main character of Elemental?
questions.explanation: Ember Lumen is a fiery, quick-tempered young woman living in Element City.

questions.question: What is the last name of the water element Wade in Elemental?
questions.explanation: Wade Ripple is the warm, emotional water element who befriends Ember in Elemental.

questions.question: What is the name of the city where fire, water, earth, and air elements live in Elemental?
questions.explanation: Element City is home to all four elemental peoples in Elemental.

questions.question: In the Pixar short film Geri's Game, what game does elderly Geri play?
questions.explanation: Geri's Game follows an old man who plays a clever game of chess against himself.

questions.question: In the Pixar short For the Birds, what happens to the big birds crowding a small bird?
answers: They all fall off the wire
questions.explanation: In For the Birds, a group of big birds bullies a small bird and ends up falling off the wire.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Bao, what food item comes to life as a baby?
questions.explanation: In Bao, a mother's steamed dumpling magically comes to life as a baby.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Piper, what kind of bird learns to find its own food?
questions.explanation: Piper follows a young sandpiper learning to forage for food along the shoreline.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Lava, what do the two volcanoes do at the end of the song?
questions.explanation: Lava tells the musical story of two singing volcanoes who fall in love across the ocean.

questions.question: Which 1995 film was the first-ever feature film made entirely with computer animation?
questions.explanation: Toy Story, released in 1995, was the first fully computer-animated feature film ever made.

questions.question: Which major studio has distributed all of Pixar's feature films?
questions.explanation: Walt Disney Pictures has distributed every Pixar feature film since Toy Story.

questions.question: What is the name of the animation studio behind Up, Cars, and Coco?
questions.explanation: Pixar Animation Studios is the California studio that created these beloved animated films.

questions.question: What is Mr. Incredible's day job while his family hides its powers?
questions.explanation: Bob Parr works a dull desk job as an insurance claims adjuster while hiding his super identity.

questions.question: Who is the fashion designer who creates the Parr family's supersuits?
questions.explanation: Edna Mode is the eccentric, brilliant designer who creates super suits for the Incredibles.

questions.question: What is Mater's favorite hobby involving sneaking up on sleeping tractors?
questions.explanation: Mater enjoys tractor tipping, sneaking up on sleeping tractors to startle them over.

questions.question: What is the name of Carl Fredricksen's late wife in Up?
questions.explanation: Ellie was Carl's adventurous childhood sweetheart and wife, whose memory drives the story.

questions.question: What is the name of the friendly pelican who helps Marlin and Dory in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Nigel is a pelican who helps Marlin and Dory after learning about Nemo's capture.

questions.question: Who is the tough female chef who trains Linguini in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Colette is a skilled, no-nonsense line cook who mentors Linguini in the kitchen.

questions.question: What is the name of the rogue autopilot villain aboard the Axiom in WALL-E?
questions.explanation: AUTO is the spaceship's autopilot who secretly works to prevent humans from returning to Earth.

questions.question: In Pixar's Luxo Jr., what kind of object is the hopping star character?
questions.explanation: Luxo Jr. is a small balancing desk lamp, and the design became Pixar's studio mascot.

questions.question: What does the little lamp play with in the short Luxo Jr.?
questions.explanation: In Luxo Jr. the small lamp bounces and eventually deflates a rubber ball.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Boundin', what happens to the proud lamb?
questions.explanation: The lamb in Boundin' loses its fluffy wool to shearing and feels embarrassed until a jackalope cheers it up.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Presto, what does the hungry rabbit want?
questions.explanation: In Presto, the rabbit Alec refuses to perform until the magician gives him his carrot.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Partly Cloudy, what do the clouds create for storks to deliver?
questions.explanation: In Partly Cloudy, clouds sculpt newborn babies and animals that storks then deliver.

questions.question: In the Pixar short La Luna, what does the boy's family sweep off the moon?
questions.explanation: In La Luna, the boy and his father and grandfather sweep fallen stars across the moon's surface.

questions.question: In the Pixar short The Blue Umbrella, the blue umbrella falls in love with an umbrella of which color?
questions.explanation: In The Blue Umbrella, a blue umbrella and a red umbrella fall for each other on a rainy city street.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Sanjay's Super Team, how does the boy imagine his Hindu deities?
questions.explanation: In Sanjay's Super Team, the boy daydreams the Hindu gods as a team of superheroes.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Lou, the playground creature is made of items from what?
questions.explanation: In Lou, the unseen creature is formed from objects inside a schoolyard lost-and-found box.

questions.question: The Pixar short Kitbull shows a friendship between a kitten and what animal?
questions.explanation: In Kitbull, a stray kitten forms an unlikely bond with a mistreated pit bull.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Burrow, what animal is trying to dig its home?
questions.explanation: In Burrow, a young rabbit tries to build the perfect underground home with help from neighbors.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Float, what surprising ability does the young son have?
questions.explanation: In Float, a father discovers his young son can float in the air and struggles with how others react.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Purl, the new office worker is a ball of what?
questions.explanation: In Purl, a cheerful ball of yarn starts a job at a company full of businessmen.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Knick Knack, where is the snowman trapped?
questions.explanation: In Knick Knack, a snowman repeatedly tries to escape his snow globe to reach other souvenirs.

questions.question: The Pixar short Day & Night stars two characters representing what?
questions.explanation: In Day & Night, two translucent figures embody daytime and nighttime scenes within their bodies.

questions.question: What is Lightning McQueen's racing number in Cars?
questions.explanation: Lightning McQueen races as the red number 95 rookie in Cars.

questions.question: In Finding Nemo, what nickname is given to Nemo's smaller fin?
questions.explanation: Nemo was born with one undersized fin that his father calls his 'lucky fin.'

questions.question: In Inside Out, which emotion is purple and represents Fear?
questions.explanation: Fear, the nervous purple emotion, tries to keep Riley safe from danger in Inside Out.

questions.question: What instrument does Joe Gardner play in Soul?
questions.explanation: Joe is a pianist who longs to perform jazz on the piano in Soul.

questions.question: What is the sea monster Massimo's daughter Giulia's father's job in Luca?
questions.explanation: Massimo, Giulia's burly one-armed father in Luca, works as the town fisherman.

questions.question: In Cars, what is the nickname of the veteran champion sponsored by Dinoco?
questions.explanation: Strip Weathers, called 'The King,' is the beloved retiring champion racer in Cars.

questions.question: In which city is Ratatouille set?
questions.explanation: Remy pursues his cooking dreams in the restaurants of Paris in Ratatouille.

questions.question: What is the name of the monster city in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: The monsters live and work in the bustling city of Monstropolis.

questions.question: In Inside Out, where inside Riley's mind do the emotions work?
questions.explanation: Joy and the other emotions guide Riley from a control room called Headquarters.

questions.question: What has buried the surface of Earth in WALL-E?
questions.explanation: Humans left Earth covered in towering piles of garbage, which WALL-E compacts.

questions.question: Marlin and Nemo live in which famous ocean reef?
questions.explanation: The clownfish family lives in an anemone on Australia's Great Barrier Reef.

questions.question: Brave is inspired by the highlands of which country?
questions.explanation: Merida's kingdom of DunBroch is set in the misty highlands of medieval Scotland.

questions.question: What is the name of Miguel's hometown in Coco?
questions.explanation: Miguel and his shoemaking family live in the Mexican town of Santa Cecilia.

questions.question: What keepsake does Ellie leave for Carl in Up?
questions.explanation: Carl discovers Ellie filled her childhood 'My Adventure Book' with their life together.

questions.question: In Toy Story, Buzz's laser is really just a small what?
questions.explanation: Woody points out that Buzz's 'laser' is only a tiny blinking light bulb.

questions.question: What accessory does designer Edna Mode refuse to add to supersuits in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: Edna insists on 'No capes!', recalling heroes doomed by their flowing capes.

questions.question: How does Remy secretly control Linguini's cooking in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Hidden under a chef's hat, Remy steers Linguini by tugging tufts of his hair.

questions.question: What containers store the screams monsters collect in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: The factory captures children's screams inside metal scream canisters to power the city.

questions.question: In Coco, whose petals are used to give blessings in the Land of the Dead?
questions.explanation: Bright marigold petals form bridges and are used for family blessings in Coco.

questions.question: What gem is needed to complete the visitation spell in Onward?
questions.explanation: Ian and Barley must find a Phoenix Gem to finish the spell and see their father.

questions.question: What do the toys do whenever humans are nearby in Toy Story?
questions.explanation: The toys pretend to be lifeless whenever a person might see them move.

questions.question: Who captures Nemo at the start of Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: A scuba-diving dentist scoops up Nemo and takes him to a tank in Sydney.

questions.question: How does WALL-E end for the last humans aboard the Axiom?
questions.explanation: Inspired by the surviving plant, the humans fly the Axiom home to rebuild Earth.

questions.question: In Inside Out, which state does Riley plan to run away back to?
questions.explanation: Homesick after moving to San Francisco, Riley tries to run away to Minnesota.

questions.question: What do the monsters discover is more powerful than screams in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: At the end of Monsters, Inc., laughter is found to produce far more energy than screams.

questions.question: The famous ratatouille dish reminds critic Anton Ego of what?
questions.explanation: One bite of the peasant dish transports Ego back to his mother's cooking in childhood.

questions.question: Where is Woody stolen by Al in Toy Story 2?
questions.explanation: Al the toy collector snatches Woody after he ends up at the family's yard sale.

questions.question: What must Lightning McQueen do after wrecking Radiator Springs' main road?
questions.explanation: As punishment, McQueen is sentenced to repave the road he tore up in Radiator Springs.

questions.question: What does Merida sew to help undo the spell in Brave?
questions.explanation: Merida mends the tapestry she slashed to repair the bond with her mother in Brave.

questions.question: What separates Arlo from his family in The Good Dinosaur?
questions.explanation: A raging river sweeps Arlo far from his home and family in The Good Dinosaur.

questions.question: Where does Bonnie create Forky in Toy Story 4?
questions.explanation: Anxious Bonnie makes Forky from craft supplies during her kindergarten orientation day.

questions.question: In Luca, the Portorosso Cup race combines swimming, cycling, and what?
questions.explanation: The town triathlon in Luca includes swimming, bicycling, and a pasta-eating leg.

questions.question: What accident sends Joe's soul out of his body in Soul?
questions.explanation: Distracted by his big break, Joe tumbles into an open manhole in Soul.

questions.question: What curses Miguel and lets him enter the Land of the Dead in Coco?
questions.explanation: Miguel is cursed after strumming the guitar in Ernesto de la Cruz's tomb.

questions.question: Where does Merida get the fateful spell in Brave?
questions.explanation: Merida trades for a spell from a wood-carving witch, hoping to change her mother.

questions.question: What villain name does Buddy Pine give himself in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: Rejected fan Buddy becomes the tech villain Syndrome in The Incredibles.

questions.question: What is the alias of the villain controlling screens in Incredibles 2?
questions.explanation: The Screenslaver hypnotizes victims through glowing screens in Incredibles 2.

questions.question: Who is the scheming head chef trying to expose Remy in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: The greedy little head chef Skinner schemes to ruin Remy and Linguini in Ratatouille.

questions.question: What is the name of the giant demon bear in Brave?
questions.explanation: Mor'du is the monstrous bear once cursed from a prince, hunted throughout Brave.

questions.question: Who is the famous musician revealed as the villain in Coco?
questions.explanation: Beloved star Ernesto de la Cruz is exposed as a murderer and thief in Coco.

questions.question: Who is the arrogant town bully who torments Luca and Alberto?
questions.explanation: Ercole is the vain, older bully who dominates Portorosso in Luca.

questions.question: Who leads the pack of talking dogs hunting Carl and Russell in Up?
questions.explanation: Alpha, a Doberman with a squeaky voice glitch, commands Muntz's dog pack in Up.

questions.question: What is the name of Hopper's dim-witted grasshopper brother in A Bug's Life?
questions.explanation: Molt is Hopper's clumsy, talkative brother in A Bug's Life.

questions.question: Who is Lightning McQueen's sneaky green rival racer in the first Cars?
questions.explanation: Chick Hicks is the cheating green racer who fights McQueen for the Piston Cup in Cars.

questions.question: What is the name of Remy's food-loving rat brother in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Emile is Remy's easygoing brother who eats almost anything in Ratatouille.

questions.question: What is the name of Remy's rat father in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Django is the cautious clan leader and father of Remy in Ratatouille.

questions.question: How many younger brothers does Princess Merida have in Brave?
questions.explanation: Merida has three mischievous triplet brothers in Brave.

questions.question: How many children do Bob and Helen Parr have in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: The Parrs have three children: Violet, Dash, and baby Jack-Jack.

questions.question: What is the superhero name of the Parrs' ice-powered friend in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: Lucius Best, known as Frozone, freezes water into ice and helps the Parr family.

questions.question: What kind of mythical creature is Corey, who runs a tavern in Onward?
questions.explanation: The Manticore, Corey, once a fearsome adventurer, now runs a family tavern in Onward.

questions.question: Who is the grumpy administrator watching Mike's paperwork in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: Roz is the slug-like clerk who nags Mike about paperwork in Monsters, Inc.

questions.question: What is the name of Mike Wazowski's girlfriend in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: Celia is the snake-haired receptionist and Mike's sweetheart in Monsters, Inc.

questions.question: Who is the elderly great-grandmother Miguel sings to at the end of Coco?
questions.explanation: Miguel sings to revive the memories of his fading great-grandmother, Mamá Coco.

questions.question: What is the name of the little cleaning robot obsessed with dirt in WALL-E?
questions.explanation: M-O is the tiny microbe-obliterator robot who chases dirt around the Axiom in WALL-E.

questions.question: What is the name of Crush's young sea turtle son in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Squirt is Crush's energetic little son who rides the East Australian Current.

questions.question: Which fish is the leader of the dentist's tank gang in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Gill, a scarred Moorish idol, leads the Tank Gang's escape plans in Finding Nemo.

questions.question: What group of toys does Sarge command in Toy Story?
questions.explanation: Sarge leads Andy's platoon of little green plastic army soldiers in Toy Story.

questions.question: What kind of squeaky toy is Wheezy in Toy Story 2?
questions.explanation: Wheezy is a squeaky penguin toy whose broken squeaker sidelines him in Toy Story 2.

questions.question: What is the name of Andy's pet dachshund introduced in Toy Story 2?
questions.explanation: Buster is the playful dachshund puppy Andy receives in Toy Story 2.

questions.question: Which fashionable male doll falls for Barbie at Sunnyside in Toy Story 3?
questions.explanation: Ken, obsessed with his wardrobe, becomes smitten with Barbie in Toy Story 3.

questions.question: Which car in Radiator Springs owns a tire shop and adores Ferraris?
questions.explanation: Luigi, an Italian Fiat, runs Casa Della Tires and idolizes Ferraris in Cars.

questions.question: What is the name of Mei Lee's protective mother in Turning Red?
questions.explanation: Ming Lee is Mei's devoted and overprotective mother in Turning Red.

questions.question: What is the name of the caterpillar who loves food in A Bug's Life?
questions.explanation: Heimlich is the round German-accented caterpillar of the circus bugs in A Bug's Life.

questions.question: Who is the flea ringmaster of the circus bugs in A Bug's Life?
questions.explanation: P.T. Flea runs the struggling circus that Flik mistakes for warrior bugs.

questions.question: What kind of whale is Bailey in Finding Dory?
questions.explanation: Bailey is a beluga whale who thinks his echolocation is broken in Finding Dory.

questions.question: What is the name of the whale shark and Dory's childhood friend in Finding Dory?
questions.explanation: Destiny is the near-sighted whale shark who grew up beside Dory in Finding Dory.

questions.question: What is the name of the Canadian stuntman toy in Toy Story 4?
questions.explanation: Duke Caboom is a daredevil motorcycle stunt toy who helps Woody in Toy Story 4.

questions.question: What are the names of the plush carnival prizes stuck together in Toy Story 4?
questions.explanation: Ducky and Bunny are the wisecracking plush prizes sewn together at a carnival in Toy Story 4.

questions.question: Who is the strict, winged dean at Monsters University?
questions.explanation: Dean Hardscrabble is the intimidating dragon-like head of the scaring school in Monsters University.

questions.question: Which delivery truck famously appears hidden across many Pixar films?
questions.explanation: The Pizza Planet truck from Toy Story is a beloved Easter egg tucked into many Pixar movies.

questions.question: How many main Toy Story films had been released by the end of 2019?
questions.explanation: Toy Story, Toy Story 2, 3, and 4 make four main films by 2019.

questions.question: Which Pixar film was released first?
questions.explanation: Toy Story, from 1995, was Pixar's first feature and came out before the others.

questions.question: Finding Dory is the sequel to which Pixar film?
questions.explanation: Finding Dory continues the story begun in Finding Nemo.

questions.question: Which returning villain does the family fight at the start of Incredibles 2?
questions.explanation: Incredibles 2 opens with the Parrs battling the Underminer, who appeared at the end of the first film.

questions.question: In which Pixar film series does Lightning McQueen race?
questions.explanation: Lightning McQueen is the star racer of Pixar's Cars films.

questions.question: Inside Out 2 is the sequel to which 2015 Pixar film?
questions.explanation: Inside Out 2 continues Riley's story from the original Inside Out.

questions.question: Which company owns Pixar Animation Studios?
questions.explanation: Pixar has been owned by The Walt Disney Company since 2006.

questions.question: At first, what does Buzz Lightyear believe himself to be in Toy Story?
questions.explanation: Buzz begins convinced he is an actual space ranger, not a toy, in Toy Story.

questions.question: What must the ants gather each year for the grasshoppers in A Bug's Life?
questions.explanation: The ant colony is forced to collect a seasonal offering of food for Hopper's gang.

questions.question: What is Sulley's job at the factory in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: James P. 'Sulley' Sullivan is the top Scarer collecting screams in Monsters, Inc.

questions.question: What city name does Dory read off a diver's mask in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Dory reads the Sydney address on the diver's dropped mask, giving them a lead to Nemo.

questions.question: What is the Parr family's ordinary last name in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: The superhero family lives undercover under the surname Parr in The Incredibles.

questions.question: Which rust-treatment brand sponsors Lightning McQueen in Cars?
questions.explanation: McQueen races for the Rust-eze team while dreaming of the bigger Dinoco sponsorship.

questions.question: What is Chef Gusteau's famous motto in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: The late Gusteau's slogan, 'Anyone can cook,' inspires Remy throughout Ratatouille.

questions.question: What old musical does WALL-E love to watch?
questions.explanation: WALL-E treasures a worn tape of the musical Hello, Dolly! and its love songs.

questions.question: What did Carl Fredricksen sell as his job before his adventure in Up?
questions.explanation: Carl worked for years as a balloon salesman at the zoo in Up.

questions.question: What record does Randall try to beat Sulley for in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: Randall schemes to top Sulley's scream-collection scare record in Monsters, Inc.

questions.question: Which emotion completes Inside Out's original five with Joy, Sadness, Fear, and Anger?
questions.explanation: Disgust rounds out the five original emotions running Riley's mind in Inside Out.

questions.question: In which country is Coco set?
questions.explanation: Coco celebrates the Mexican holiday Día de los Muertos in the town of Santa Cecilia.

questions.question: What are the two elf brothers named in Onward?
questions.explanation: Shy Ian and boisterous Barley set out on a magical quest together in Onward.

questions.question: What genre of music does Joe hope to perform in Soul?
questions.explanation: Joe dreams of playing in a jazz quartet led by saxophonist Dorothea in Soul.

questions.question: What vehicle do Luca and Alberto dream of owning in Luca?
questions.explanation: Luca and Alberto save up hoping to buy a Vespa scooter and see the world.

questions.question: How old is Mei Lee in Turning Red?
questions.explanation: Mei is a confident thirteen-year-old when she first turns into a red panda.

questions.question: What does Ember's family run in Elemental?
questions.explanation: Ember's fire family runs a busy neighborhood shop called the Fireplace in Element City.

questions.question: Besides Anxiety, which new emotion appears in Inside Out 2?
questions.explanation: Inside Out 2 introduces new teen emotions including Anxiety, Envy, Ennui, and Embarrassment.

questions.question: What is the main 'what if' idea behind The Good Dinosaur?
questions.explanation: The Good Dinosaur imagines a world where the asteroid missed and dinosaurs survived.

questions.question: In Lightyear, Buzz and his crew become stranded on what?
questions.explanation: Buzz's mission goes wrong, marooning the crew on a dangerous alien planet in Lightyear.

questions.question: In which era is Turning Red set?
questions.explanation: Turning Red takes place in Toronto in the early 2000s.

questions.question: Whose body does Joe's soul accidentally end up in during Soul?
questions.explanation: A mix-up lands Joe's soul inside a therapy cat while 22 takes his human body in Soul.

questions.question: What art is Ember discovered to be gifted at in Elemental?
questions.explanation: Ember's fire lets her shape molten glass into beautiful art in Elemental.

questions.question: Where does WALL-E keep the growing plant for safekeeping?
questions.explanation: WALL-E tucks the precious seedling into an old boot aboard his home.

questions.question: In Up, what does Carl give Russell as an 'Ellie Badge' at the end?
questions.explanation: Carl pins Ellie's grape soda bottle cap on Russell as her special badge in Up.

questions.question: In Inside Out, Riley's memories are shown as glowing what?
questions.explanation: Each of Riley's memories is a colored glowing orb stored in her mind in Inside Out.

questions.question: In Up, the bird Kevin surprisingly turns out to be what?
questions.explanation: Russell's giant bird Kevin is revealed to be a mother caring for her chicks in Up.

questions.question: What does Mike Wazowski dream of becoming at Monsters University?
questions.explanation: Little Mike works hard to become a top Scarer despite not being scary in Monsters University.

questions.question: Who is the sleek, high-tech rookie who outpaces McQueen in Cars 3?
questions.explanation: Jackson Storm is the next-generation racer who challenges an aging McQueen in Cars 3.

questions.question: What triggers Mei Lee's change into a red panda in Turning Red?
questions.explanation: Whenever Mei feels strong emotions, she poofs into a giant red panda in Turning Red.

questions.question: In Monsters, Inc., what color is Sulley's fur?
questions.explanation: James P. Sullivan, or Sulley, is a large monster covered in blue and purple fur.

questions.question: What color is Princess Merida's hair in Brave?
questions.explanation: Merida is instantly recognizable by her wild, curly, fiery red hair.

questions.question: In Soul, in which city does jazz musician Joe Gardner live?
questions.explanation: Joe Gardner chases his jazz dreams around the streets and clubs of New York City.

questions.question: What is the name of Sid Phillips's dog in the original Toy Story?
questions.explanation: Sid Phillips's aggressive black-and-white bull terrier is named Scud in the original Toy Story.

questions.question: In Toy Story 2, what was the name of Jessie's original owner?
questions.explanation: Jessie the cowgirl doll's flashback reveals she once belonged to a girl named Emily before being given away.

questions.question: Which character schemes to keep Woody from returning to Andy in Toy Story 2?
questions.explanation: Stinky Pete the Prospector wants the Roundup Gang sold to a museum instead of letting Woody go home to Andy.

questions.question: What is the name of the daycare center secretly ruled by Lotso in Toy Story 3?
questions.explanation: Lots-o'-Huggin' Bear secretly rules Sunnyside Daycare, where new toys are sent to the rough Caterpillar Room.

questions.question: In Toy Story 4, what everyday utensil is Forky originally made from?
questions.explanation: Bonnie crafts Forky out of a plastic spork, along with pipe cleaners and a broken popsicle stick.

questions.question: What does the villain Gabby Gabby want from Woody in Toy Story 4?
questions.explanation: Gabby Gabby wants Woody's working voice box so she can be repaired and finally find a child of her own.

questions.question: What phrase does Buzz Lightyear shout as his signature call to action?
questions.explanation: Buzz Lightyear's catchphrase, 'To infinity and beyond,' reflects his belief that he is a real space ranger.

questions.question: In Toy Story, what is Rex the dinosaur most insecure about?
questions.explanation: Rex constantly worries that he is not ferocious enough to be a convincing dinosaur toy.

questions.question: Who is the chameleon-like monster that serves as the main villain in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: Randall Boggs can turn invisible and schemes to extract scream energy from children by force.

questions.question: What is the human toddler Boo's real name in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: The little girl nicknamed Boo by Sulley is revealed to be named Mary when he finally finds her door.

questions.question: What powers the city of Monstropolis in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: Monstropolis runs on energy harvested from frightened children's screams, collected in canisters at the factory.

questions.question: What does the acronym CDA stand for in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: The CDA, or Child Detection Agency, is the elite unit that decontaminates any monster exposed to a human child.

questions.question: Who is the intimidating dean of the School of Scaring in Monsters University?
questions.explanation: Dean Hardscrabble, a dragon-like former Scare student, oversees the program and doubts Mike's abilities.

questions.question: Which misfit fraternity do Mike and Sulley join in Monsters University?
questions.explanation: After being kicked out of the Scare program, Mike and Sulley join the underdog fraternity Oozma Kappa.

questions.question: What is the name of the great white shark trying to stop eating fish in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Bruce leads a support group of sharks with the motto 'Fish are friends, not food' in Finding Nemo.

questions.question: What is the name of the dentist's niece who wants Nemo as a pet in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Darla is Nemo's intended new owner, a fish-shaking niece the tank gang fears will hurt him.

questions.question: In Finding Nemo, what address is repeated to help locate the captured Nemo?
questions.explanation: The tank fish repeat the dentist's address, 42 Wallaby Way, Sydney, to help Marlin find his son.

questions.question: What type of sea creature is Hank, who reluctantly helps Dory in Finding Dory?
questions.explanation: Hank is a cranky octopus missing a tentacle who helps Dory navigate the Marine Life Institute.

questions.question: What is the name of the aquarium and rescue facility in Finding Dory?
questions.explanation: Dory is taken to the Marine Life Institute, a rescue facility she remembers visiting as a young fish.

questions.question: What is the real name of the villain Syndrome in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: Syndrome was once Mr. Incredible's rejected young fan Buddy Pine, who grew up to become his enemy.

questions.question: In The Incredibles, what surprising trait does baby Jack-Jack reveal?
questions.explanation: Jack-Jack astonishes the family by displaying a wide range of superpowers.

questions.question: In the first Incredibles film, what does baby Jack-Jack reveal near the end?
questions.explanation: Baby Jack-Jack briefly displays a whole range of surprising powers while facing Syndrome's nanny robot.

questions.question: What is the name of the hypnotic villain in Incredibles 2 who controls people through screens?
questions.explanation: Screenslaver uses flashing screen patterns to hypnotize victims and is later revealed to be Evelyn Deavor.

questions.question: In Cars, Doc Hudson was once a champion racer known by what name?
questions.explanation: Doc Hudson, the town judge of Radiator Springs, was formerly a champion racer called the Hudson Hornet.

questions.question: What is the name of the small Route 66 town where Lightning McQueen gets stranded?
questions.explanation: Lightning McQueen accidentally wrecks the road of Radiator Springs, a fading town along historic Route 66.

questions.question: In Cars 2, Finn McMissile is a car who secretly works as what?
questions.explanation: Finn McMissile is a suave British spy car who mistakes Mater for a fellow secret agent in Cars 2.

questions.question: Who is the scheming head chef who opposes Remy in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Chef Skinner runs Gusteau's restaurant and tries to expose the rat secretly cooking in his kitchen.

questions.question: What is the profession of Anton Ego in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Anton Ego is the feared food critic whose harsh reviews can make or break a Parisian restaurant.

questions.question: What is the name of the famous Paris restaurant central to Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Gusteau's is the once five-star Parisian restaurant where Remy secretly cooks alongside Linguini.

questions.question: What is the name of the sleek robot sent to scan Earth for plant life in WALL-E?
questions.explanation: EVE is the advanced probe robot who falls for WALL-E while searching Earth for plant life.

questions.question: What is the name of the giant starship where humanity lives in WALL-E?
questions.explanation: The Axiom is the massive spaceship where humans have lived for centuries while Earth was cleaned of trash.

questions.question: What is the name of the autopilot that secretly controls the Axiom in WALL-E?
questions.explanation: AUTO is the Axiom's steering wheel-shaped autopilot who secretly works to keep the ship from returning to Earth.

questions.question: Who is the villainous explorer who once idolized Carl and Ellie in Up?
questions.explanation: Charles Muntz was once Carl and Ellie's childhood hero, but decades of isolation turned him villainous.

questions.question: What South American landmark does Carl fly his house to in Up?
questions.explanation: Carl fulfills his late wife's dream by floating his house to Paradise Falls in South America.

questions.question: What is the name of the talking golden retriever who befriends Carl and Russell in Up?
questions.explanation: Dug is a friendly golden retriever whose special collar translates his thoughts into speech.

questions.question: What name do Russell and Carl give the giant colorful bird they encounter in Up?
questions.explanation: Despite turning out to be female, the large flightless bird leading Muntz's dogs on a chase is named Kevin.

questions.question: What is the name of Merida's family clan in Brave?
questions.explanation: Merida is the princess of Clan DunBroch, ruled by her parents King Fergus and Queen Elinor.

questions.question: What is the name of the demon bear that was once a prince in Brave?
questions.explanation: Mor'du is a monstrous bear, once an ancient prince transformed after selfishly seeking a kingdom-uniting spell.

questions.question: In Inside Out, which emotion leads Riley's other emotions early in the film?
questions.explanation: Joy takes charge at Headquarters for most of Riley's happy childhood.

questions.question: What is the control center inside Riley's mind called in Inside Out?
questions.explanation: Headquarters is the control room where Riley's five emotions operate the console guiding her actions.

questions.question: Which new emotion introduced in Inside Out 2 takes control and triggers a panic attack?
questions.explanation: Anxiety seizes control of Riley's mind in Inside Out 2, ultimately triggering an overwhelming panic attack.

questions.question: Who is the famous singer revealed to be the villain in Coco?
questions.explanation: Beloved musician Ernesto de la Cruz is revealed to have murdered his songwriting partner to steal his songs.

questions.question: What is the vibrant afterlife realm Miguel visits in Coco called?
questions.explanation: Miguel is magically transported to the colorful Land of the Dead on the Day of the Dead.

questions.question: What dog breed is Dante, Miguel's companion in Coco?
questions.explanation: Dante is a hairless Xoloitzcuintli, a Mexican breed traditionally believed to guide souls in the afterlife.

questions.question: What is the name of the suburban fantasy town where Onward takes place?
questions.explanation: Onward is set in New Mushroomton, a suburban town where magic has largely faded away.

questions.question: What is the name of Ian Lightfoot's older brother in Onward?
questions.explanation: Barley Lightfoot is Ian's enthusiastic, van-driving older brother obsessed with their world's magical history.

questions.question: What is the realm where souls develop personalities before being born, in Soul?
questions.explanation: In Soul, new souls develop their personalities and interests in a realm called the Great Before.

questions.question: What is the name of the reluctant, unborn soul who befriends Joe Gardner in Soul?
questions.explanation: The soul numbered 22 has resisted finding a purpose for eons before being paired with Joe Gardner.

questions.question: What is the name of the Italian seaside town in Luca?
questions.explanation: Luca and Alberto explore the charming Italian Riviera town of Portorosso, where sea monsters are feared.

questions.question: What secret do Luca and Alberto hide from the townspeople of Portorosso?
questions.explanation: Luca and Alberto are actually sea monsters who transform into human boys whenever they are dry.

questions.question: In Turning Red, what animal does Mei Lee transform into when overwhelmed with emotion?
questions.explanation: Thirteen-year-old Mei Lee discovers she transforms into a giant red panda whenever her emotions run high.

questions.question: What is the name of the city where fire, water, land, and air residents live in Elemental?
questions.explanation: Elemental is set in Element City, a metropolis shared by residents made of fire, water, land, and air.

questions.question: Who is the tyrannical grasshopper leader who threatens the ant colony in A Bug's Life?
questions.explanation: Hopper is the ruthless grasshopper boss who demands tribute from the ant colony every year.

questions.question: What is the name of the inventive ant who recruits circus bugs in A Bug's Life?
questions.explanation: Flik is the well-meaning but accident-prone inventor ant who leads the effort to stop the grasshoppers.

questions.question: What is the name of the young Apatosaurus in The Good Dinosaur?
questions.explanation: Arlo is a timid young Apatosaurus who befriends a feral human boy named Spot in The Good Dinosaur.

questions.question: Who is the intergalactic villain Buzz Lightyear battles, first seen as a toy in Toy Story 2?
questions.explanation: Emperor Zurg is Buzz Lightyear's arch-nemesis from his in-universe TV show, appearing as an action figure.

questions.question: What recurring vehicle appears as an easter egg in nearly every Pixar feature film?
questions.explanation: The red Pizza Planet delivery truck from Toy Story is a running Pixar easter egg spotted in almost every film.

questions.question: What recurring alphanumeric code appears hidden in many Pixar films as a tribute to CalArts?
questions.explanation: A113 references a classroom number at CalArts attended by many Pixar animators and hides throughout their films.

questions.question: What is the name of the bouncing lamp that serves as Pixar's studio mascot?
questions.explanation: Luxo Jr., the young desk lamp from Pixar's 1986 short of the same name, has appeared in the studio's logo since.

questions.question: What name is written on the bottom of Woody's boot in Toy Story?
questions.explanation: Andy writes his own name in marker on the sole of Woody's boot to mark him as an owned toy.

questions.question: In Cars, who reluctantly teaches Lightning McQueen to handle dirt track turns?
questions.explanation: Doc Hudson reluctantly mentors Lightning McQueen, teaching him racing techniques on the town's dirt track.

questions.question: What was the name of Woody's 1950s television show discovered in Toy Story 2?
questions.explanation: Toy Story 2 reveals Woody once starred in a puppet show called Woody's Roundup before it was cancelled.

questions.question: What is the name of the greedy toy store owner who kidnaps Woody in Toy Story 2?
questions.explanation: Al McWhiggin, owner of Al's Toy Barn, steals Woody to complete a valuable Woody's Roundup collectible set.

questions.question: What is the name of the penguin toy with a broken squeaker in Toy Story 2?
questions.explanation: Wheezy is a plush penguin whose squeaker broke, leaving him shelved until Woody's rescue in Toy Story 2.

questions.question: What is the name of Lotso's large, silent doll enforcer in Toy Story 3?
questions.explanation: Big Baby is an oversized baby doll who serves as Lotso's enforcer at Sunnyside Daycare.

questions.question: What extravagant playset does Ken proudly show off in Toy Story 3?
questions.explanation: Ken excitedly gives Barbie a tour of his elaborate multi-story Dreamhouse when they first meet.

questions.question: What is the name of the Canadian stuntman toy who helps Woody in Toy Story 4?
questions.explanation: Duke Caboom is a daredevil motorcycle stunt toy who assists Woody's rescue mission in Toy Story 4.

questions.question: What kind of collectible figure is Bo Peep, Woody's love interest?
questions.explanation: Bo Peep is a porcelain figurine originally sold as part of a bedside lamp before becoming a lost toy.

questions.question: What distinctive physical trait defines Mike Wazowski in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: Mike Wazowski is a small green monster whose entire head is essentially one large eyeball.

questions.question: What is the name of Mike Wazowski's snake-haired girlfriend in Monsters, Inc.?
questions.explanation: Celia Mae, a Gorgon-like monster with snakes for hair, works the front desk and dates Mike Wazowski.

questions.question: What is secretly revealed about the slug-like character Roz in Monsters, Inc.?
answers: She is an undercover CDA agent
questions.explanation: The grumpy paperwork monster Roz is unexpectedly revealed to be the head of the undercover Child Detection Agency.

questions.question: What is the nickname of the shy Oozma Kappa member Scott Squibbles in Monsters University?
questions.explanation: Scott Squibbles, nicknamed Squishy, is a timid Oozma Kappa fraternity brother who still lives with his mother.

questions.question: What is the name of Nemo's overprotective clownfish father in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Marlin is Nemo's anxious father who crosses the ocean to rescue his son after Nemo is captured.

questions.question: What is the name of the laid-back sea turtle who helps Marlin travel the ocean current?
questions.explanation: Crush is a 150-year-old sea turtle who gives Marlin a ride on the East Australian Current.

questions.question: What memory condition does Dory have in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Dory suffers from short-term memory loss, frequently forgetting things just moments after they happen.

questions.question: What is the name of the nearsighted whale shark who is Dory's childhood pen pal?
questions.explanation: Destiny is a whale shark with poor eyesight who communicates with Dory through pipes at the institute.

questions.question: What type of whale is Bailey, who doubts his echolocation abilities in Finding Dory?
questions.explanation: Bailey is a beluga whale at the Marine Life Institute who doubts his echolocation after an injury.

questions.question: What ocean current do sea turtles use to travel quickly across the Pacific in Finding Nemo?
questions.explanation: Marlin and Dory ride the East Australian Current, a fast-moving highway used by sea turtles for long journeys.

questions.question: What is Mr. Incredible's civilian name in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: Mr. Incredible lives a quiet civilian life as insurance adjuster Bob Parr after heroics are outlawed.

questions.question: What powers does Violet Parr possess in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: Violet Parr can turn invisible and generate protective force fields, powers she initially struggles to control.

questions.question: In The Incredibles, what is the superhero name of Mr. Incredible's wife?
questions.explanation: Helen Parr fights crime as the stretchy, flexible hero Elastigirl.

questions.question: Who is Bob Parr's ice-powered best friend and fellow former superhero in The Incredibles?
questions.explanation: Frozone, whose real name is Lucius Best, can generate ice and remains Bob's close friend after heroics are banned.

questions.question: Who is the businessman who campaigns to make superheroes legal again in Incredibles 2?
questions.explanation: Winston Deavor is a wealthy telecommunications businessman who campaigns to restore superheroes' legal status.

questions.question: What is the name of Lightning McQueen's rusty racing sponsor in Cars?
questions.explanation: Lightning McQueen races for Rust-eze, a medicated bumper ointment brand, while dreaming of a Dinoco deal.

questions.question: What is the name of the rusty tow truck who becomes Lightning McQueen's best friend in Cars?
questions.explanation: Mater is a friendly, rusty tow truck in Radiator Springs who quickly becomes Lightning McQueen's best friend.

questions.question: Who begins as Lightning McQueen's trainer before pursuing her own racing career in Cars 3?
questions.explanation: Cruz Ramirez begins as Lightning McQueen's high-tech trainer before pursuing her own racing dream in Cars 3.

questions.question: What is the name of Remy's less adventurous brother in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Emile is Remy's brother, content to eat garbage rather than share Remy's refined culinary ambitions.

questions.question: What is the name of the clumsy garbage boy who partners with Remy in Ratatouille?
questions.explanation: Linguini is the awkward kitchen garbage boy who teams up with Remy, the rat secretly guiding his cooking.

questions.question: What task has WALL-E been programmed to perform for centuries on Earth?
questions.explanation: WALL-E, a Waste Allocation Load Lifter, spends centuries alone compacting Earth's garbage into neat cubes.

questions.question: What object does WALL-E find that becomes proof Earth can sustain life again?
questions.explanation: WALL-E finds a small green plant growing in an old boot, crucial proof that Earth is habitable again.

questions.question: What is the name of the elderly balloon salesman who flies his house in Up?
questions.explanation: Carl Fredricksen is the grumpy retired balloon salesman who flies his house using thousands of balloons.

questions.question: What is the name of Carl's late wife, whose adventure book inspires the plot of Up?
questions.explanation: Ellie is Carl's beloved late wife, whose 'My Adventure Book' inspires his journey to Paradise Falls.

questions.question: What youth organization does young Russell belong to in Up?
questions.explanation: Russell is an eager Wilderness Explorer trying to earn his final badge by assisting an elderly person.

questions.question: What are the names of Merida's mischievous triplet brothers in Brave?
questions.explanation: Merida's rambunctious triplet brothers, Harris, Hubert, and Hamish, cause chaos throughout Brave.

questions.question: Who provides Merida with the spell that transforms her mother into a bear in Brave?
answers: A witch who carves wooden bears
questions.explanation: Merida trades a necklace for a spell from a reclusive witch who carves wooden bears in her cottage.

questions.question: Which five emotions operate Headquarters in Riley's mind in the original Inside Out?
questions.explanation: The original Inside Out centers on five core emotions: Joy, Sadness, Fear, Anger, and Disgust.

questions.question: What are the structures representing Riley's core personality traits called in Inside Out?
questions.explanation: Riley's key personality traits, like Family and Hockey, are represented as Islands of Personality in her mind.

questions.question: Who is the skeleton Miguel befriends who turns out to be his ancestor in Coco?
questions.explanation: Hector is a charming, down-on-his-luck skeleton who turns out to be Miguel's long-lost ancestor.

questions.question: What has the Rivera family banned for generations before the events of Coco?
questions.explanation: Music has been forbidden in the Rivera family for generations after an ancestor abandoned them for it.

questions.question: What magical goal drives the brothers' quest in Onward?
answers: Bringing their late father back for one day
Restoring magic to the whole world
questions.explanation: Ian and Barley cast a spell to bring their deceased father back to life for just twenty-four hours.

questions.question: What is the name of the restaurant run by the former monster Manticore in Onward?
questions.explanation: The once-fearsome Manticore now runs a family-friendly restaurant called Manticore's Tavern in Onward.

questions.question: What is the profession of Joe Gardner, the main character of Soul?
questions.explanation: Joe Gardner is a middle school band teacher who dreams of performing as a professional jazz pianist.

questions.question: What is the role of the character Terry in Soul?
questions.explanation: Terry is an obsessive celestial accountant who tracks souls entering the Great Beyond and pursues Joe.

questions.question: What is the name of the human girl who befriends Luca and Alberto in Portorosso?
questions.explanation: Giulia Marcovaldo is the spirited local girl who teams up with Luca and Alberto for the town's race.

questions.question: What is the name of the triathlon race the main characters enter in Luca?
questions.explanation: Luca, Alberto, and Giulia compete in the Portorosso Cup, a swim-bike-eating triathlon, for money and respect.

questions.question: What is the name of the fictional boy band Mei and her friends idolize in Turning Red?
questions.explanation: Mei and her friends are devoted fans of the fictional boy band 4*Town and scheme to see them live.

questions.question: Who are the fire woman and water man who fall for each other in Elemental?
questions.explanation: Elemental follows Ember Lumen, a fiery young woman, and Wade Ripple, an emotional water man, as they fall for each other.

questions.question: In the Pixar short Geri's Game, what game does the elderly man play against himself?
questions.explanation: In Geri's Game, an old man in the park plays an entire game of chess against himself using two personas.

questions.question: In the short For the Birds, what happens when small birds gang up on one big bird?
answers: They fling him into the air off a wire
questions.explanation: In For the Birds, a flock of small birds crowds a wire until their combined weight launches the big bird skyward.

questions.question: What type of bird is the main character learning to find food in the short Piper?
questions.explanation: Piper follows a young sandpiper chick learning to overcome her fear of the surf to forage for food.

questions.question: In the short Bao, what food item magically comes to life as a character?
questions.explanation: In Bao, a lonely mother's dumpling springs to life and becomes a substitute for the child she misses.

questions.question: The Pixar short Lava centers on two characters who are what kind of geological feature?
questions.explanation: Lava tells the story of two lonely volcanoes who long for companionship across the ocean.

questions.question: In the short Purl, the title character is a ball of yarn working in what environment?
questions.explanation: Purl follows a googly-eyed ball of pink yarn trying to fit in among human employees at a stiff corporate office.

questions.question: In the short La Luna, what family job is passed down through three generations?
questions.explanation: La Luna follows a boy learning his family's tradition of sweeping fallen stars from the surface of the moon.

questions.question: The short Day & Night features two characters representing what contrasting concept?
questions.explanation: Day & Night presents two animated characters whose bodies contain scenes of daytime and nighttime.

questions.question: In the short Boundin', how does the sheared sheep feel until a jackalope cheers him up?
answers: He grows his wool back instantly
questions.explanation: In Boundin', a shorn sheep feels dull and gray until a bounding jackalope teaches him to dance again.

questions.question: In the short Presto, why does a magician's rabbit repeatedly outsmart him onstage?
answers: Because the magician forgot to feed him a carrot
questions.explanation: In Presto, a hungry rabbit uses a pair of magic hats to get revenge on a magician who forgot his carrot.

questions.question: In the short Partly Cloudy, what delivers baby animals created by clouds?
questions.explanation: Partly Cloudy shows storks delivering baby animals created by clouds, including one cloud who makes dangerous ones.

questions.question: What two objects fall in love on a rainy city street in The Blue Umbrella?
answers: A blue umbrella and a red umbrella
questions.explanation: The Blue Umbrella follows a blue umbrella that falls for a red umbrella during a city rainstorm.

questions.question: In the short Float, what unusual trait does a father discover his young son has?
answers: The ability to talk to animals
