questions.question: Quasimodo longs to join the festival crowd in which Hunchback of Notre Dame song?
questions.explanation: Quasimodo sings "Out There" expressing his longing to experience the world beyond the bell tower.

questions.question: "I Just Can't Wait to Be King" is sung by young Simba alongside which characters?
questions.explanation: Young Simba sings "I Just Can't Wait to Be King" with Nala while Zazu tries to keep order.

questions.question: Which wise mandrill introduces baby Simba to the animal kingdom during "Circle of Life"?
questions.explanation: Rafiki the mandrill presents baby Simba to the gathered animals during "Circle of Life."

questions.question: Belle and the Beast slowly bond in which duet-like song, sung with Mrs. Potts, Lumiere, and Cogsworth?
questions.explanation: "Something There" captures Belle and the Beast realizing their growing affection for each other.

questions.question: Which Renaissance-era song is sung by Esmeralda to plead for the outcasts of Paris?
questions.explanation: Esmeralda sings "God Help the Outcasts" in a cathedral, praying for society's forgotten people.

questions.question: Which classic Cinderella song is sung by mice as they work to help her?
questions.explanation: "The Work Song" is sung by Cinderella's mouse and bird friends as they sew her ball gown.

questions.question: Which Pinocchio song is sung by a con-artist fox trying to lead the puppet astray?
answers: When You Wish Upon a Star
questions.explanation: "Hi-Diddle-Dee-Dee" is sung by Honest John as he schemes to lead Pinocchio astray.

questions.question: Pinocchio sings "I've Got No Strings" while performing as what?
questions.explanation: Pinocchio sings "I've Got No Strings" while performing in a puppet show, delighting in his freedom.

questions.question: Which whimsical Mary Poppins song is sung by chimney sweeps dancing on rooftops?
questions.explanation: "Step in Time" features Bert and fellow chimney sweeps dancing energetically across London rooftops.

questions.question: Which Frozen song is a duet between Anna and a prince who later betrays her?
answers: For the First Time in Forever
questions.explanation: Anna and Hans sing "Love Is an Open Door," though Hans later reveals his true intentions.

questions.question: Which trolls sing "Fixer Upper" while trying to matchmake Anna and Kristoff?
questions.explanation: The Rock Trolls sing "Fixer Upper," comically insisting Kristoff just needs a little fixing up.

questions.question: Which Moana song is sung by the village as they explain why they never sail past the reef?
questions.explanation: "Where You Are" is sung early in Moana to establish the island's tradition of staying close to shore.

questions.question: Which ancestral voyaging song is heard as Moana's ancestors are shown sailing the ocean?
questions.explanation: "We Know the Way" accompanies visions of Moana's seafaring ancestors navigating the open ocean.

questions.question: "Isabela" reveals her true feelings about perfection in which Encanto song?
questions.explanation: Isabela sings "What Else Can I Do," discovering she can create more than perfect flowers.

questions.question: Which gentle Encanto song, sung largely without English lyrics, tells Abuela's backstory?
questions.explanation: "Dos Oruguitas" is a Spanish-language ballad that narrates Abuela Alma's tragic past.

questions.question: Hector originally wrote "Remember Me" as what kind of song for his daughter?
answers: A lullaby for his wife only
questions.explanation: Hector wrote "Remember Me" as a tender lullaby to comfort his young daughter Coco.

questions.question: Which Pixar short-turned-feature song became an Academy Award winner for Coco?
questions.explanation: "Remember Me" won the Academy Award for Best Original Song for Coco.

questions.question: Which Zootopia character is a pop-star gazelle who performs the film's theme song?
questions.explanation: Gazelle, a pop star within the film, performs "Try Everything" during Zootopia's opening celebration.

questions.question: In Frozen, Kristoff voices both sides of a chat with his reindeer in which short song?
answers: Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
questions.explanation: Kristoff sings "Reindeer(s) Are Better Than People" while voicing both himself and his reindeer Sven.

questions.question: Which classic-era Disney song famously begins with whistling before the lyrics start?
questions.explanation: "Whistle While You Work" opens with whistling as Snow White cleans the dwarfs' cottage.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: Snow White sings "Whistle While You Work" to encourage forest animals to help her do what?
questions.explanation: Snow White enlists forest animals to help tidy the dwarfs' cottage while she sings.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: Which romantic song plays during Lady and Tramp's famous spaghetti dinner scene?
questions.explanation: "Bella Notte" plays during the iconic spaghetti dinner scene shared by Lady and Tramp.

questions.question: Which song features Gramma Tala's spirit encouraging Moana to remember who she is?
answers: I Am Moana (Song of the Ancestors)
questions.explanation: Gramma Tala's spirit appears in "I Am Moana (Song of the Ancestors)" to encourage Moana on her journey.

questions.question: Phil the satyr sings which gruff pep-talk song to Hercules?
questions.explanation: Phil sings "One Last Hope" reluctantly agreeing to train Hercules into a hero.

questions.question: Which Renaissance-era song is a boisterous group number performed during a festival?
questions.explanation: "Topsy Turvy" is the boisterous song performed during the Festival of Fools in The Hunchback of Notre Dame.

questions.question: Which tender lullaby is sung to comfort Dumbo during a visit with his mother?
answers: When You Wish Upon a Star
questions.explanation: "Baby Mine" is the lullaby heard during Dumbo's emotional visit with his mother through the circus wagon bars.

questions.question: Which classic Disney short-film song later inspired the Peter Pan number about growing up?
answers: You Can Fly! You Can Fly! You Can Fly!
The Second Star to the Right
questions.explanation: "The Second Star to the Right" is heard as the Darling family's ship sails toward Neverland.

questions.question: Which Modern-era Disney song won the Academy Award for Best Original Song for Frozen?
answers: Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
For the First Time in Forever
questions.explanation: "Let It Go" won the Academy Award for Best Original Song for Frozen in 2014.

questions.question: Which song serves as the joyful finale of Encanto after the Madrigals' house is rebuilt?
questions.explanation: "All of You" is the ensemble finale song celebrating the rebuilt Madrigal house at the end of Encanto.

questions.question: In Pinocchio, which song does Jiminy Cricket sing about letting your conscience be your guide?
answers: When You Wish Upon a Star
questions.explanation: Jiminy Cricket sings 'Give a Little Whistle' to teach Pinocchio to summon his conscience for help.

questions.question: In Enchanted (2007), which song does Giselle sing while cleaning with the help of city critters?
questions.explanation: In Enchanted, Giselle sings 'Happy Working Song' as New York rats and pigeons help her tidy up.

questions.question: In Tangled, which song do the thugs at the Snuggly Duckling sing about their hidden dreams?
questions.explanation: The tavern ruffians reveal softer aspirations in 'I've Got a Dream' at the Snuggly Duckling.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland (1951), which song celebrates Alice's 'un-birthday' with the Mad Hatter?
questions.explanation: The Mad Hatter and March Hare throw a tea party singing 'The Unbirthday Song' for Alice.

questions.question: In The Aristocats, which song does Marie practice at the piano with her siblings?
answers: Ev'rybody Wants to Be a Cat
questions.explanation: The kittens rehearse their music lesson in 'Scales and Arpeggios' with Duchess at the piano.

questions.question: In Wish (2023), which song does Asha sing while wishing on a star for something more?
questions.explanation: Asha voices her longing in 'This Wish,' calling out to the sky above the kingdom of Rosas.

questions.question: In Mary Poppins, which tongue-twisting nonsense word is the title of a cheerful song?
questions.explanation: Mary and Bert sing 'Supercalifragilisticexpialidocious,' a word for when you have nothing to say.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, which song does the chef Louis sing while chasing Sebastian in the kitchen?
questions.explanation: Chef Louis gleefully prepares seafood in 'Les Poissons' while Sebastian dodges his knife.

questions.question: In Sleeping Beauty, which song does Aurora sing wondering when she will meet someone?
questions.explanation: Raised as Briar Rose, Aurora sings 'I Wonder' to the forest animals about longing for love.

questions.question: In Peter Pan (1953), which marching song do the children follow behind the Lost Boys?
answers: The Second Star to the Right
questions.explanation: The Lost Boys and Darling children parade through Neverland singing 'Following the Leader.'

questions.question: In Robin Hood (1973), which cheerful song does Alan-a-Dale sing as Robin and Little John stroll?
questions.explanation: The rooster minstrel Alan-a-Dale opens the tale with 'Oo-De-Lally' as the two friends wander.

questions.question: The song 'You'll Be in My Heart,' written by Phil Collins, is from which Disney film?
questions.explanation: Phil Collins wrote 'You'll Be in My Heart' for Tarzan, sung by Kala to the orphaned boy.

questions.question: The song 'That's How You Know' comes from which Disney film mixing animation and live action?
questions.explanation: 'That's How You Know' is Giselle's big Central Park musical number in Enchanted.

questions.question: The friendship song 'Best of Friends' is from which Disney film?
questions.explanation: 'Best of Friends' plays as young Tod and Copper bond in The Fox and the Hound.

questions.question: The song 'Why Should I Worry' is sung by a streetwise dog in which Disney film?
questions.explanation: Dodger struts confidently through New York singing 'Why Should I Worry' in Oliver & Company.

questions.question: The surreal song 'Pink Elephants on Parade' appears in which classic Disney film?
questions.explanation: 'Pink Elephants on Parade' is the woozy dream sequence in Dumbo.

questions.question: The song 'This Is Halloween' is the opening number of which stop-motion Disney film?
questions.explanation: 'This Is Halloween' introduces the residents of Halloween Town in The Nightmare Before Christmas.

questions.question: The romantic ballad 'Can You Feel the Love Tonight' is from which Disney film?
questions.explanation: 'Can You Feel the Love Tonight' underscores Simba and Nala's reunion in The Lion King.

questions.question: The song 'Nobody Like U,' performed by the boy band 4*Town, is from which Pixar film?
questions.explanation: The fictional band 4*Town performs 'Nobody Like U' in Turning Red.

questions.question: The song 'Immortals' by Fall Out Boy plays in which Disney animated film?
questions.explanation: 'Immortals' plays during a montage in Big Hero 6 as the team builds their gear.

questions.question: The lullaby 'The Place Where Lost Things Go' is from which Disney film?
questions.explanation: Mary sings 'The Place Where Lost Things Go' to comfort the Banks children in Mary Poppins Returns.

questions.question: The song 'Little April Shower,' about a gentle rainstorm, is from which classic Disney film?
answers: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
questions.explanation: 'Little April Shower' plays as rain falls across the forest in Bambi.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, which blind voodoo priestess sings 'Dig a Little Deeper'?
questions.explanation: The 197-year-old priestess Mama Odie sings 'Dig a Little Deeper' to guide Tiana and Naveen.

questions.question: In Aladdin (2019 live-action), which character sings the new song 'Speechless'?
questions.explanation: Princess Jasmine sings the newly written 'Speechless' in the 2019 live-action Aladdin.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast (2017 live-action), which character sings the new song 'Evermore'?
questions.explanation: The Beast sings 'Evermore' after letting Belle go in the 2017 live-action film.

questions.question: In Coco, which character sings 'Proud Corazon' during the joyful finale?
questions.explanation: Miguel performs 'Proud Corazon' for his family, celebrating his musical heritage in Coco.

questions.question: In Lady and the Tramp, which world-weary pound dog sings 'He's a Tramp'?
questions.explanation: The Pekingese Peg sings 'He's a Tramp' about the roguish Tramp inside the dog pound.

questions.question: In The Hunchback of Notre Dame, which trio of gargoyles sings the comic song 'A Guy Like You'?
questions.explanation: The gargoyles Victor, Hugo, and Laverne sing 'A Guy Like You' to encourage Quasimodo.

questions.question: In Frozen II, which character sings the power-ballad 'Lost in the Woods' while missing Anna?
questions.explanation: Kristoff sings the retro-style 'Lost in the Woods' when Anna leaves him behind in Frozen II.

questions.question: In Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs, which character sings 'I'm Wishing' at the wishing well?
questions.explanation: Snow White sings 'I'm Wishing' into the well, hoping the one she loves will find her.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, which lovestruck firefly sings 'Ma Belle Evangeline'?
questions.explanation: The Cajun firefly Ray sings 'Ma Belle Evangeline' about his beloved, the evening star.

questions.question: In Hercules, which group of characters sings the celebratory narration 'Zero to Hero'?
questions.explanation: The five Muses narrate Hercules's rise to stardom in 'Zero to Hero.'

questions.question: In The Aristocats, which smooth alley cat sings 'Thomas O'Malley Cat' to introduce himself?
questions.explanation: The charming stray Thomas O'Malley introduces himself with his own song, 'Thomas O'Malley Cat.'

questions.question: In The Sword in the Stone, which wizard sings 'Higitus Figitus' while magically packing his cottage?
questions.explanation: Merlin sings the magic-word song 'Higitus Figitus' to shrink and pack his belongings.

questions.question: In Enchanted (2007), which song is a fairy-tale duet begun by Giselle and Prince Edward?
questions.explanation: Giselle and Prince Edward sing 'True Love's Kiss' in the animated fairy-tale opening of Enchanted.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid (2023 live-action), the new song 'The Scuttlebutt' is a duet between Scuttle and whom?
questions.explanation: The seabird Scuttle and the crab Sebastian rap 'The Scuttlebutt' together in the 2023 live-action film.

questions.question: In Frozen, which reprise do Anna and Elsa sing while arguing inside the ice palace?
answers: For the First Time in Forever (Reprise)
questions.explanation: Anna and Elsa clash in 'For the First Time in Forever (Reprise)' as Elsa refuses to come home.

questions.question: In Bolt, the end-credits duet 'I Thought I Lost You' features the actors voicing Bolt and which character?
questions.explanation: John Travolta and Miley Cyrus, the voices of Bolt and Penny, perform 'I Thought I Lost You.'

questions.question: In Wish (2023), which duet do Asha and King Magnifico share about protecting people's wishes?
questions.explanation: Asha and Magnifico sing 'At All Costs,' each vowing to safeguard the wishes for different reasons.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, which greedy governor sings 'Mine, Mine, Mine' about digging for gold?
questions.explanation: Governor Ratcliffe sings 'Mine, Mine, Mine' as he forces settlers to dig up Virginia for gold.

questions.question: In The Nightmare Before Christmas, which villain sings his own song while gambling with Santa Claus?
questions.explanation: The burlap boogeyman Oogie Boogie sings 'Oogie Boogie's Song' as he toys with the captured Santa.

questions.question: In The Great Mouse Detective, which rat villain sings 'The World's Greatest Criminal Mind'?
questions.explanation: Professor Ratigan boasts of his evil schemes in 'The World's Greatest Criminal Mind.'

questions.question: In Wish (2023), which power-hungry king sings the villain song 'This Is the Thing'?
questions.explanation: King Magnifico embraces forbidden magic in his villain number 'This Is the Thing.'

questions.question: In Aladdin, which villain sings the menacing 'Prince Ali (Reprise)' to expose Aladdin's secret?
questions.explanation: Jafar taunts Aladdin with the dark 'Prince Ali (Reprise),' revealing him as a lowly street rat.

questions.question: In Home on the Range, which cattle-rustling villain hypnotizes cows with his yodeling?
questions.explanation: The rustler Alameda Slim uses his yodeling song to hypnotize and steal entire herds of cattle.

questions.question: Which song opens The Hunchback of Notre Dame, explaining Quasimodo's mysterious past?
questions.explanation: Clopin narrates Quasimodo's origins in the opening number 'The Bells of Notre Dame.'

questions.question: Which song opens Pocahontas as English settlers set sail for the New World?
questions.explanation: The sailors sing 'The Virginia Company' as their ship departs London at the start of Pocahontas.

questions.question: Which song opens The Little Mermaid aboard Prince Eric's ship?
questions.explanation: Sailors sing 'Fathoms Below' about merfolk as Eric's ship sails at the start of The Little Mermaid.

questions.question: Which Phil Collins song opens Tarzan as a shipwrecked family reaches the jungle?
questions.explanation: 'Two Worlds' opens Tarzan, showing both a human family and a gorilla family with a lost child.

questions.question: Which song opens Oliver & Company as an abandoned kitten is left on a New York street?
answers: Once Upon a Time in New York City
questions.explanation: 'Once Upon a Time in New York City' plays as the kitten Oliver is left alone in the big city.

questions.question: Which song opens Frozen, sung by ice harvesters cutting blocks from a frozen lake?
questions.explanation: Ice harvesters sing 'Frozen Heart' while cutting ice in the opening sequence of Frozen.

questions.question: Which song opens Hercules, sung by the Muses to set up the story?
questions.explanation: The Muses introduce the tale of the young god in the opening number 'The Gospel Truth.'

questions.question: Which dreamy song opens Peter Pan, sung over the rooftops of London?
answers: The Second Star to the Right
questions.explanation: 'The Second Star to the Right' opens Peter Pan, pointing the way toward Neverland.

questions.question: Which title song opens The Aristocats, performed by Maurice Chevalier?
answers: Ev'rybody Wants to Be a Cat
questions.explanation: The film opens with the title song 'The Aristocats,' sung by Maurice Chevalier.

questions.question: In The Lion King, the ballad 'Can You Feel the Love Tonight' accompanies the romance between Simba and whom?
questions.explanation: 'Can You Feel the Love Tonight' plays as Simba and Nala fall in love as young adults.

questions.question: In The Princess and the Frog, the song 'When We're Human' is sung by Louis, Tiana, and which prince?
questions.explanation: As frogs and a jazzy alligator, Naveen, Tiana, and Louis dream of their futures in 'When We're Human.'

questions.question: In Lilo & Stitch, which upbeat Hawaiian song plays during the ohana surfing scene?
questions.explanation: 'Hawaiian Roller Coaster Ride' accompanies Lilo, Stitch, and Nani surfing together in Lilo & Stitch.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, which song does Grandmother Willow sing, urging Pocahontas to listen with her heart?
questions.explanation: Grandmother Willow sings 'Listen With Your Heart,' urging Pocahontas to heed the spirits around her.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, which song do the villagers sing while marching to storm the castle?
questions.explanation: The angry villagers sing 'The Mob Song' as Gaston leads them to kill the Beast.

questions.question: In Mary Poppins, which song encourages giving tuppence to help a bird-feeding woman?
questions.explanation: Mary sings the tender 'Feed the Birds' about the woman selling crumbs on the cathedral steps.

questions.question: In The Jungle Book, which marching song is led by the elephant Colonel Hathi and his patrol?
questions.explanation: Colonel Hathi drills his elephant patrol in the military-style 'Colonel Hathi's March.'

questions.question: In Frozen II, which upbeat song do Anna, Elsa, Kristoff, and Olaf sing about cherishing the present?
questions.explanation: The friends sing 'Some Things Never Change' in Arendelle, sensing that change is coming.

questions.question: In Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs, which lively song do the dwarfs play to entertain Snow White?
questions.explanation: The dwarfs play instruments and yodel in 'The Silly Song' to entertain Snow White after dinner.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In The Nightmare Before Christmas, which song does Jack Skellington sing while bored with Halloween?
questions.explanation: Jack Skellington sings 'Jack's Lament' in the graveyard, weary of frightening people each year.

questions.question: In The Nightmare Before Christmas, which song does Jack sing while marveling at Christmas Town?
questions.explanation: Jack sings 'What's This?' as he discovers snow, lights, and joy in Christmas Town.

questions.question: In The Emperor's New Groove, which theme song does a lounge singer perform about a 'Perfect World'?
questions.explanation: Tom Jones voices the Theme Song Guy who belts 'Perfect World' introducing Emperor Kuzco.

questions.question: In The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh, which bouncy song does Tigger sing about being unique?
answers: Up, Down and Touch the Ground
questions.explanation: Tigger sings 'The Wonderful Thing About Tiggers,' boasting that he is the only one.
questions.sourceTitle: The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh

questions.question: Which Renaissance love song won the Academy Award for Best Original Song for Aladdin?
questions.explanation: 'A Whole New World' won the 1993 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

questions.question: Which Renaissance song won the Academy Award for Best Original Song for The Little Mermaid?
questions.explanation: 'Under the Sea' won the 1990 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

questions.question: In the Renaissance film Mulan, which song do the soldiers sing while daydreaming about sweethearts?
answers: I'll Make a Man Out of You
questions.explanation: The weary soldiers sing 'A Girl Worth Fighting For' as they march, picturing their ideal partners.

questions.question: In the Renaissance film Tarzan, which song plays as Tarzan and Jane explore the human camp?
questions.explanation: 'Strangers Like Me' plays as Tarzan curiously discovers human tools and knowledge with Jane.

questions.question: In the Renaissance film The Hunchback of Notre Dame, which song does Quasimodo sing dreaming of Esmeralda?
questions.explanation: Quasimodo sings the hopeful 'Heaven's Light,' imagining that Esmeralda could love him.

questions.question: Which 1991 Renaissance film, featuring 'Be Our Guest,' became the first animated Best Picture Oscar nominee?
questions.explanation: Beauty and the Beast (1991) was the first animated film nominated for the Best Picture Oscar.

questions.question: Which Renaissance song won the Academy Award for Best Original Song for Pocahontas?
questions.explanation: 'Colors of the Wind' won the 1996 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

questions.question: In the Renaissance film The Little Mermaid, in which song do King Triton's daughters introduce themselves?
questions.explanation: The mersisters introduce themselves in 'Daughters of Triton' before Ariel is found missing.

questions.question: Which Renaissance film features 'Colors of the Wind,' 'Just Around the Riverbend,' and 'Savages'?
questions.explanation: 'Colors of the Wind,' 'Just Around the Riverbend,' and 'Savages' are all songs from Pocahontas.

questions.question: Which Renaissance film features 'Go the Distance,' 'Zero to Hero,' and 'I Won't Say (I'm in Love)'?
questions.explanation: 'Go the Distance,' 'Zero to Hero,' and 'I Won't Say (I'm in Love)' are all from Hercules.

questions.question: Which Renaissance film features 'Reflection,' 'Honor to Us All,' and 'I'll Make a Man Out of You'?
questions.explanation: 'Reflection,' 'Honor to Us All,' and 'I'll Make a Man Out of You' are all songs from Mulan.

questions.question: In Tangled, which short incantation does Rapunzel sing to make her magic hair glow and heal?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel sings the brief 'Healing Incantation' to activate her hair's restorative magic.

questions.question: In Wreck-It Ralph, which Owl City song plays over the film's end credits?
answers: When Can I See You Again?
questions.explanation: Owl City's 'When Can I See You Again?' plays over the closing credits of Wreck-It Ralph.

questions.question: In Ralph Breaks the Internet, Vanellope sings a princess-style 'I want' song set in which place?
questions.explanation: Vanellope sings 'A Place Called Slaughter Race,' a Disney-princess-style ballad, in an online game.

questions.question: Which modern Disney film features the songs 'Lost in the Woods,' 'Into the Unknown,' and 'Show Yourself'?
questions.explanation: 'Lost in the Woods,' 'Into the Unknown,' and 'Show Yourself' are all songs from Frozen II.

questions.question: Which modern Disney film features 'Almost There,' 'Friends on the Other Side,' and 'Dig a Little Deeper'?
questions.explanation: 'Almost There,' 'Friends on the Other Side,' and 'Dig a Little Deeper' are all from The Princess and the Frog.

questions.question: Which modern Disney film features the songs 'Surface Pressure,' 'What Else Can I Do?,' and 'Dos Oruguitas'?
questions.explanation: 'Surface Pressure,' 'What Else Can I Do?,' and 'Dos Oruguitas' are all songs from Encanto.

questions.question: In Mary Poppins, which song does Bert sing about the lucky life of a chimney sweep?
questions.explanation: Bert sings 'Chim Chim Cher-ee' about a sweep's lucky life; it won the Best Original Song Oscar.

questions.question: In Cinderella (1950), which song does Cinderella sing as a vocal exercise, mocked by Drizella?
answers: A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes
questions.explanation: Cinderella sings 'Sing, Sweet Nightingale' while working, as Drizella practices it badly.

questions.question: In Dumbo, which song do the crows sing, amazed by a flying elephant?
answers: When I See an Elephant Fly
questions.explanation: The crows sing the playful 'When I See an Elephant Fly' after meeting Dumbo.

questions.question: In Lady and the Tramp, which sly song do the two mischievous cats Si and Am sing?
questions.explanation: Aunt Sarah's cats Si and Am sing 'The Siamese Cat Song' as they cause chaos in the house.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland (1951), which song do the card gardeners sing while fixing a mistake?
questions.explanation: The Queen's card soldiers sing 'Painting the Roses Red' after planting white roses by mistake.

questions.question: In Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs, which hopeful song does Snow White sing to encourage a smile?
answers: With a Smile and a Song
questions.explanation: Snow White sings 'With a Smile and a Song' to comfort the animals after fleeing the Queen.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In Robin Hood (1973), which mocking song ridicules the greedy Prince John?
questions.explanation: Little John and the townsfolk mock Prince John with 'The Phony King of England.'

questions.question: In The Jungle Book, which soft song does the village girl sing at the river, catching Mowgli's eye?
questions.explanation: The village girl sings 'My Own Home' at the water's edge, drawing Mowgli toward the man-village.

questions.question: In Peter Pan (1953), which song does Captain Hook's crew sing about a swashbuckling life?
answers: The Second Star to the Right
questions.explanation: Captain Hook's crew sings 'A Pirate's Life' aboard the Jolly Roger.

questions.question: In Dumbo, which song accompanies the circus train chugging along the tracks?
answers: When I See an Elephant Fly
questions.explanation: 'Casey Junior' plays as the circus train climbs the hills carrying the animals in Dumbo.

questions.question: In The Rescuers, which gentle song reassures the orphan girl Penny that she is not forgotten?
questions.explanation: 'Someone's Waiting for You' plays as Penny prays and hopes to be adopted in The Rescuers.

questions.question: In Sleeping Beauty, which fanfare song welcomes the newborn princess at the royal celebration?
questions.explanation: The court sings 'Hail to the Princess Aurora' as subjects gather to honor the newborn princess.

questions.question: In The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh, which theme song describes the 'silly old bear'?
answers: Up, Down and Touch the Ground
questions.explanation: The title song 'Winnie the Pooh' introduces the 'silly old bear' of the Hundred Acre Wood.
questions.sourceTitle: The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh

questions.question: In Bambi, which soothing song frames the film as the seasons pass in the forest?
answers: Let's Sing a Gay Little Spring Song
questions.explanation: 'Love Is a Song' opens and closes Bambi, framing its story of life in the forest.

questions.question: In 101 Dalmatians (1961), which jingle plays on the TV advertising a brand of dog food?
questions.explanation: The 'Kanine Krunchies' commercial jingle plays on television as the puppies watch.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland (1951), which song do the talking flowers sing to Alice in the garden?
questions.explanation: The talking flowers sing 'All in the Golden Afternoon' before mistaking Alice for a weed.

questions.question: Which character sings "Part of Your World" while dreaming of life on land?
questions.explanation: Ariel sings "Part of Your World" in her grotto as she longs to become human.

questions.question: "Under the Sea" is performed by which crab trying to convince Ariel to stay in the ocean?
questions.explanation: Sebastian the crab performs "Under the Sea" to persuade Ariel that ocean life is best.

questions.question: Which villain sings "Poor Unfortunate Souls" while making a deal with Ariel?
questions.explanation: The sea witch Ursula sings "Poor Unfortunate Souls" while trading Ariel's voice for legs.

questions.question: In "The Little Mermaid," which character sings "Kiss the Girl" to encourage Eric?
questions.explanation: Sebastian sings "Kiss the Girl" from a lily pad while rallying swamp creatures to help Eric.

questions.question: Which song opens "The Little Mermaid" as sailors work aboard Eric's ship?
questions.explanation: "Fathoms Below" is sung by sailors during the film's opening sequence at sea.

questions.question: Which enchanted candelabra sings "Be Our Guest" to welcome Belle?
questions.explanation: Lumiere leads the castle staff in the extravagant dinner number "Be Our Guest."

questions.question: Which song is sung by Gaston and LeFou to boost Gaston's ego at the tavern?
questions.explanation: LeFou leads the tavern crowd in praising Gaston's supposed greatness in the song "Gaston."

questions.question: Which song opens "Beauty and the Beast," introducing Belle and her provincial town?
questions.explanation: The opening number "Belle" introduces the heroine as the townsfolk gossip about her.

questions.question: "Something There" is sung as a duet between Belle and which character?
questions.explanation: Belle and the Beast each sing about their growing feelings during "Something There."

questions.question: Which housekeeper sings the title ballad "Beauty and the Beast" during the ballroom dance?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Potts, the teapot, sings the tender title song as Belle and the Beast dance.

questions.question: Which character sings "Friend Like Me" while showing off his magical powers?
questions.explanation: The Genie performs the flashy showstopper "Friend Like Me" upon meeting Aladdin.

questions.question: Which character sings 'Prince Ali' to introduce Aladdin to Agrabah?
questions.explanation: The Genie performs the grand parade number 'Prince Ali' to present Aladdin as royalty.

questions.question: Which song does Genie perform to introduce Aladdin as visiting royalty in Agrabah?
questions.explanation: Genie sings "Prince Ali" to announce Aladdin's disguised arrival as royalty.

questions.question: Which song opens "Aladdin," sung by a mysterious peddler in the desert?
questions.explanation: A traveling peddler sings "Arabian Nights" to set the scene as the film begins.

questions.question: Which song does Aladdin sing while evading palace guards through the marketplace?
questions.explanation: Aladdin sings "One Jump Ahead" while fleeing the Sultan's guards after being caught stealing bread.

questions.question: Which song opens "The Lion King" as animals gather at Pride Rock?
answers: Can You Feel the Love Tonight
questions.explanation: "Circle of Life" opens the film as animals gather to witness Simba's presentation.

questions.question: Which villain sings "Be Prepared" while plotting to seize the throne?
questions.explanation: Scar sings "Be Prepared" to rally the hyenas behind his plan to become king.

questions.question: Which pair teaches young Simba their carefree philosophy in "Hakuna Matata"?
questions.explanation: Timon and Pumbaa introduce Simba to a worry-free life in the song "Hakuna Matata."

questions.question: "Can You Feel the Love Tonight" plays during a romantic moment between Simba and which character?
questions.explanation: The song underscores the reunion and budding romance between adult Simba and Nala.

questions.question: Which song has Pocahontas singing about respecting nature and the land?
questions.explanation: Pocahontas sings "Colors of the Wind" to teach John Smith about respecting the natural world.

questions.question: Which villain sings "Mine, Mine, Mine" while his men dig for gold?
questions.explanation: Governor Ratcliffe sings "Mine, Mine, Mine" while obsessing over finding gold in the New World.

questions.question: Released during the Disney Renaissance, "Just Around the Riverbend" is sung by which character?
questions.explanation: Pocahontas sings "Just Around the Riverbend" while paddling her canoe and pondering her future.

questions.question: Which villain sings "Hellfire" while wrestling with his obsession over Esmeralda?
questions.explanation: Judge Claude Frollo sings the dark "Hellfire" while consumed by guilt and desire.

questions.question: Which bell-ringer sings "Out There" while longing to leave his tower?
questions.explanation: Quasimodo sings "Out There" while dreaming of experiencing life beyond Notre Dame.

questions.question: Which song, narrated by Clopin, opens "The Hunchback of Notre Dame"?
questions.explanation: Clopin narrates Quasimodo's backstory in the opening number "The Bells of Notre Dame."

questions.question: Which character sings "Go the Distance" while dreaming of becoming a true hero?
questions.explanation: Hercules sings "Go the Distance" as he sets out to discover his place in the world.

questions.question: Which character sings "I Won't Say (I'm in Love)" while denying her feelings?
questions.explanation: Megara sings "I Won't Say (I'm in Love)" while resisting her growing feelings for Hercules.

questions.question: Which group of narrators sings "Zero to Hero" to describe Hercules's rise to fame?
questions.explanation: The five Muses narrate and sing "Zero to Hero" as Hercules becomes a celebrated hero.

questions.question: Which song has Mulan questioning her identity while looking into a pond?
answers: I'll Make a Man Out of You
questions.explanation: Mulan sings "Reflection" while struggling to reconcile who she is with family expectations.

questions.question: Which captain sings "I'll Make a Man Out of You" while training his troops?
questions.explanation: Captain Li Shang sings "I'll Make a Man Out of You" while whipping his recruits into shape.

questions.question: Which song opens "Mulan" as women prepare her to meet the matchmaker?
answers: I'll Make a Man Out of You
questions.explanation: "Honor to Us All" plays as Mulan is dressed and prepared to meet the matchmaker.

questions.question: Which 1999 Disney film features the Oscar-winning song "You'll Be in My Heart"?
questions.explanation: "You'll Be in My Heart," written and performed by Phil Collins, appears in Tarzan.

questions.question: Which song underscores Tarzan's growth from infancy to adulthood in the jungle?
questions.explanation: "Son of Man" plays over the montage showing Tarzan maturing among the gorillas.

questions.question: Which villain sings "Mother Knows Best" to keep Rapunzel locked in her tower?
questions.explanation: Mother Gothel sings "Mother Knows Best" to frighten Rapunzel into staying inside.

questions.question: Which glowing spectacle accompanies 'I See the Light' in Tangled?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel and Eugene watch thousands of floating lanterns as 'I See the Light' plays.

questions.question: Which song is sung by the rough patrons of the Snuggly Duckling tavern?
questions.explanation: The tavern thugs reveal their gentle secret dreams in the song "I've Got a Dream."

questions.question: Which character sings "Let It Go" after fleeing to the North Mountain?
questions.explanation: Elsa sings "Let It Go" as she embraces her powers and builds her ice palace.

questions.question: "Do You Want to Build a Snowman" is sung as a duet between Anna and which sister?
questions.explanation: Anna repeatedly calls to Elsa through the years in the duet "Do You Want to Build a Snowman."

questions.question: Anna and Hans sing which duet shortly after meeting at the castle gates?
answers: For the First Time in Forever
questions.explanation: Anna and Hans duet on "Love Is an Open Door" soon after their whirlwind first meeting.

questions.question: Which snowman sings "In Summer" while imagining life in warm weather?
questions.explanation: Olaf cheerfully sings "In Summer" about his excitement for a season he doesn't understand.

questions.question: Which song does Elsa sing in "Frozen 2" while following a mysterious voice?
questions.explanation: Elsa sings "Into the Unknown" as she is drawn toward a distant, mysterious voice.

questions.question: Which character sings "Lost in the Woods" after Anna leaves him behind?
questions.explanation: Kristoff sings the power-ballad "Lost in the Woods" while feeling abandoned by Anna.

questions.question: Which song has Moana singing about her longing to sail beyond the reef?
questions.explanation: Moana sings "How Far I'll Go" while yearning to explore the ocean beyond her island.

questions.question: Which demigod sings "You're Welcome" while listing his heroic deeds?
questions.explanation: Maui sings "You're Welcome" while boasting about the favors he has done for humanity.

questions.question: Which giant crab sings "Shiny" about his glittering treasure collection?
questions.explanation: The bioluminescent crab Tamatoa sings "Shiny" while flaunting his treasure-covered shell.

questions.question: Which Encanto song has multiple Madrigal family members discussing their missing uncle?
questions.explanation: Multiple family members share their memories of Bruno in the ensemble song "We Don't Talk About Bruno."

questions.question: Which sister sings "Surface Pressure" about the weight of family expectations?
questions.explanation: Luisa, the super-strong sister, sings "Surface Pressure" about the pressure she constantly feels.

questions.question: Which song opens "Encanto," introducing the Madrigal family to a curious child?
questions.explanation: Mirabel introduces her family's gifts to local children in the opening song "The Family Madrigal."

questions.question: In "Coco," which family member first sings a tender lullaby version of "Remember Me"?
questions.explanation: Hector wrote "Remember Me" as a gentle lullaby for his daughter Coco before he died.

questions.question: Which aspiring restaurateur sings "Almost There" about her dream of owning a restaurant?
questions.explanation: Tiana sings "Almost There" while describing the restaurant she is saving up to open.

questions.question: Which villain sings "Friends on the Other Side" while offering a shady deal?
questions.explanation: The Shadow Man, Dr. Facilier, sings "Friends on the Other Side" while luring Naveen into a bargain.

questions.question: Which song opens "The Princess and the Frog," setting the scene in Louisiana?
questions.explanation: "Down in New Orleans" opens the film, introducing the city's music and atmosphere.

questions.question: Which pop star character performs the song "Try Everything" in "Zootopia"?
questions.explanation: The pop-star gazelle character, voiced by Shakira, performs "Try Everything" in the film.

questions.question: In "Turning Red," which fictional boy band performs songs like "Nobody Like U"?
questions.explanation: The fictional boy band 4*Town performs the pop songs Mei and her friends adore.

questions.question: In "Monsters, Inc.," "If I Didn't Have You" plays over the credits as a duet by which pair?
questions.explanation: Mike and Sulley perform the Oscar-winning duet "If I Didn't Have You" during the end credits.

questions.question: Which Pixar film features the song "You've Got a Friend in Me"?
questions.explanation: Randy Newman wrote and performed "You've Got a Friend in Me" for the original Toy Story.

questions.question: Which film features the emotional song "We Belong Together" near its finale?
questions.explanation: "We Belong Together" plays as Andy's toys find a new home with Bonnie in Toy Story 3.

questions.question: Which song is sung by the Seven Dwarfs as they march home from the mine?
answers: With a Smile and a Song
questions.explanation: The dwarfs sing "Heigh-Ho" while marching home from a long day of mining jewels.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: Which song has Snow White singing about the love she hopes to find one day?
questions.explanation: Snow White sings "Someday My Prince Will Come" while imagining her future romance.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: "I'm Wishing" is sung as a duet between Snow White and which character?
questions.explanation: Snow White and the Prince first sing together at a wishing well in "I'm Wishing."
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: Which cricket sings "When You Wish Upon a Star" to open "Pinocchio"?
questions.explanation: Jiminy Cricket sings the film's famous opening number, "When You Wish Upon a Star."

questions.question: Which sly fox sings "Hi-Diddle-Dee-Dee (An Actor's Life for Me)" in "Pinocchio"?
questions.explanation: Honest John sings "Hi-Diddle-Dee-Dee" while luring Pinocchio toward a life on the stage.

questions.question: Which magical character sings "Bibbidi-Bobbidi-Boo" to transform Cinderella's outfit?
questions.explanation: The Fairy Godmother sings "Bibbidi-Bobbidi-Boo" while conjuring Cinderella's ball gown.

questions.question: Which song has Cinderella singing about the wishes held in her heart?
answers: A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes
questions.explanation: Cinderella sings "A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes" while doing her morning chores.

questions.question: Which song is sung by the mice as they gather materials for Cinderella's dress?
answers: A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes
questions.explanation: Cinderella's mice friends sing "The Work Song" while sewing her dress for the ball.

questions.question: Which princess sings "Once Upon a Dream" while wandering the forest?
questions.explanation: Princess Aurora sings "Once Upon a Dream" while gathering berries and daydreaming in the woods.

questions.question: Which two characters sing "The Unbirthday Song" to Alice at their tea party?
answers: The Mad Hatter and March Hare
The Queen and King of Hearts
questions.explanation: The Mad Hatter and March Hare sing "The Unbirthday Song" to celebrate Alice's unbirthday.

questions.question: Which character sings "You Can Fly! You Can Fly! You Can Fly!" to the Darling children?
questions.explanation: Peter Pan sings to teach Wendy, John, and Michael how to fly with happy thoughts.

questions.question: In "Lady and the Tramp," which restaurant owners serenade the dogs with "Bella Notte"?
questions.explanation: Restaurant owners Tony and Joe serenade Lady and Tramp with "Bella Notte" over spaghetti.

questions.question: Which mischievous cats sing "The Siamese Cat Song" in "Lady and the Tramp"?
questions.explanation: The troublemaking Siamese cats Si and Am perform "The Siamese Cat Song" together.

questions.question: Which character sings "Cruella De Vil" while describing his eccentric former schoolmate?
questions.explanation: Roger writes and sings "Cruella De Vil" as a playful jab at the film's villain.

questions.question: Which laid-back bear sings "The Bare Necessities" to Mowgli in the jungle?
questions.explanation: Baloo the bear teaches Mowgli to relax and enjoy life in "The Bare Necessities."

questions.question: Which orangutan sings "I Wanna Be Like You" while trying to learn the secret of fire?
questions.explanation: King Louie sings "I Wanna Be Like You" while trying to bargain with Mowgli for fire.

questions.question: Which hypnotic snake sings "Trust in Me" while trying to lull Mowgli to sleep?
questions.explanation: Kaa the python sings "Trust in Me" while attempting to hypnotize Mowgli.

questions.question: Which alley cat leads the jazzy number "Everybody Wants to Be a Cat"?
questions.explanation: Scat Cat leads his jazz band in performing "Everybody Wants to Be a Cat."

questions.question: Which rooster minstrel sings "Oo-De-Lally" to open "Robin Hood"?
questions.explanation: The rooster minstrel Alan-a-Dale narrates and sings the opening song "Oo-De-Lally."

questions.question: Which bouncy character sings "The Wonderful Thing About Tiggers"?
questions.explanation: Tigger proudly sings "The Wonderful Thing About Tiggers" about his own bouncy uniqueness.
questions.sourceTitle: The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh

questions.question: Which two characters sing "Supercalifragilisticexpialidocious" together in "Mary Poppins"?
questions.explanation: Mary Poppins and Bert sing the tongue-twisting "Supercalifragilisticexpialidocious" together.

questions.question: Which chimney sweep sings "Chim Chim Cher-ee" in "Mary Poppins"?
questions.explanation: Bert the chimney sweep sings "Chim Chim Cher-ee" on the rooftops of London.

questions.question: Which character sings "This Wish" while hoping for something better for her kingdom?
questions.explanation: Asha sings "This Wish" while hoping for a brighter future for her kingdom of Rosas.

questions.question: Which of these songs comes from the Disney Renaissance era of 1989 to 1999?
questions.explanation: "Under the Sea" debuted in 1989's The Little Mermaid, kicking off the Disney Renaissance.

questions.question: Which of these songs comes from a classic-era Disney film released before 1970?
questions.explanation: "Bibbidi-Bobbidi-Boo" comes from Cinderella, released in 1950 during Disney's classic era.

questions.question: Which of these songs comes from a modern-era Disney or Pixar film released after 2010?
answers: When You Wish Upon a Star
questions.explanation: "How Far I'll Go" comes from Moana, released in 2016 during Disney's modern era.

questions.question: Which group of narrators opens "Hercules" with the song "The Gospel Truth"?
questions.explanation: The Muses open the film narrating Hercules's origins in "The Gospel Truth."

questions.question: Which trio sings "A Girl Worth Fighting For" while imagining their ideal women?
questions.explanation: Soldiers Ling, Chien-Po, and Yao sing "A Girl Worth Fighting For" while marching to battle.

questions.question: Which mystical trolls sing "Fixer Upper" about Kristoff in "Frozen"?
questions.explanation: Kristoff's adoptive troll family sings "Fixer Upper" while playfully matchmaking him with Anna.

questions.question: Which song opens "Moana" as villagers describe their island home?
questions.explanation: "Where You Are" opens the film, with villagers singing about life on their island.

questions.question: In "Coco," which famous singer performs a flashy stage version of "Remember Me"?
questions.explanation: Ernesto de la Cruz performs a glamorous stage rendition of "Remember Me" for his fans.

questions.question: Which two characters duet on the playful song "Un Poco Loco" at a talent show?
questions.explanation: Miguel and Hector perform the upbeat duet "Un Poco Loco" at a talent show in the Land of the Dead.

questions.question: Which tender song plays as Dumbo is comforted while separated from his mother?
answers: When I See an Elephant Fly
questions.explanation: "Baby Mine" plays as Dumbo's mother cradles him with her trunk through the cage bars.

questions.question: In Tangled, what is the title of the song Rapunzel sings about her daily chores in the tower?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel opens Tangled with 'When Will My Life Begin', listing her routine of cleaning, reading, and painting.

questions.question: In Frozen, what song does Anna sing with excitement as the castle gates open for coronation day?
answers: For the First Time in Forever
Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
questions.explanation: Anna sings 'For the First Time in Forever' as Arendelle opens its gates for Elsa's coronation.

questions.question: In The Lion King, what is the title of the song young Simba sings about his eagerness to rule?
answers: I Just Can't Wait to Be King
questions.explanation: Young Simba sings 'I Just Can't Wait to Be King' with Nala while dodging Zazu.

questions.question: In The Hunchback of Notre Dame, what song does Esmeralda sing praying inside the cathedral?
questions.explanation: Esmeralda sings 'God Help the Outcasts' inside Notre Dame, praying for the poor and downtrodden.

questions.question: In Encanto, what is the title of the song Mirabel sings about being the only Madrigal without a gift?
questions.explanation: Mirabel sings 'Waiting on a Miracle', expressing her longing to belong despite having no magical gift.

questions.question: In Moana, what is the title of the voyaging song about the ancestors' seafaring skills?
questions.explanation: 'We Know the Way' celebrates the wayfinding voyagers who navigated the Pacific by stars and currents.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, what is the title of the song Chef Louis sings while preparing seafood?
questions.explanation: Chef Louis gleefully sings 'Les Poissons' while chopping fish, nearly cooking Sebastian in the process.

questions.question: In Mary Poppins, what song teaches that a bit of sweetness helps chores become fun?
questions.explanation: Mary Poppins sings 'A Spoonful of Sugar' while tidying the nursery with a snap of her fingers.

questions.question: In The Nightmare Before Christmas, what song does Jack sing while discovering Christmas Town?
questions.explanation: Jack Skellington marvels at snow, lights, and gifts while singing 'What's This?' in Christmas Town.

questions.question: The Oscar-winning song 'Colors of the Wind' is featured in which Disney film?
questions.explanation: 'Colors of the Wind' is Pocahontas's signature song about respecting nature and living things.

questions.question: The song 'Perfect World', performed by Tom Jones, appears in which Disney film?
questions.explanation: 'Perfect World' opens The Emperor's New Groove, praising the self-centered young emperor Kuzco.

questions.question: The poignant song 'When She Loved Me', sung by Sarah McLachlan, appears in which Pixar film?
questions.explanation: 'When She Loved Me' underscores Jessie's flashback about being outgrown by her owner in Toy Story 2.

questions.question: The upbeat song 'Why Should I Worry', sung by Dodger, is from which Disney film?
questions.explanation: The street-smart dog Dodger struts through New York singing 'Why Should I Worry' in Oliver & Company.

questions.question: The Central Park musical number 'That's How You Know' appears in which Disney film?
questions.explanation: Giselle leads a lively Central Park crowd in 'That's How You Know' in the film Enchanted.

questions.question: The song 'Touch the Sky' plays during the highland montage of which Pixar film?
questions.explanation: 'Touch the Sky', performed by Julie Fowlis, accompanies Merida riding through the Scottish Highlands in Brave.

questions.question: The waltz duet 'So This Is Love' is featured in which Disney film?
answers: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
questions.explanation: Cinderella and the Prince dance and sing 'So This Is Love' at the royal ball.

questions.question: The lively song 'Un Poco Loco' is performed in which Pixar film?
questions.explanation: Miguel and Hector perform 'Un Poco Loco' during a talent show in Pixar's Coco.

questions.question: In Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs, which character sings 'Whistle While You Work' while cleaning?
questions.explanation: Snow White sings 'Whistle While You Work' as forest animals help her tidy the dwarfs' cottage.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In Pinocchio, which character sings 'I've Got No Strings' on a marionette stage?
questions.explanation: Pinocchio performs 'I've Got No Strings' at Stromboli's puppet show, boasting he needs no strings.

questions.question: In Mary Poppins, which chimney sweep leads the rooftop dance number 'Step in Time'?
questions.explanation: Bert leads his fellow chimney sweeps in the energetic rooftop dance 'Step in Time'.

questions.question: In Enchanted, which character sings the cheerful 'Happy Working Song' while cleaning an apartment?
questions.explanation: Giselle summons city creatures and sings the 'Happy Working Song' while cleaning Robert's apartment.

questions.question: In The Nightmare Before Christmas, which character sings the melancholy 'Jack's Lament'?
questions.explanation: Jack Skellington sings 'Jack's Lament', weary of frightening people and yearning for something new.

questions.question: In The Aristocats, which alley cat introduces himself with a song listing his many names?
questions.explanation: The alley cat sings 'Thomas O'Malley Cat', reeling off his full, elaborate name for Duchess.

questions.question: In The Jungle Book, which pompous elephant leads his herd in 'Colonel Hathi's March'?
questions.explanation: Colonel Hathi drills his elephant patrol in the military-style 'Colonel Hathi's March'.

questions.question: In Sleeping Beauty, which character sings 'I Wonder' in the forest to the birds?
questions.explanation: Aurora, raised as Briar Rose, sings 'I Wonder' about love while walking through the woods.

questions.question: In Peter Pan, which villain sings 'The Elegant Captain Hook' to lure the Lost Boys?
questions.explanation: Captain Hook sings 'The Elegant Captain Hook', trying to recruit the Lost Boys to piracy.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, the duet 'If I Never Knew You' is shared by Pocahontas and which character?
questions.explanation: Pocahontas and John Smith sing 'If I Never Knew You' as he awaits execution.

questions.question: In Frozen, the reprise of 'For the First Time in Forever' is a duet between Anna and which character?
questions.explanation: Anna pleads with Elsa in the reprise of 'For the First Time in Forever' at the ice palace.

questions.question: In High School Musical, the duet 'Breaking Free' is performed by Gabriella and which character?
questions.explanation: Troy and Gabriella sing 'Breaking Free' during the callback audition at East High.

questions.question: In Sleeping Beauty, 'Once Upon a Dream' becomes a duet when Aurora meets which prince?
questions.explanation: Aurora and Prince Phillip sing and dance to 'Once Upon a Dream' after meeting in the forest.

questions.question: In Tangled, 'I See the Light' is a lantern-lit duet between Rapunzel and which character?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel and Flynn Rider sing 'I See the Light' on a boat surrounded by floating lanterns.

questions.question: In The Lion King II: Simba's Pride, the duet 'Love Will Find a Way' is sung by Kiara and which lion?
questions.explanation: Kiara and Kovu sing 'Love Will Find a Way' after being separated by their feuding prides.
questions.sourceTitle: The Lion King II: Simba's Pride

questions.question: In Mary Poppins, the song 'Jolly Holiday' is a cheerful duet between Mary Poppins and which character?
questions.explanation: Mary Poppins and Bert sing 'Jolly Holiday' inside Bert's animated chalk drawing.

questions.question: In Pocahontas, which villain leads the settlers in the war chant 'Savages'?
questions.explanation: Governor Ratcliffe rouses the settlers with 'Savages', spreading fear and hatred of the natives.

questions.question: In Aladdin, which villain sneers a menacing reprise of 'Prince Ali' after seizing power?
questions.explanation: After becoming sorcerer, Jafar mockingly sings the 'Prince Ali' reprise while exposing Aladdin as a fraud.

questions.question: In The Sword in the Stone, which witch sings 'Mad Madam Mim' during a wizard's duel?
questions.explanation: Madam Mim brags about her powers in her own song before dueling Merlin by shapeshifting.

questions.question: In Disney's Descendants, which villain sings 'Evil Like Me' to encourage her daughter Mal?
questions.explanation: Maleficent sings 'Evil Like Me', urging her daughter Mal to embrace wickedness in Descendants.

questions.question: In The Nightmare Before Christmas, which trio sings 'Kidnap the Sandy Claws'?
questions.explanation: Oogie Boogie's henchmen Lock, Shock, and Barrel plot in 'Kidnap the Sandy Claws'.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, which villain leads the townsfolk in 'The Mob Song' to storm the castle?
questions.explanation: Gaston whips the villagers into a frenzy in 'The Mob Song' as they march to kill the Beast.

questions.question: Which Phil Collins song opens Tarzan as a family is shipwrecked and a gorilla loses her young?
questions.explanation: 'Two Worlds' opens Tarzan, paralleling a shipwrecked human family and a grieving gorilla mother.

questions.question: Which song opens Enchanted in the animated fairy-tale kingdom of Andalasia?
questions.explanation: Giselle sings 'True Love's Kiss' in animated Andalasia, dreaming of the prince she will marry.

questions.question: Which song opens The Nightmare Before Christmas by introducing the residents of Halloween Town?
questions.explanation: 'This Is Halloween' opens the film, parading Halloween Town's ghouls and monsters for the viewer.

questions.question: Which song opens The Emperor's New Groove, praising the young emperor Kuzco?
questions.explanation: 'Perfect World', sung by Tom Jones's character, opens the film celebrating the self-absorbed Kuzco.

questions.question: Which Hawaiian chant opens Lilo & Stitch with a hula performance?
questions.explanation: 'He Mele No Lilo', a traditional-style Hawaiian chant, opens Lilo & Stitch over a hula sequence.

questions.question: Which song opens Oliver & Company as a kitten is left alone on the city streets?
answers: Once Upon a Time in New York City
questions.explanation: 'Once Upon a Time in New York City', sung by Huey Lewis, opens the film as Oliver is abandoned.

questions.question: Which title song, performed by Maurice Chevalier, opens The Aristocats?
answers: Ev'rybody Wants to Be a Cat
questions.explanation: Maurice Chevalier sings the title song 'The Aristocats' over the film's opening credits.

questions.question: Which song plays over the opening of Peter Pan, pointing the way to Neverland?
answers: The Second Star to the Right
questions.explanation: 'The Second Star to the Right' opens Peter Pan, introducing the magical route to Neverland.

questions.question: Which married songwriting duo wrote the songs for Disney's Frozen, including 'Let It Go'?
questions.explanation: Robert Lopez and Kristen Anderson-Lopez wrote Frozen's songs; 'Let It Go' won the Academy Award.

questions.question: Which composer wrote the songs for both Moana and Encanto?
questions.explanation: Lin-Manuel Miranda wrote the songs for both Moana and Encanto, including 'We Don't Talk About Bruno'.

questions.question: In The Lion King (1994), Elton John composed the songs with which lyricist?
questions.explanation: Elton John wrote The Lion King's music with lyricist Tim Rice, including 'Circle of Life'.

questions.question: The Sherman brothers wrote the songs for which 1964 Disney musical film?
questions.explanation: Richard and Robert Sherman wrote Mary Poppins's songs, winning an Oscar for 'Chim Chim Cher-ee'.

questions.question: Which Disney song won the Academy Award for Best Original Song at the 1996 ceremony?
answers: Can You Feel the Love Tonight
questions.explanation: 'Colors of the Wind' from Pocahontas won the 1996 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

questions.question: Which Coco song won the Academy Award for Best Original Song?
questions.explanation: 'Remember Me', written by the Lopezes, won the Academy Award for Best Original Song for Coco.

questions.question: During what magical activity do Aladdin and Jasmine sing 'A Whole New World'?
questions.explanation: Aladdin and Jasmine sing 'A Whole New World' while flying across the globe on the magic carpet.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, 'Be Our Guest' is performed to welcome Belle during what event?
questions.explanation: Lumiere leads 'Be Our Guest' as the enchanted staff serve Belle a lavish dinner at the castle.

questions.question: Which musician wrote and performed the songs for Disney's Tarzan?
questions.explanation: Phil Collins wrote and performed Tarzan's songs, winning an Oscar for 'You'll Be in My Heart'.

questions.question: Which Encanto song reached number one on the US Billboard Hot 100 in 2022?
questions.explanation: 'We Don't Talk About Bruno' topped the Billboard Hot 100, a rare feat for a Disney animated song.

questions.question: In which Disney Renaissance film does the satyr Phil sing 'One Last Hope'?
questions.explanation: Philoctetes sings 'One Last Hope' while reluctantly agreeing to train Hercules as a hero.

questions.question: The lively 'Topsy Turvy' celebrates the Festival of Fools in which 1996 film?
questions.explanation: 'Topsy Turvy', led by Clopin, accompanies the Festival of Fools in The Hunchback of Notre Dame.

questions.question: The Phil Collins song 'Strangers Like Me' plays as Tarzan learns from Jane in which 1999 film?
questions.explanation: 'Strangers Like Me' underscores Tarzan's fascination as Jane shows him the human world.

questions.question: The brief song 'Daughters of Triton' introduces Ariel's sisters in which 1989 film?
questions.explanation: 'Daughters of Triton' presents King Triton's daughters at a concert where Ariel is absent.

questions.question: Which 1998 Renaissance film ends with the pop duet 'True to Your Heart'?
questions.explanation: 'True to Your Heart', by Stevie Wonder and 98 Degrees, plays over Mulan's end credits.

questions.question: The sailors' song 'The Virginia Company' opens which 1995 Renaissance film?
questions.explanation: 'The Virginia Company' opens Pocahontas as settlers set sail from England seeking gold and adventure.

questions.question: The song 'Human Again' appears in which Disney Renaissance film about enchanted servants?
questions.explanation: 'Human Again' features the enchanted objects longing to become human again in Beauty and the Beast.

questions.question: The song 'Son of Man' plays during Tarzan's coming-of-age montage in which 1999 film?
questions.explanation: 'Son of Man', by Phil Collins, scores Tarzan growing from a boy into a strong young man.

questions.question: 'The Court of Miracles' sees Clopin nearly hang Phoebus and Quasimodo in which 1996 film?
questions.explanation: 'The Court of Miracles' has Clopin sentencing the intruders to hang in The Hunchback of Notre Dame.

questions.question: In Frozen II, which song does Elsa sing upon reaching Ahtohallan and embracing her power?
questions.explanation: Elsa sings 'Show Yourself' as she reaches Ahtohallan and discovers the source of her magic.

questions.question: In Frozen II, which character sings 'The Next Right Thing' after a devastating loss?
questions.explanation: Anna sings 'The Next Right Thing', resolving to keep going despite her grief and despair.

questions.question: In Encanto, which sister discovers she can grow more than perfect roses in 'What Else Can I Do?'?
questions.explanation: Isabela sings 'What Else Can I Do?' as she joyfully grows wild, imperfect plants for the first time.

questions.question: In Encanto, which Spanish-language ballad by Sebastián Yatra accompanies Abuela's backstory?
questions.explanation: 'Dos Oruguitas', performed by Sebastián Yatra, plays as Abuela recalls losing her husband Pedro.

questions.question: In Coco, which upbeat song does Miguel perform for his family in the finale?
questions.explanation: Miguel sings 'Proud Corazón' for his reunited family a year after his Land of the Dead journey.

questions.question: Which Pixar film features the end-credits song 'Learn Me Right' by Birdy and Mumford & Sons?
questions.explanation: 'Learn Me Right', by Birdy with Mumford & Sons, plays over the end credits of Brave.

questions.question: In Moana, 'I Am Moana' is sung by Moana and the spirit of which character?
questions.explanation: Gramma Tala's spirit sings 'I Am Moana', encouraging Moana to remember who she is and press on.

questions.question: In Wish, the ballad 'At All Costs' is a duet between Asha and which character?
questions.explanation: Asha and King Magnifico sing 'At All Costs' about protecting the wishes they each cherish.

questions.question: In Wish, which song do Asha and her friends sing as they rebel against King Magnifico?
questions.explanation: 'Knowing What I Know Now' rallies Asha and her friends to resist King Magnifico's control.

questions.question: In Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs, which song does Snow White sing to comfort the forest animals?
answers: With a Smile and a Song
questions.explanation: Snow White sings 'With a Smile and a Song' to calm the woodland animals after fleeing the Queen.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: In Pinocchio, which cricket sings 'Give a Little Whistle' while offering to be a conscience?
questions.explanation: Jiminy Cricket sings 'Give a Little Whistle', teaching Pinocchio to call on his conscience.

questions.question: In Dumbo, which group of birds sings 'When I See an Elephant Fly' while teasing Dumbo?
questions.explanation: The crows sing 'When I See an Elephant Fly', mocking the idea before helping Dumbo take flight.

questions.question: Which gentle song accompanies a rainstorm in the forest in Disney's Bambi?
answers: Let's Sing a Gay Little Spring Song
questions.explanation: 'Little April Shower' scores a rainstorm scene as the forest animals take shelter in Bambi.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland, which song do the Queen's card soldiers sing while repainting a rose bush?
questions.explanation: The playing-card gardeners sing 'Painting the Roses Red' after planting white roses by mistake.

questions.question: In Lady and the Tramp, which pound dog sings 'He's a Tramp' about the roguish stray?
questions.explanation: Peg, a pound dog, sings 'He's a Tramp' describing the charming but rootless Tramp.

questions.question: In Peter Pan, which song do the Lost Boys and Darling children march to through Neverland?
answers: The Second Star to the Right
questions.explanation: 'Following the Leader' plays as the Lost Boys and the Darling boys march single-file through Neverland.

questions.question: In One Hundred and One Dalmatians, the jingle 'Kanine Krunchies' advertises what product?
questions.explanation: 'Kanine Krunchies' is a television jingle for dog biscuits that the puppies watch in the film.

questions.question: Which Rascal Flatts song plays during a Route 66 driving montage in the Pixar film Cars?
questions.explanation: Rascal Flatts' cover of 'Life Is a Highway' scores the Radiator Springs road-trip montage in Cars.

questions.question: In Peter Pan (1953), which character sings 'Your Mother and Mine' to the Lost Boys?
questions.explanation: Wendy sings 'Your Mother and Mine' to the Lost Boys and her brothers about the love of mothers.

questions.question: In Alice in Wonderland (1951), which character sings 'I'm Late' while rushing off in a panic?
questions.explanation: The White Rabbit sings 'I'm Late' as he scurries away, fretting about being late for the Queen.

questions.question: Which song do the Powhatan people sing returning from a hunt near the start of Pocahontas?
questions.explanation: 'Steady as the Beating Drum' accompanies the Powhatan village early in Pocahontas as the warriors return home.

questions.question: Which composer wrote the music for The Little Mermaid, Beauty and the Beast, and Aladdin?
questions.explanation: Alan Menken composed the scores and songs for The Little Mermaid, Beauty and the Beast, and Aladdin.

questions.question: In High School Musical, which song is the karaoke duet Troy and Gabriella first sing together?
questions.explanation: 'Start of Something New' is the karaoke duet where Troy and Gabriella first sing together on New Year's Eve.

questions.question: In Disney's Descendants (2015), which song do Mal and the villain kids sing while causing mischief?
questions.explanation: 'Rotten to the Core' introduces Mal, Evie, Jay, and Carlos as the mischievous children of famous villains.

questions.question: Which song opens Beauty and the Beast, introducing Belle's village?
questions.explanation: "Belle" is the opening number that introduces the bookish heroine and her small provincial town.

questions.question: Which Lion King villain sings the scheming song 'Be Prepared'?
questions.explanation: Scar sings "Be Prepared" to the hyenas while plotting to take the throne from Mufasa.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, which sea witch sings 'Poor Unfortunate Souls'?
questions.explanation: Ursula sings "Poor Unfortunate Souls" to convince Ariel to trade her voice for human legs.

questions.question: Which Princess and the Frog character sings 'Friends on the Other Side'?
questions.explanation: The shadow man Dr. Facilier sings "Friends on the Other Side" while tricking Naveen and Lawrence.

questions.question: Who sings the villain song 'Hellfire' in The Hunchback of Notre Dame?
questions.explanation: Judge Claude Frollo sings "Hellfire" while wrestling with his obsession with Esmeralda.

questions.question: In Tangled, who sings 'Mother Knows Best' to keep Rapunzel in her tower?
questions.explanation: Mother Gothel sings "Mother Knows Best" to frighten Rapunzel out of ever leaving the tower.

questions.question: In The Little Mermaid, which villain song does Ursula perform?
questions.explanation: 'Poor Unfortunate Souls' is the sea witch Ursula's menacing musical number.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, which tavern song praises the boastful hunter?
questions.explanation: The rowdy number 'Gaston' celebrates the vain villain at the tavern.

questions.question: Which demigod sings 'You're Welcome' while boasting to Moana?
questions.explanation: Maui sings "You're Welcome" to take credit for all the gifts he claims to have given humanity.

questions.question: Which giant crab sings the boastful villain song 'Shiny' in Moana?
questions.explanation: The treasure-hoarding crab Tamatoa sings "Shiny" while showing off his glittering shell.

questions.question: Which captain leads the training song 'I'll Make a Man Out of You' in Mulan?
questions.explanation: Captain Li Shang sings "I'll Make a Man Out of You" while training his army of recruits.

questions.question: Which trio of soldiers sings 'A Girl Worth Fighting For' alongside Mushu in Mulan?
answers: Shang, Chi Fu, and Shan Yu
Shan Yu, Chi Fu, and Mulan
questions.explanation: Soldiers Yao, Ling, and Chien Po sing "A Girl Worth Fighting For" while marching alongside Mushu.

questions.question: Which character sings both 'Friend Like Me' and 'Prince Ali' in Aladdin?
questions.explanation: The Genie performs both flashy showstoppers, "Friend Like Me" and "Prince Ali," for Aladdin.

questions.question: Which two characters sing the duet 'A Whole New World' on the magic carpet?
questions.explanation: Aladdin and Jasmine share the duet "A Whole New World" during their magic carpet ride.

questions.question: Which duet has Rapunzel and Flynn singing while watching floating lanterns?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel and Flynn share "I See the Light" as they watch lanterns rise from a boat in Tangled.

questions.question: Which duet has Anna and Hans singing about finishing each other's sentences?
answers: For the First Time in Forever
Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
questions.explanation: Anna and Hans sing "Love Is an Open Door" while flirting at the Arendelle coronation ball.

questions.question: Which reprise has Anna and Elsa singing together after Elsa's icy secret is revealed?
answers: For the First Time in Forever (Reprise)
Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
questions.explanation: Anna and Elsa duet in the reprise of "For the First Time in Forever" right after Elsa flees Arendelle.

questions.question: Which duet do Miguel and Hector perform at the Sunrise Spectacular talent show in Coco?
questions.explanation: Miguel and Hector duet on "Un Poco Loco" at the talent show in the Land of the Dead.

questions.question: Which duet has Tiana and Naveen, now frogs, singing about their strange new problem?
questions.explanation: Tiana and Naveen duet on "When We're Human" after both are transformed into frogs.

questions.question: Which song is heard first as a tender lullaby and later reprised as a mariachi showstopper in Coco?
questions.explanation: "Remember Me" appears as Hector's lullaby, Ernesto's stage number, and Miguel's finale duet in Coco.

questions.question: What is the title of the Encanto ensemble song that gossips about a missing uncle?
questions.explanation: "We Don't Talk About Bruno" is the ensemble number in which the Madrigal family gossips about Bruno.

questions.question: Which song is Luisa's solo about the pressure of holding her family together in Encanto?
questions.explanation: Luisa sings "Surface Pressure" about the strain of being seen as the family's strong one.

questions.question: Which song has Mirabel wishing for a magical gift of her own in Encanto?
questions.explanation: Mirabel sings "Waiting on a Miracle" while longing for a magic gift like the rest of her family.

questions.question: Which song opens Encanto as Mirabel introduces her family to local children?
questions.explanation: "The Family Madrigal" is the opening number in which Mirabel introduces her magical relatives.

questions.question: Which song has Moana resolving to sail beyond her island's reef to find Maui?
questions.explanation: Moana sings "How Far I'll Go" as she decides to leave her island in search of Maui.

questions.question: Which song introduces the village of Motunui early in Moana?
questions.explanation: "Where You Are" introduces Moana's home island and the community's traditional way of life.

questions.question: Which Frozen II song has Elsa following a mysterious singing voice?
questions.explanation: Elsa sings "Into the Unknown" as she's drawn toward a mysterious voice only she can hear.

questions.question: Which Frozen II song has Elsa discovering the source of the voice calling her?
questions.explanation: Elsa sings "Show Yourself" upon finally confronting the source of the mysterious voice.

questions.question: Which Frozen II song is Kristoff's power ballad backed by singing reindeer?
questions.explanation: Kristoff sings the 1980s-style power ballad "Lost in the Woods" after Anna wanders off without him.

questions.question: Which song opens Frozen II with the Arendelle family singing together?
questions.explanation: "Some Things Never Change" is the ensemble opening number of Frozen II.

questions.question: Which song has Tiana dreaming of opening her own restaurant?
questions.explanation: Tiana sings "Almost There" about her dream of opening a restaurant in The Princess and the Frog.

questions.question: Which song opens The Princess and the Frog and sets its New Orleans setting?
questions.explanation: "Down in New Orleans" is the opening number that establishes the film's setting and Tiana's dream.

questions.question: Which song has the muses recounting Hercules' rise to fame?
questions.explanation: The muses sing "Zero to Hero" to narrate Hercules' growing popularity as a monster-fighting hero.

questions.question: Which song has Meg denying her feelings for Hercules to a chorus of muses?
questions.explanation: Meg insists "I Won't Say (I'm in Love)" while the muses tease her about her true feelings.

questions.question: Which song has young Hercules dreaming of finding where he truly belongs?
questions.explanation: Young Hercules sings "Go the Distance" about his longing to discover where he belongs.

questions.question: Which Pocahontas song urges John Smith to see the natural world differently?
questions.explanation: Pocahontas sings "Colors of the Wind" to show John Smith a new perspective on nature.

questions.question: Which Pocahontas song has the heroine longing for what waits beyond the river?
questions.explanation: Pocahontas sings "Just Around the Riverbend" while questioning the path her life should take.

questions.question: Which Mulan song has the heroine questioning her identity while looking in a mirror?
questions.explanation: Mulan sings "Reflection" while struggling to reconcile who she is with what's expected of her.

questions.question: Which classic song has the Seven Dwarfs marching home from the mines?
questions.explanation: The Seven Dwarfs sing "Heigh-Ho" as they march home from a day of digging for jewels.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: Which Snow White song has the heroine cleaning the dwarfs' cottage with forest animals?
questions.explanation: Snow White sings "Whistle While You Work" while tidying the cottage with help from woodland animals.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: Which Jiminy Cricket song opens Pinocchio?
answers: When You Wish Upon a Star
questions.explanation: Jiminy Cricket sings "When You Wish Upon a Star" as the opening number of Pinocchio.

questions.question: Which song has the Fairy Godmother magically preparing Cinderella for the ball?
answers: A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes
questions.explanation: The Fairy Godmother sings "Bibbidi-Bobbidi-Boo" while conjuring Cinderella's gown and coach.

questions.question: Which bear sings 'The Bare Necessities' to Mowgli in The Jungle Book?
questions.explanation: Baloo the bear sings "The Bare Necessities" to teach Mowgli about a carefree jungle life.

questions.question: Which orangutan sings 'I Wanna Be Like You' to Mowgli?
questions.explanation: King Louie sings "I Wanna Be Like You" while trying to learn the secret of making fire.

questions.question: In The Jungle Book, which song do the vultures sing for Mowgli?
