questions.explanation: The four vultures perform 'That's What Friends Are For' to cheer up Mowgli.

questions.question: Which song has Mary Poppins turning nursery chores into a game?
questions.explanation: Mary Poppins sings "A Spoonful of Sugar" to make tidying the nursery feel like fun.

questions.question: In Mary Poppins, which song celebrates a very long made-up word?
questions.explanation: 'Supercalifragilisticexpialidocious' is a nonsense word meaning something wonderful.

questions.question: Which song has an alley cat and his band performing jazz for Duchess and her kittens?
answers: Ev'rybody Wants to Be a Cat
questions.explanation: Thomas O'Malley and his alley cat friends perform "Ev'rybody Wants to Be a Cat" in The Aristocats.

questions.question: Which song plays during Lady and Tramp's spaghetti dinner in the alley?
questions.explanation: "Bella Notte" is the romantic song heard during Lady and Tramp's famous spaghetti dinner.

questions.question: Which song has the dog Peggy singing about Tramp's reputation around town?
questions.explanation: Peggy the Pekingese sings "He's a Tramp" about the title character's roguish charm.

questions.question: Which song do the Mad Hatter and March Hare sing to celebrate an unbirthday?
answers: In a World of My Own
questions.explanation: The Mad Hatter and March Hare sing "The Unbirthday Song" to celebrate Alice's unbirthday.

questions.question: Which character sings the song 'Cruella De Vil' about the film's fur-loving villain?
questions.explanation: Roger writes and sings "Cruella De Vil" to poke fun at the fur-obsessed villainess.

questions.question: Which Sleeping Beauty song has Aurora and Prince Phillip singing before realizing they've met?
questions.explanation: Aurora and Phillip sing "Once Upon a Dream" in the forest, unaware they are already betrothed.

questions.question: Which song opens The Lion King as Rafiki presents newborn Simba to the animals?
answers: I Just Can't Wait to Be King
Can You Feel the Love Tonight
questions.explanation: "Circle of Life" opens The Lion King as Rafiki holds newborn Simba up at Pride Rock.

questions.question: Which song serves as the carefree philosophy Timon and Pumbaa teach young Simba?
answers: I Just Can't Wait to Be King
questions.explanation: "Hakuna Matata" becomes Simba's problem-free philosophy after Timon and Pumbaa take him in.

questions.question: Which song shows young Simba clashing with Zazu over his royal duties?
answers: I Just Can't Wait to Be King
questions.explanation: Young Simba pushes back against Zazu's rules in the song "I Just Can't Wait to Be King."

questions.question: The songs 'Be Prepared' and 'Circle of Life' both appear in which animated film?
questions.explanation: Both "Be Prepared" and "Circle of Life" are songs from Disney's The Lion King.

questions.question: The songs 'Poor Unfortunate Souls' and 'Part of Your World' both appear in which film?
questions.explanation: Both songs are from The Little Mermaid, sung by Ursula and Ariel respectively.

questions.question: The songs 'Be Our Guest' and 'Gaston' both appear in which animated film?
questions.explanation: Both "Be Our Guest" and "Gaston" are musical numbers from Beauty and the Beast.

questions.question: The songs 'We Don't Talk About Bruno' and 'Surface Pressure' both appear in which film?
questions.explanation: Both songs are from Encanto, featuring the Madrigal family's magical household.

questions.question: In Wish (2023), which song does Asha sing to the wishing star?
answers: When You Wish Upon a Star
A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes
questions.explanation: Asha, voiced by Ariana DeBose, sings 'This Wish' as she calls out to the star in Wish.

questions.question: In Toy Story 2, which melancholy song recounts Jessie being outgrown by her owner?
answers: You've Got a Friend in Me
questions.explanation: 'When She Loved Me,' performed by Sarah McLachlan, tells of Jessie's abandonment by her owner Emily.

questions.question: Which Little Mermaid song does Sebastian sing to convince Ariel that ocean life is best?
questions.explanation: Sebastian the crab sings 'Under the Sea,' which won the 1989 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

questions.question: Which Aladdin song has the hero dodging guards through Agrabah's marketplace?
questions.explanation: 'One Jump Ahead' introduces Aladdin as he evades guards while stealing bread in the marketplace.

questions.question: Which Tangled song has the pub ruffians revealing their softer aspirations?
questions.explanation: At the Snuggly Duckling, the thugs sing 'I've Got a Dream' about their hidden gentle ambitions.

questions.question: Which Hercules song has the Muses narrating the story in a gospel style?
questions.explanation: The Muses open the myth with 'The Gospel Truth,' framing the tale in soulful gospel harmonies.

questions.question: The tender lullaby 'Baby Mine' is featured in which Disney animated film?
questions.explanation: 'Baby Mine' plays in Dumbo as his mother cradles him with her trunk from behind bars.

questions.question: The Oscar-winning song 'Chim Chim Cher-ee' comes from which Disney film?
questions.explanation: Bert's chimney-sweep song 'Chim Chim Cher-ee' from Mary Poppins won the 1964 Best Original Song Oscar.

questions.question: Randy Newman's Oscar-winning song 'If I Didn't Have You' is from which Pixar film?
questions.explanation: 'If I Didn't Have You,' sung by Mike and Sulley, won the 2001 Best Original Song Academy Award.

questions.question: Dodger's upbeat song 'Why Should I Worry' appears in which Disney film?
questions.explanation: Billy Joel voiced Dodger, who sings 'Why Should I Worry' strutting through New York in Oliver & Company.

questions.question: The gentle song 'Best of Friends' is from which Disney animated film?
questions.explanation: 'Best of Friends,' sung by Big Mama, celebrates young Tod and Copper's bond in The Fox and the Hound.

questions.question: The marching song 'Following the Leader' is sung by the Lost Boys in which film?
questions.explanation: The Lost Boys, joined by John and Michael, sing 'Following the Leader' in Disney's Peter Pan.

questions.question: Which Hunchback of Notre Dame character sings 'God Help the Outcasts'?
questions.explanation: Esmeralda sings 'God Help the Outcasts' inside the cathedral, praying for the city's downtrodden.

questions.question: Which Princess and the Frog character sings the love song 'Ma Belle Evangeline'?
questions.explanation: Ray the Cajun firefly sings 'Ma Belle Evangeline' about his beloved, the evening star Evangeline.

questions.question: Which Oliver & Company character sings the diva number 'Perfect Isn't Easy'?
questions.explanation: Georgette the pampered poodle, voiced by Bette Midler, sings 'Perfect Isn't Easy' about her own glamour.

questions.question: Which Tangled character sings 'When Will My Life Begin' about longing to leave the tower?
questions.explanation: Rapunzel opens the film singing 'When Will My Life Begin' as she fills her days inside the tower.

questions.question: Which Hunchback of Notre Dame character sings 'Out There' about yearning to join the crowd?
questions.explanation: Quasimodo sings 'Out There' from the bell tower, dreaming of one day walking among the people of Paris.

questions.question: Which Sword in the Stone character sings the packing spell 'Higitus Figitus'?
questions.explanation: Merlin sings 'Higitus Figitus' to magically shrink his belongings into a bag before leaving his cottage.

questions.question: In Beauty and the Beast, which song marks Belle and the Beast warming to each other?
questions.explanation: 'Something There' has Belle and the Beast, plus the servants, noticing new feelings growing between them.

questions.question: Which Enchanted song does Giselle begin dreaming of romance, later joined by Prince Edward?
questions.explanation: 'True Love's Kiss' opens Enchanted's animated fairy tale as Giselle and Prince Edward sing together.

questions.question: Which Princess and the Frog song has Naveen, Tiana, and Louis imagining life once the spell breaks?
questions.explanation: 'When We're Human' has the frogs and the alligator Louis dreaming of their futures once they turn human.

questions.question: Which Lion King ballad accompanies adult Simba and Nala reuniting and falling in love?
answers: Can You Feel the Love Tonight
questions.explanation: 'Can You Feel the Love Tonight' plays as Simba and Nala rekindle romance, winning the 1994 song Oscar.

questions.question: Which Frozen song alternates between Anna's excitement and Elsa's dread before the coronation?
answers: Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
For the First Time in Forever
questions.explanation: 'For the First Time in Forever' contrasts Anna's eager anticipation with Elsa's anxiety over her powers.

questions.question: Which Cinderella song plays as Cinderella and the Prince waltz and fall in love?
answers: A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes
questions.explanation: 'So This Is Love' accompanies Cinderella and the Prince dancing together at the royal ball.

questions.question: Which Pocahontas song has Governor Ratcliffe obsessing over digging up gold?
questions.explanation: The greedy Governor Ratcliffe sings 'Mine, Mine, Mine' as his men tear up the land searching for gold.

questions.question: In The Great Mouse Detective, which song do the henchmen sing praising Professor Ratigan?
answers: Let Me Be Good to You
questions.explanation: Ratigan's thugs sing 'The World's Greatest Criminal Mind' flattering the villainous rat, voiced by Vincent Price.

questions.question: Which song does the python Kaa use to hypnotize Mowgli in The Jungle Book?
questions.explanation: Kaa the snake sings 'Trust in Me' while coiling around Mowgli and lulling him into a hypnotic trance.

questions.question: Which villain song does King Magnifico perform in Wish (2023)?
answers: This Is the Thanks I Get?!
questions.explanation: King Magnifico sings 'This Is the Thanks I Get?!' as he turns fully to villainy in Wish.

questions.question: In Aladdin, which sinister reprise does Jafar sing while exposing Aladdin as a fraud?
questions.explanation: Jafar sings the mocking 'Prince Ali (Reprise)' as he reveals Aladdin's true identity as a street urchin.

questions.question: Which villain sings a gambling-themed song in The Nightmare Before Christmas?
questions.explanation: Oogie Boogie sings his boastful, casino-flavored 'Oogie Boogie's Song' after capturing Santa Claus.

questions.question: Which shanty opens The Little Mermaid aboard Prince Eric's sailing ship?
questions.explanation: 'Fathoms Below' is sung by sailors on Eric's ship at the very start of The Little Mermaid.

questions.question: Which song opens Aladdin as a peddler introduces the city of Agrabah?
questions.explanation: 'Arabian Nights' opens Aladdin, sung by a traveling peddler who introduces the desert city of Agrabah.

questions.question: Which song opens The Hunchback of Notre Dame, narrated by Clopin the gypsy?
questions.explanation: Clopin narrates 'The Bells of Notre Dame,' recounting how baby Quasimodo came to live in the cathedral.

questions.question: Which work song opens Frozen as ice harvesters cut blocks from a frozen lake?
answers: Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
questions.explanation: 'Frozen Heart' opens the film as ice harvesters, including young Kristoff, saw ice from the lake.

questions.question: Which cheerful song opens Disney's Robin Hood as the rooster minstrel strolls along?
questions.explanation: Alan-a-Dale the rooster, voiced by Roger Miller, opens Robin Hood with the tune 'Oo-De-Lally.'

questions.question: Which Phil Collins song opens Tarzan, introducing the gorilla family and the humans?
questions.explanation: 'Two Worlds' opens Tarzan, drawing a parallel between the gorilla family and the shipwrecked human family.

questions.question: Who wrote the original songs for the fictional boy band 4*Town in Turning Red?
questions.explanation: Billie Eilish and her brother Finneas O'Connell wrote 4*Town's original songs for Pixar's Turning Red.

questions.question: Which duo wrote the songs for Disney's 1994 animated The Lion King?
questions.explanation: Elton John composed the music and Tim Rice wrote the lyrics for the 1994 animated The Lion King.

questions.question: Which songwriter wrote and performed Tarzan's Oscar-winning song 'You'll Be in My Heart'?
questions.explanation: Phil Collins wrote and performed 'You'll Be in My Heart,' which won the 1999 Best Original Song Oscar.

questions.question: Which songwriting brothers wrote the songs for Mary Poppins and The Jungle Book?
questions.explanation: Richard and Robert Sherman, the Sherman Brothers, wrote songs for Mary Poppins and The Jungle Book.

questions.question: Which married team wrote Coco's 'Remember Me,' having also written 'Let It Go'?
questions.explanation: Kristen Anderson-Lopez and Robert Lopez wrote 'Remember Me' for Coco and 'Let It Go' for Frozen.

questions.question: Which composer wrote the original songs for both Moana (2016) and Encanto?
questions.explanation: Lin-Manuel Miranda wrote the songs for both Moana (2016) and Encanto for Walt Disney Animation Studios.

questions.question: 'Colors of the Wind' won the Best Original Song Oscar for which 1995 Disney film?
questions.explanation: 'Colors of the Wind' from Pocahontas won the 1995 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

questions.question: Which 1992 Disney film's love theme won the Oscar for Best Original Song?
questions.explanation: 'A Whole New World' from Aladdin won the 1992 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

questions.question: 'Under the Sea' won the Best Original Song Oscar for which 1989 Disney film?
questions.explanation: 'Under the Sea' from The Little Mermaid won the 1989 Academy Award for Best Original Song.

questions.question: In the animated Mulan, which song accompanies Mulan being prepared to meet the Matchmaker?
questions.explanation: 'Honor to Us All' plays as the women bathe and dress Mulan to impress the village Matchmaker.

questions.question: Which festival song does Clopin lead during the Feast of Fools in Hunchback of Notre Dame?
questions.explanation: Clopin leads 'Topsy Turvy' during the raucous Feast of Fools celebration in the Paris square.

questions.question: Which Frozen song has young Anna repeatedly asking Elsa to play as they grow apart?
answers: For the First Time in Forever
Do You Want to Build a Snowman?
questions.explanation: 'Do You Want to Build a Snowman?' shows Anna growing up calling to a closed-off Elsa over the years.

questions.question: In Encanto, which song has Isabela discovering she can grow more than perfect flowers?
questions.explanation: In 'What Else Can I Do?' Isabela realizes she can create wild, imperfect plants beyond tidy roses.

questions.question: Which Moana song celebrates the wayfinding voyages of Moana's seafaring ancestors?
questions.explanation: 'We Know the Way' honors the ancestors' ocean voyages, sung partly in Tokelauan and Samoan.

questions.question: Which Coco song does Miguel sing to reunite with his family in the finale?
questions.explanation: 'Proud Corazón' is Miguel's joyful finale number celebrating his family and Mexican heritage.

questions.question: Which Frozen II song does Anna sing alone in despair, resolving to carry on?
questions.explanation: Believing Elsa lost, Anna sings 'The Next Right Thing,' vowing to take one small step forward.

questions.question: In Pinocchio, which song does Jiminy Cricket sing advising Pinocchio to heed his conscience?
answers: When You Wish Upon a Star
questions.explanation: Jiminy Cricket sings 'Give a Little Whistle,' telling Pinocchio to call on him when temptation strikes.

questions.question: Which song does Cinderella sing at the film's start about holding on to hope?
answers: A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes
questions.explanation: Cinderella opens the film singing 'A Dream Is a Wish Your Heart Makes' as she wakes and dresses.

questions.question: Which Snow White song expresses the heroine's hope for finding true love?
questions.explanation: Snow White sings 'Someday My Prince Will Come' to the dwarfs, dreaming her true love will arrive.
questions.sourceTitle: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs

questions.question: Which Dumbo song plays during a surreal, dreamlike hallucination sequence?
answers: When I See an Elephant Fly
questions.explanation: 'Pink Elephants on Parade' plays during Dumbo's woozy hallucination after he accidentally drinks alcohol.

questions.question: Which Peter Pan song accompanies the children flying to Never Land on pixie dust?
answers: The Second Star to the Right
You Can Fly! You Can Fly! You Can Fly!
questions.explanation: 'You Can Fly!' plays as Peter sprinkles pixie dust and the Darling children soar over London.

questions.question: In The Aristocats, which song do the kittens practice at the piano with their mother?
answers: Ev'rybody Wants to Be a Cat
questions.explanation: The kittens Marie, Berlioz, and Toulouse practice 'Scales and Arpeggios' with Duchess at the piano.

questions.question: Which Howard Ashman song, cut from the 1992 film Aladdin, later appeared in the Broadway musical?
questions.explanation: 'Proud of Your Boy,' by Menken and Ashman, was dropped from the 1992 film but featured in the stage Aladdin.

questions.question: Which pop star recorded the end-credits version of 'Let It Go' for Frozen (2013)?
questions.explanation: Demi Lovato performed the pop end-credits 'Let It Go'; Idina Menzel sang the version heard in the film.

questions.question: In the Marvel Cinematic Universe, what is Tony Stark's superhero alter ego?
questions.explanation: Tony Stark builds a suit of powered armor and becomes the hero known as Iron Man.

questions.question: What is Steve Rogers' superhero identity in the MCU?
questions.explanation: After receiving the Super Soldier Serum, Steve Rogers becomes Captain America.

questions.question: What is the name of Thor's iconic hammer?
questions.explanation: Thor wields an enchanted hammer called Mjolnir, forged from the heart of a dying star.

questions.question: Which scientist transforms into the Hulk when he becomes angry?
questions.explanation: Bruce Banner is a brilliant scientist whose gamma radiation exposure causes him to turn into the Hulk.

questions.question: What is Natasha Romanoff's superhero codename?
questions.explanation: Natasha Romanoff is a highly trained spy and Avenger known as Black Widow.

questions.question: Which skilled archer is known as Hawkeye?
questions.explanation: Clint Barton is a master marksman who fights alongside the Avengers as Hawkeye.

questions.question: Who leads S.H.I.E.L.D. and is known for his signature eyepatch?
questions.explanation: Nick Fury directs S.H.I.E.L.D. and is instantly recognizable by his black eyepatch.

questions.question: Which villain seeks to collect all six Infinity Stones?
questions.explanation: Thanos hunts down all six Infinity Stones so he can wipe out half of all life.

questions.question: Who is known throughout the MCU as the God of Mischief?
questions.explanation: Loki, Thor's adopted brother, is famous for his trickery and is called the God of Mischief.

questions.question: Which villain did Tony Stark and Bruce Banner accidentally create?
questions.explanation: Stark and Banner's peacekeeping AI experiment goes wrong, giving rise to the villain Ultron.

questions.question: In which 2012 film do Earth's mightiest heroes first assemble as a team?
questions.explanation: The Avengers unites Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, and others as a team for the first time.

questions.question: What is Peter Parker's superhero name?
questions.explanation: Peter Parker gains spider-like abilities and fights crime as the web-slinging Spider-Man.

questions.question: T'Challa rules which African nation as Black Panther?
questions.explanation: T'Challa is both the king and protector of the technologically advanced nation of Wakanda.

questions.question: What title does Stephen Strange eventually earn among sorcerers?
questions.explanation: After mastering the mystic arts, Stephen Strange becomes Earth's Sorcerer Supreme.

questions.question: Which hero uses a mechanical wing-suit to fly into battle?
questions.explanation: Sam Wilson uses a specialized flight suit with mechanical wings to fight as Falcon.

questions.question: Carol Danvers is known by which superhero name?
questions.explanation: Carol Danvers gains cosmic powers and becomes the hero known as Captain Marvel.

questions.question: Which small, tree-like being often says "I am Groot"?
questions.explanation: Groot is a tree-like alien Guardian famous for repeating the phrase "I am Groot."

questions.question: What kind of animal is Rocket, a member of the Guardians of the Galaxy?
questions.explanation: Rocket is a genetically and cybernetically enhanced raccoon who is a skilled marksman.

questions.question: What is Peter Quill's outlaw nickname among the Guardians?
questions.explanation: Peter Quill, leader of the Guardians of the Galaxy, prefers to be called Star-Lord.

questions.question: Gamora is the adopted daughter of which villain?
questions.explanation: Gamora was taken in and raised by Thanos after he destroyed much of her homeworld.

questions.question: Which Guardian speaks very literally and takes great pride in battle?
questions.explanation: Drax the Destroyer is known for taking figures of speech completely literally.

questions.question: Nebula is the sister of which fellow Guardian of the Galaxy?
questions.explanation: Nebula and Gamora were both adopted and raised as daughters of Thanos.

questions.question: Wanda Maximoff becomes known by which superhero name?
questions.explanation: Wanda Maximoff wields powerful reality-bending magic as the Scarlet Witch.

questions.question: Vision was created using which Infinity Stone?
questions.explanation: Vision is brought to life using the Mind Stone combined with Stark's synthetic body technology.

questions.question: Sam Wilson's superhero identity before becoming Captain America is what?
questions.explanation: Sam Wilson fights as Falcon for years before later taking up the mantle of Captain America.

questions.question: Bucky Barnes is also known in the MCU by which codename?
questions.explanation: Bucky Barnes is captured and brainwashed by Hydra, becoming the assassin known as the Winter Soldier.

questions.question: How many Infinity Stones exist in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
questions.explanation: There are six Infinity Stones: Space, Mind, Reality, Power, Time, and Soul.

questions.question: Tony Stark first builds his Iron Man armor while held captive where?
questions.explanation: Tony Stark constructs his first suit of armor to escape captivity in a cave in Afghanistan.

questions.question: What rare metal is Captain America's shield primarily made from?
questions.explanation: Captain America's iconic round shield is forged from the rare metal vibranium.

questions.question: Which realm is Thor's home in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
questions.explanation: Thor hails from Asgard, a realm of powerful beings ruled by his father, Odin.

questions.question: The Avengers first fight together against an alien invasion in which city?
questions.explanation: The Avengers unite to defend New York City from an invading alien army called the Chitauri.

questions.question: Ultron's rise and the Avengers' battle against him is centered in which nation?
questions.explanation: The fictional Eastern European nation of Sokovia is the setting for Ultron's final plan.

questions.question: What does Thanos do at the end of Avengers: Infinity War?
answers: Snaps his fingers to erase half of all life
questions.explanation: Using the completed Infinity Gauntlet, Thanos snaps his fingers and erases half of all living beings.

questions.question: How does Tony Stark ultimately defeat Thanos in Avengers: Endgame?
answers: He traps him in the Quantum Realm
He destroys the Gauntlet with his shield
He banishes him to another realm
He uses the Infinity Stones himself
questions.explanation: Tony Stark claims the Infinity Stones and snaps his fingers, sacrificing himself to defeat Thanos.

questions.question: Who is Peter Parker's guardian and aunt in the MCU films?
questions.explanation: Peter Parker lives with and is raised by his Aunt May after his parents' deaths.

questions.question: Who serves as Tony Stark's loyal driver and bodyguard?
questions.explanation: Happy Hogan works as Tony Stark's dependable head of security and driver.

questions.question: Who runs Stark Industries as CEO and is Tony Stark's love interest?
questions.explanation: Pepper Potts serves as Tony Stark's assistant, eventually becoming CEO of Stark Industries.

questions.question: Which S.H.I.E.L.D. agent often works closely alongside Nick Fury?
questions.explanation: Maria Hill is a trusted S.H.I.E.L.D. agent who frequently assists Nick Fury.

questions.question: Loki's scepter, used in the Battle of New York, secretly contains what?
questions.explanation: Loki's scepter is later revealed to be hiding the Mind Stone inside it.

questions.question: Hela, who claims the Asgardian throne in Thor: Ragnarok, is Thor's what?
questions.explanation: Hela is revealed to be Thor and Loki's long-imprisoned older sister, the Goddess of Death.

questions.question: Which Asgardian warrior joins Thor and later leads New Asgard?
questions.explanation: Valkyrie becomes a key ally to Thor and eventually rules over New Asgard.

questions.question: Who guards the Bifrost Bridge in Asgard?
questions.explanation: Heimdall stands watch as the all-seeing guardian of the Bifrost Bridge.

questions.question: Odin serves in which role in Asgard?
questions.explanation: Odin is the ruling king of Asgard and the father of Thor and Loki.

questions.question: What is the rainbow-colored bridge connecting Asgard to other realms called?
questions.explanation: The Bifrost is a magical bridge that allows travel between Asgard and other realms.

questions.question: Which Ravager captain raised Peter Quill after taking him from Earth?
questions.explanation: Yondu Udonta, leader of a band of Ravagers, raised Peter Quill after abducting him as a child.

questions.question: Peter Quill discovers his biological father is which powerful being?
questions.explanation: Peter Quill learns that his real father is Ego, a Celestial with reality-shaping power.

questions.question: Erik Killmonger, the main antagonist of Black Panther, is T'Challa's what?
questions.explanation: Erik Killmonger is revealed to be T'Challa's estranged cousin seeking the Wakandan throne.

questions.question: Who is T'Challa's brilliant younger sister and inventor of Wakandan technology?
questions.explanation: Shuri is a genius inventor who designs much of Wakanda's advanced technology.

questions.question: Okoye leads which elite Wakandan warrior unit?
questions.explanation: Okoye commands the Dora Milaje, an elite unit of all-female Wakandan warriors.

questions.question: Who is the leader of the Jabari tribe who challenges T'Challa for the throne?
questions.explanation: M'Baku leads the mountain-dwelling Jabari tribe and formally challenges T'Challa for the crown.

questions.question: Who is Doctor Strange's loyal friend and fellow sorcerer at the Sanctum?
questions.explanation: Wong is a skilled sorcerer and librarian who becomes a steadfast ally to Doctor Strange.

questions.question: Who trains Stephen Strange in the mystic arts at Kamar-Taj?
questions.explanation: The Ancient One is the powerful sorcerer who teaches Stephen Strange at Kamar-Taj.

questions.question: Which object worn by Doctor Strange contains the Time Stone?
questions.explanation: The Eye of Agamotto, worn as an amulet, secretly houses the Time Stone.

questions.question: Hank Pym is the original hero to use which superhero identity?
questions.explanation: Hank Pym invented the size-changing suit and was the original Ant-Man.

questions.question: Hope van Dyne becomes which size-changing superhero?
questions.explanation: Hope van Dyne dons a winged suit to fight crime as the Wasp.

questions.question: Where was Janet van Dyne trapped for decades before being rescued?
questions.explanation: Janet van Dyne became stranded in the microscopic Quantum Realm for thirty years.

questions.question: Ronan the Accuser is a fanatical enemy from which alien empire?
questions.explanation: Ronan the Accuser is a radical extremist from the militant Kree empire.

questions.question: Which mysterious figure collects rare artifacts, including an Infinity Stone?
questions.explanation: The Collector maintains a museum of rare relics and briefly holds an Infinity Stone.

questions.question: Red Skull, an early Captain America villain, leads which organization?
questions.explanation: Red Skull commands Hydra, a ruthless science division within the Nazi regime.

questions.question: Which secret organization is revealed to have infiltrated S.H.I.E.L.D.?
questions.explanation: Hydra is exposed as having secretly operated within S.H.I.E.L.D. for decades.

questions.question: Who is Steve Rogers' romantic interest and a founder of S.H.I.E.L.D.?
questions.explanation: Peggy Carter falls for Steve Rogers during World War II and later helps found S.H.I.E.L.D.

questions.question: Pietro Maximoff, Wanda's twin brother, has which superhero codename?
questions.explanation: Pietro Maximoff is Wanda's super-speed twin brother, known as Quicksilver.

questions.question: Baron Zemo manipulates the Avengers into fighting each other in which film?
questions.explanation: Baron Zemo secretly manipulates events that turn the Avengers against one another.

questions.question: The Sokovia Accords, a key plot point in Civil War, aim to do what?
questions.explanation: The Sokovia Accords are a set of laws intended to place superhumans under government oversight.

questions.question: Adrian Toomes is the true identity of which Spider-Man villain?
questions.explanation: Adrian Toomes uses a winged flight suit to commit crimes as the Vulture.

questions.question: Quentin Beck deceives Peter Parker while posing as which illusion-based hero?
questions.explanation: Quentin Beck uses elaborate illusions to trick people while posing as the hero Mysterio.

questions.question: What does Rocket use to help Baby Groot dance in a memorable scene?
questions.explanation: Rocket plays music on a small radio so Baby Groot can dance during the scene.

questions.question: Which Guardian can sense and manipulate others' emotions by touch?
questions.explanation: Mantis is an empath who can read and influence emotions simply by touching someone.

questions.question: In WandaVision, Wanda creates an alternate sitcom reality centered on which town?
questions.explanation: Wanda unknowingly traps the town of Westview inside a magical sitcom-style reality.

questions.question: In the series Loki, what does the acronym TVA stand for?
questions.explanation: The TVA, or Time Variance Authority, monitors the timeline and prunes variant branches.

questions.question: Who is the wisecracking TVA agent who works closely with Loki in his series?
questions.explanation: Mobius M. Mobius is the TVA agent who recruits and partners with Loki.

questions.question: Sylvie, a key character in Loki, is revealed to be what?
questions.explanation: Sylvie is revealed to be another variant of Loki from a divergent timeline.

questions.question: In Hawkeye, which young archer trains alongside Clint Barton?
questions.explanation: Kate Bishop is a talented young archer who teams up with Clint Barton in the series.

questions.question: Which crime boss appears as a main villain in the Hawkeye series?
questions.explanation: Wilson Fisk, also known as Kingpin, appears as a powerful crime boss in Hawkeye.

questions.question: Marc Spector is the alter ego of which Disney+ superhero?
questions.explanation: Marc Spector shares his body with other identities and fights as Moon Knight.

questions.question: Kamala Khan is the teenage hero known by which superhero name?
questions.explanation: Kamala Khan is a New Jersey teenager who becomes the superhero Ms. Marvel.

questions.question: Jennifer Walters becomes which green-skinned superhero?
questions.explanation: Jennifer Walters gains Hulk-like powers from her cousin Bruce Banner's blood and becomes She-Hulk.

questions.question: The animated series What If...? explores stories set across which concept?
questions.explanation: What If...? imagines alternate universes where key MCU events unfold differently.

questions.question: In Black Widow, who is introduced as Natasha's adoptive "sister"?
questions.explanation: Yelena Belova was raised alongside Natasha Romanoff as part of a covert Russian family unit.

questions.question: In Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness, which teenager can travel between universes?
questions.explanation: America Chavez has the ability to punch star-shaped portals into other universes.
questions.sourceTitle: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness

questions.question: Kang the Conqueror is introduced as a major threat during which MCU era?
questions.explanation: Kang the Conqueror emerges as a central multiversal threat during the Multiverse Saga.

questions.question: What is Thanos' home planet, shown as a barren wasteland?
questions.explanation: Thanos comes from Titan, a once-thriving planet left desolate by overpopulation.

questions.question: Which planet is home to the peacekeeping Nova Corps?
questions.explanation: Xandar is the home planet protected by the intergalactic peacekeeping force, the Nova Corps.

questions.question: Knowhere, a location visited in Guardians of the Galaxy, is built inside what?
questions.explanation: Knowhere is a mining colony built inside the severed head of an ancient Celestial being.

questions.question: What is the name of Thanos' massive starship seen in Infinity War?
questions.explanation: Thanos commands a massive warship called Sanctuary II during his search for the Infinity Stones.

questions.question: The Quantum Realm, key to the Endgame time heist, is what kind of place?
questions.explanation: The Quantum Realm is a strange subatomic dimension reached by shrinking down in size.

questions.question: What are the tiny particles that let Ant-Man shrink and grow called?
questions.explanation: Pym Particles, discovered by Hank Pym, allow a person or object to shrink or grow.

questions.question: The Tesseract, fought over in several MCU films, houses which Infinity Stone?
questions.explanation: The Tesseract is a glowing cube that contains the powerful Space Stone.

questions.question: The Aether, sought by Malekith in Thor: The Dark World, is later revealed as which stone?
questions.explanation: The mysterious substance called the Aether is later identified as the Reality Stone.

questions.question: A meteorite made of which metal crashed into Wakanda long ago?
questions.explanation: A vibranium meteorite struck ancient Wakanda, shaping the nation's advanced technology.

questions.question: James Rhodes fights alongside Tony Stark in which armored persona?
questions.explanation: James Rhodes pilots his own suit of armor as the hero War Machine.

questions.question: Nakia, a key Wakandan character, primarily serves in which role?
questions.explanation: Nakia works as a Wakandan War Dog, an undercover spy operating outside the kingdom.

questions.question: General Thaddeus Ross pursues the Hulk and later becomes what U.S. official?
questions.explanation: Thaddeus Ross later becomes the U.S. Secretary of State after his time hunting the Hulk.

questions.question: Which loud, friendly Asgardian warrior fights alongside Thor on Sakaar?
questions.explanation: Korg is a rock-like warrior who befriends Thor while both are held captive on Sakaar.

questions.question: What is the name of Thor's axe, forged on Nidavellir in Infinity War?
questions.explanation: Thor has the axe Stormbreaker forged on Nidavellir to help defeat Thanos.

questions.question: In Captain America: The First Avenger, Steve Rogers is transformed by what?
questions.explanation: Steve Rogers is transformed into a super soldier after receiving an experimental serum.

questions.question: Only those who are "worthy" can lift which Asgardian weapon?
questions.explanation: Mjolnir is enchanted so that only those deemed worthy are able to lift it.

questions.question: What is the team name for Star-Lord, Gamora, Rocket, Groot, and Drax?
questions.explanation: Star-Lord, Gamora, Rocket, Groot, and Drax band together as the Guardians of the Galaxy.

questions.question: Which Earth-based superhero team includes Iron Man, Thor, and Captain America?
questions.explanation: Iron Man, Thor, and Captain America are founding members of the superhero team the Avengers.

questions.question: At the end of Avengers: Endgame, Steve Rogers passes his shield to whom?
questions.explanation: An elderly Steve Rogers hands his iconic shield to Sam Wilson, passing on the Captain America mantle.

questions.question: Which 2008 film launched the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
questions.explanation: Iron Man, released in 2008, was the first film in the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

questions.question: Which two Avengers films together conclude the MCU's Infinity Saga?
questions.explanation: Avengers: Infinity War and Avengers: Endgame form the two-part climax that closes the Infinity Saga.

questions.question: In Iron Man's post-credits scene, who mentions the Avenger Initiative to Tony Stark?
questions.explanation: Nick Fury appears at the end of Iron Man to tell Tony Stark about the Avenger Initiative.

questions.question: Which villain, obsessed with balancing the universe, drives the Infinity Saga's story?
questions.explanation: Thanos, seeking to erase half of all life for 'balance,' is the central antagonist of the Infinity Saga.

questions.question: Which set of colorful, powerful gems is central to the Infinity Saga?
questions.explanation: The six Infinity Stones are the powerful gems Thanos seeks throughout the Infinity Saga.

questions.question: What is the glowing blue cube fought over in several early MCU films called?
questions.explanation: The Tesseract is the glowing blue cube fought over across multiple MCU films.

questions.question: Phase One of the MCU builds toward which 2012 team-up film?
questions.explanation: Phase One's solo films led up to 2012's The Avengers, the first big MCU team-up.

questions.question: Which 2019 film was the final release of the MCU's Infinity Saga?
questions.explanation: Spider-Man: Far From Home was released after Endgame as the closing film of the Infinity Saga.

questions.question: The MCU stories after Avengers: Endgame are grouped into which saga?
questions.explanation: The films and series following Endgame make up the Multiverse Saga.
questions.sourceTitle: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness

questions.question: Which 2021 Spider-Man film opened the multiverse by bringing back past villains?
questions.explanation: Spider-Man: No Way Home cracked open the multiverse, returning villains from earlier Spider-Man films.

questions.question: In No Way Home, whose spell goes wrong and cracks open the multiverse?
questions.explanation: Doctor Strange's memory spell is disrupted by Peter, tearing open the multiverse in No Way Home.

questions.question: Which time-controlling villain is a central threat of the Multiverse Saga?
questions.explanation: Kang the Conqueror, a master of time and the multiverse, is a major villain of the Multiverse Saga.

questions.question: In Quantumania, the Ant-Man family becomes trapped in which realm?
questions.explanation: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania sends the Lang and Pym families into the Quantum Realm.

questions.question: Which 2022 film sends Doctor Strange traveling across the multiverse?
answers: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
questions.explanation: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness follows Strange across different universes.
questions.sourceTitle: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness

questions.question: In Multiverse of Madness, which corrupting spellbook does Wanda use?
questions.explanation: Wanda draws on the evil Darkhold to fuel her dark magic in Multiverse of Madness.
questions.sourceTitle: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness

questions.question: In Thor: Love and Thunder, which villain vows to kill all gods?
questions.explanation: Gorr the God Butcher seeks to destroy every god in Thor: Love and Thunder.

questions.question: In The Avengers, who leads the alien invasion of Earth?
questions.explanation: Loki commands the Chitauri army invading New York in The Avengers.

questions.question: In the Marvel Cinematic Universe, what color is the Hulk's skin?
questions.explanation: The Hulk is famous for his bright green skin in the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

questions.question: Which Avenger wears a red, white, and blue uniform marked with a star?
questions.explanation: Captain America wears a patriotic red, white, and blue uniform bearing a white star.

questions.question: In Age of Ultron, which new synthetic hero is created to help the Avengers?
questions.explanation: Vision is the synthetic being brought to life to aid the Avengers in Age of Ultron.

questions.question: In The Avengers, the team's tower headquarters stands in which city?
questions.explanation: Stark Tower, the Avengers' base in the 2012 film, is located in New York City.

questions.question: Which rallying command does Captain America give in Endgame's final battle?
questions.explanation: Captain America shouts 'Avengers assemble' to rally the heroes in Endgame's climax.

questions.question: In Endgame, the Avengers travel through time to retrieve what?
questions.explanation: The Avengers' time heist aims to gather the Infinity Stones from the past to undo Thanos' snap.

questions.question: How many original members make up the Avengers in the 2012 film?
questions.explanation: The original team has six members: Iron Man, Captain America, Thor, Hulk, Black Widow, and Hawkeye.

questions.question: In Spider-Man: Homecoming, who builds Peter Parker an advanced high-tech suit?
questions.explanation: Tony Stark designs and gives Peter Parker his advanced Spider-Man suit in Homecoming.

questions.question: Scott Lang fights crime as which size-changing superhero?
questions.explanation: Scott Lang takes on the identity of Ant-Man, using a suit that shrinks and grows.

questions.question: Which hero swings between buildings using strands of webbing?
questions.explanation: Spider-Man travels the city by swinging on webs he shoots from his wrists.

questions.question: In Captain Marvel, how does Carol Danvers first gain her powers?
questions.explanation: Carol Danvers absorbs energy when a powerful engine core explodes, granting her cosmic powers.

questions.question: What was Stephen Strange's profession before he became a sorcerer?
questions.explanation: Stephen Strange was a brilliant surgeon before a car crash led him to the mystic arts.

questions.question: Shang-Chi is a master of which skill?
questions.explanation: Shang-Chi is an extraordinary martial artist trained in hand-to-hand combat.
questions.sourceTitle: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings

questions.question: In the MCU, Thor is the god of what?
questions.explanation: Thor is the Asgardian God of Thunder, able to summon lightning and storms.

questions.question: Bruce Banner transforms into the Hulk when he feels which emotion?
questions.explanation: Bruce Banner changes into the Hulk when he becomes angry or highly stressed.

questions.question: In the MCU, Peter Parker lives in which New York City borough?
questions.explanation: Peter Parker is a teenager from Queens in Spider-Man: Homecoming.

questions.question: Which villain wears the Infinity Gauntlet to snap away half of all life?
questions.explanation: Thanos dons the Infinity Gauntlet and snaps his fingers to erase half of all life.

questions.question: In Iron Man, which business partner betrays Tony Stark?
questions.explanation: Obadiah Stane, Tony's business partner, turns against him as the villain Iron Monger.

questions.question: In Iron Man 2, which vengeful scientist attacks with electric whips?
questions.explanation: Ivan Vanko, known as Whiplash, fights Iron Man using energy whips in Iron Man 2.

questions.question: In Iron Man 3, who is the true mastermind behind the Mandarin?
questions.explanation: Aldrich Killian is revealed as the real villain behind the actor posing as the Mandarin.

questions.question: In Thor: Ragnarok, which goddess of death seizes Asgard's throne?
questions.explanation: Hela, the goddess of death, claims Asgard's throne in Thor: Ragnarok.

questions.question: In Thor: The Dark World, which dark elf seeks the Aether?
questions.explanation: Malekith, leader of the dark elves, hunts the powerful Aether in Thor: The Dark World.

questions.question: In Black Panther, which arms dealer steals Wakandan vibranium?
questions.explanation: Ulysses Klaue is the black-market arms dealer who smuggles stolen Wakandan vibranium.

questions.question: In Shang-Chi, which criminal organization does the villain lead?
questions.explanation: Wenwu leads the ancient Ten Rings organization in Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings.
questions.sourceTitle: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings

questions.question: In The Avengers, Loki commands which alien army?
questions.explanation: Loki leads the Chitauri army during the Battle of New York in The Avengers.

questions.question: In Captain Marvel, which shape-shifting alien race is led by Talos?
questions.explanation: Talos leads the Skrulls, a race able to shape-shift into anyone, in Captain Marvel.

questions.question: In Spider-Man: Homecoming, which best friend discovers Peter's secret identity?
questions.explanation: Ned Leeds catches Peter in his suit and becomes his enthusiastic 'guy in the chair.'

questions.question: What is the name of Tony Stark's helpful AI assistant in the early films?
questions.explanation: J.A.R.V.I.S. is Tony Stark's original artificial intelligence assistant.

questions.question: In Black Panther, who is T'Challa's mother and the queen of Wakanda?
questions.explanation: Ramonda is T'Challa and Shuri's mother and the Queen Mother of Wakanda.

questions.question: In Doctor Strange, which sorcerer guards the Hong Kong Sanctum?
questions.explanation: Wong is the master sorcerer and librarian associated with the sanctums in Doctor Strange.

questions.question: In the MCU Spider-Man films, what is the real name of Peter's crush, MJ?
questions.explanation: MJ's full name is Michelle Jones, Peter Parker's classmate and love interest.

questions.question: In the Ant-Man films, what is the name of Scott Lang's young daughter?
questions.explanation: Cassie Lang is Scott Lang's beloved daughter in the Ant-Man films.

questions.question: In Captain Marvel, what is the name of Carol Danvers' cat, secretly a Flerken?
questions.explanation: Goose appears to be an ordinary cat but is actually an alien Flerken in Captain Marvel.

questions.question: In Captain America: Civil War, the Avengers split into sides led by whom?
questions.explanation: In Civil War the team divides between Iron Man's and Captain America's opposing sides.

questions.question: Which group of magic-users protects Earth from mystical threats out of Kamar-Taj?
answers: The Masters of the Mystic Arts
questions.explanation: The Masters of the Mystic Arts train at Kamar-Taj to defend Earth from magical dangers.

questions.question: In The Falcon and the Winter Soldier, which duo teams up to stop the Flag Smashers?
questions.explanation: Sam Wilson and Bucky Barnes reluctantly partner to confront the Flag Smashers.
questions.sourceTitle: The Falcon and the Winter Soldier

questions.question: Which team of antiheroes forms in the film Thunderbolts*?
questions.explanation: The film Thunderbolts* assembles a group of antiheroes into the team called the Thunderbolts.

questions.question: In Black Panther, the Dora Milaje serve as bodyguards to whom?
questions.explanation: The all-female Dora Milaje warriors protect the king and throne of Wakanda.

questions.question: Which spy organization opposes HYDRA and employs the early Avengers?
questions.explanation: S.H.I.E.L.D., led by Nick Fury, coordinates the early Avengers and battles HYDRA.

questions.question: In Eternals, the immortal team was sent to Earth to fight which creatures?
questions.explanation: The Eternals were sent to protect humanity from the monstrous Deviants.

questions.question: Which band of space scavengers does Yondu captain?
questions.explanation: Yondu leads a crew of Ravagers, the roaming space scavengers who raised Peter Quill.

questions.question: After Asgard is lost, Thor's people rebuild their home on Earth and call it what?
questions.explanation: The surviving Asgardians settle in Norway and name their town New Asgard.

questions.question: On which junk-covered planet does Thor land in Thor: Ragnarok?
questions.explanation: Thor crash-lands on the garbage planet Sakaar, ruled by the Grandmaster, in Ragnarok.

questions.question: In Infinity War, the Soul Stone is hidden on which planet?
questions.explanation: The Soul Stone is kept on the distant planet Vormir, guarded by Red Skull.

questions.question: In Doctor Strange, Kamar-Taj, where sorcerers train, sits near which city?
questions.explanation: Kamar-Taj, the sorcerers' training temple, is located in Kathmandu, Nepal.

questions.question: In Shang-Chi, what is the hidden magical village of his mother's people called?
questions.explanation: Ta Lo is the hidden mystical village where Shang-Chi's mother came from.
questions.sourceTitle: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings

questions.question: In The Avengers, the Chitauri pour through a portal opened above which building?
questions.explanation: The wormhole to the Chitauri army opens above Stark Tower in the Battle of New York.

questions.question: By which name do Asgardians call the planet Earth?
questions.explanation: In Thor, Asgardians refer to Earth as Midgard among the Nine Realms.

questions.question: Which frozen realm is home to the Frost Giants in Thor?
questions.explanation: The Frost Giants live on the icy realm of Jotunheim in Thor.

questions.question: What is the name of the Guardians of the Galaxy's orange spaceship?
questions.explanation: The Milano, named after Alyssa Milano, is Star-Lord's ship in Guardians of the Galaxy.

questions.question: In Guardians of the Galaxy, Yondu controls his deadly arrow using what?
questions.explanation: Yondu directs his Yaka arrow by whistling, guiding it to strike his enemies.

questions.question: What golden glove does Thanos build to hold the Infinity Stones?
questions.explanation: Thanos wields the Infinity Gauntlet, a golden glove that channels all six Infinity Stones.

questions.question: What shape is the emblem at the center of Captain America's shield?
questions.explanation: A white star sits at the center of Captain America's round vibranium shield.

questions.question: What garment does Doctor Strange wear that flies and moves on its own?
questions.explanation: The Cloak of Levitation is a sentient relic that lets Doctor Strange fly and even fights for him.

questions.question: In the MCU, Spider-Man fires webs from wrist devices called what?
questions.explanation: Spider-Man uses web-shooters on his wrists to fire strands of webbing.

questions.question: What is the glowing device in Tony Stark's chest that powers his armor called?
questions.explanation: The arc reactor in Tony Stark's chest keeps him alive and powers his Iron Man suit.

questions.question: In Black Panther, which special plant grants the Black Panther his powers?
questions.explanation: Eating the Heart-Shaped Herb gives the Black Panther enhanced strength and abilities.

questions.question: In Endgame, the Avengers build a new gauntlet from which material to hold the stones?
questions.explanation: The Avengers craft a new gauntlet from Stark's nanotech to safely wield the Infinity Stones.

questions.question: What best describes Wanda Maximoff's powers in the MCU?
questions.explanation: Wanda Maximoff can move objects with her mind and wield powerful magic as the Scarlet Witch.

questions.question: What is Pietro Maximoff's main superpower?
questions.explanation: Pietro Maximoff, or Quicksilver, can run at incredible super speed.

questions.question: What special ability does Vision use to move his body through solid matter?
questions.explanation: Vision can change his density to phase harmlessly through solid walls and objects.

questions.question: In Captain Marvel, Carol Danvers can fire powerful blasts of what from her hands?
questions.explanation: Captain Marvel channels cosmic energy into powerful photon blasts from her hands.

questions.question: Doctor Strange can conjure glowing shields and weapons using what?
questions.explanation: Doctor Strange shapes mystical magic energy into glowing shields, whips, and portals.

questions.question: What lets Spider-Man cling to walls and ceilings in the MCU?
questions.explanation: Spider-Man's spider-based powers let him stick to and climb walls and ceilings.

questions.question: What can Groot do with his tree-like body?
questions.explanation: Groot can stretch, grow, and regrow his branches and even regenerate from a twig.

questions.question: In Black Panther, what can the suit do after absorbing kinetic energy?
answers: Release the stored energy in a blast
questions.explanation: The Black Panther suit absorbs incoming kinetic energy and can release it in a powerful blast.

questions.question: What nickname is given to the five years after Thanos erased half of all life?
questions.explanation: The period when half of life vanished, and then returned, is called the Blip.

questions.question: In Endgame, what do the Avengers call their plan to travel back and gather the stones?
questions.explanation: The Avengers call their time-travel mission to collect the Infinity Stones the Time Heist.

questions.question: In Infinity War, on which planet do heroes battle Thanos and lose the Time Stone?
questions.explanation: On Thanos' ruined homeworld Titan, the heroes fight him and Strange surrenders the Time Stone.

questions.question: The final battle of Infinity War takes place in which country?
questions.explanation: Infinity War's climactic battle is fought in Wakanda to protect Vision and the Mind Stone.

questions.question: In Captain America: The First Avenger, how is Steve Rogers found alive decades later?
questions.explanation: Steve Rogers is discovered frozen in ice and revived decades after crashing a plane.

questions.question: In Guardians of the Galaxy, the heroes join hands to survive holding which stone?
questions.explanation: The Guardians grasp hands to share the burden of the Power Stone and defeat Ronan.

questions.question: In Thor: Ragnarok, what ultimately happens to Asgard?
questions.explanation: Thor unleashes Surtur to trigger Ragnarok, destroying Asgard to defeat Hela.

questions.question: At the end of Spider-Man: Far From Home, who exposes Peter Parker as Spider-Man?
questions.explanation: Mysterio's final broadcast frames Peter and reveals his identity as Spider-Man.

questions.question: In WandaVision, the early episodes are styled after which kind of old TV shows?
questions.explanation: WandaVision's early episodes lovingly recreate classic American sitcoms across the decades.

questions.question: In the series Loki, the TVA arrests variants for disrupting the flow of what?
questions.explanation: The Time Variance Authority polices the timeline and arrests those who disrupt time.

questions.question: In Moon Knight, Marc Spector serves which Egyptian moon god?
questions.explanation: Marc Spector is the avatar of the Egyptian moon god Khonshu in Moon Knight.

questions.question: In Ms. Marvel, teenage Kamala Khan is a devoted fan of which superhero?
questions.explanation: Kamala Khan idolizes Captain Marvel before gaining powers of her own in Ms. Marvel.

questions.question: In She-Hulk, what is Jennifer Walters' everyday profession?
questions.explanation: Jennifer Walters is a lawyer who handles superhuman cases in She-Hulk: Attorney at Law.

questions.question: During which holiday season is the Hawkeye Disney+ series set?
questions.explanation: The Hawkeye series takes place in New York City during the Christmas holiday season.

questions.question: In The Falcon and the Winter Soldier, who is appointed the new Captain America?
questions.explanation: The government names John Walker the new Captain America early in the series.
questions.sourceTitle: The Falcon and the Winter Soldier

questions.question: In the animated What If...?, who is the all-seeing narrator watching the multiverse?
questions.explanation: The Watcher narrates and observes the alternate realities throughout What If...?.

questions.question: The Disney+ series Echo centers on which hero?
questions.explanation: Echo follows Maya Lopez, a deaf hero, as she returns to her hometown and family.

questions.question: Which Infinity Stone was hidden inside Loki's scepter during the 2012 Battle of New York?
questions.explanation: The Mind Stone was concealed inside the scepter Loki wielded during the Chitauri invasion of Manhattan.

questions.question: On which planet do the Guardians first retrieve the Orb containing the Power Stone?
questions.explanation: Peter Quill recovers the ancient Orb holding the Power Stone from the abandoned planet Morag.

questions.question: Who keeps the Reality Stone, called the Aether, locked in his museum on Knowhere?
questions.explanation: The Collector, Taneleer Tivan, stores the mysterious Aether within his vast collection on Knowhere.

questions.question: On which desolate planet must a hero sacrifice someone they love to claim the Soul Stone?
questions.explanation: The Soul Stone on the remote planet Vormir demands the sacrifice of someone truly loved.

questions.question: Which dwarf helps Thor forge the axe Stormbreaker on Nidavellir?
questions.explanation: Eitri, the last surviving dwarf of Nidavellir, helps Thor forge the powerful weapon Stormbreaker.

questions.question: What glowing cube has housed the Space Stone since its use by Hydra in WWII?
questions.explanation: The Tesseract is a cube-shaped relic that has secretly contained the Space Stone for decades.

questions.question: Which order of sorcerers protects the Time Stone at Kamar-Taj before Doctor Strange arrives?
answers: The Masters of the Mystic Arts
questions.explanation: The Ancient One and her Masters of the Mystic Arts safeguard the Time Stone for centuries.

questions.question: How many Infinity Stones does Thanos need mounted in his Gauntlet to erase half of all life?
questions.explanation: Thanos must gather all six Infinity Stones before his Gauntlet can carry out the deadly snap.

questions.question: Which Avenger wields a makeshift nanotech gauntlet to destroy Thanos and his army in 2023?
questions.explanation: Tony Stark snaps his fingers using a nanotech gauntlet, sacrificing his life to defeat Thanos.

questions.question: What organization prunes branching timelines to protect the Sacred Timeline?
questions.explanation: The Time Variance Authority monitors reality and prunes any timeline branches that threaten the Sacred Timeline.

questions.question: What term does the TVA use for alternate-timeline versions of the same person?
questions.explanation: The TVA calls alternate-timeline versions of an individual, like the many versions of Loki, variants.

questions.question: Who does Sylvie kill at the Citadel at the End of Time, splitting the timeline?
questions.explanation: Sylvie kills He Who Remains, shattering the single Sacred Timeline into a branching multiverse.

questions.question: Which young hero can punch star-shaped portals to travel between universes?
questions.explanation: America Chavez has the innate power to open portals and travel freely across the multiverse.
questions.sourceTitle: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness

questions.question: What forbidden book of chaos magic does Wanda Maximoff consult while searching for her sons?
questions.explanation: Wanda studies the corrupting Darkhold, a book of chaos magic, hoping to reunite with her children.
questions.sourceTitle: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness

questions.question: What is the name of the secretive council of alternate heroes Strange meets on Earth-838?
questions.explanation: On Earth-838, Doctor Strange encounters the Illuminati, a hidden council of powerful alternate-universe heroes.
questions.sourceTitle: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness

questions.question: What animated Disney+ anthology series imagines MCU events unfolding differently across the multiverse?
questions.explanation: What If...? explores alternate timelines by asking how key Marvel Cinematic Universe moments could have changed.

questions.question: In Quantumania, which future conqueror does Janet van Dyne reveal she once encountered in the Quantum Realm?
questions.explanation: Janet van Dyne secretly met and helped imprison Kang the Conqueror during her years in the Quantum Realm.

questions.question: What massive cloud-like creature made of time energy patrols the Void at the end of time?
questions.explanation: Alioth is a monstrous entity of pure time energy that devours anything pruned into the Void.

questions.question: Which hero was among the original six Avengers who assembled in New York in 2012?
questions.explanation: Black Widow was one of the six founding Avengers, alongside Iron Man, Cap, Thor, Hulk, and Hawkeye.

questions.question: Which two scientists secretly build the AI Ultron using the Mind Stone?
questions.explanation: Tony Stark and Bruce Banner create Ultron using the Mind Stone, hoping to build a global peacekeeping program.

questions.question: What legislative document requiring superhero oversight splits the Avengers into rival factions?
questions.explanation: The Sokovia Accords, mandating UN oversight of enhanced individuals, divides the Avengers during Civil War.

questions.question: Where do the Avengers build their new headquarters after selling Stark Tower?
questions.explanation: The Avengers relocate from Stark Tower to a state-of-the-art compound built in upstate New York.

questions.question: What towering armor does Tony Stark deploy to battle a rampaging Hulk in Johannesburg?
questions.explanation: Tony pilots the massive Hulkbuster armor, nicknamed Veronica, to subdue the rampaging Hulk.

questions.question: Which Avenger sacrifices herself on Vormir so Hawkeye can claim the Soul Stone?
questions.explanation: Natasha Romanoff gives her life on Vormir during the Time Heist so Hawkeye can obtain the Soul Stone.

questions.question: Who finally speaks the line "Avengers, assemble" just before the final battle in Endgame?
questions.explanation: Steve Rogers utters the iconic rallying cry "Avengers, assemble" as reinforcements arrive for the final battle.

questions.question: Vision is created by combining the Mind Stone, a vibranium body, and which AI's consciousness?
questions.explanation: Vision forms when the Mind Stone, a vibranium body, and Tony Stark's AI JARVIS are combined.

questions.question: Which sorcerer opens dozens of portals to bring reinforcements to the final battle in Endgame?
questions.explanation: Doctor Strange signals that victory is possible by opening portals that summon allies across the universe.

questions.question: What serum transforms scrawny Steve Rogers into the peak-human Captain America?
questions.explanation: Dr. Erskine's Super Soldier Serum, combined with vita-rays, gives Steve Rogers his enhanced abilities.

questions.question: In which country does Tony Stark build his first Iron Man armor while held captive?
questions.explanation: Tony builds his first suit of armor inside a cave in Afghanistan to escape the Ten Rings.

questions.question: What must be true of a person for them to lift Thor's hammer, Mjolnir?
questions.explanation: Mjolnir's enchantment only allows those judged worthy by the hammer itself to lift and wield it.

questions.question: Before joining the Avengers, Natasha Romanoff trained as a spy in which secret program?
questions.explanation: Natasha Romanoff was trained as an assassin in the Red Room before eventually defecting to SHIELD.

questions.question: How does Peter Parker gain his spider-based powers in the Marvel Cinematic Universe?
answers: A bite from a genetically altered spider
questions.explanation: Peter is bitten by a genetically engineered spider on a school field trip, granting him his powers.

questions.question: T'Challa becomes Wakanda's king and Black Panther after the death of which family member?
questions.explanation: T'Challa ascends to Wakanda's throne after his father, King T'Chaka, is killed in a bombing.

questions.question: Carol Danvers gains her powers after an explosion involving energy from which source?
questions.explanation: An explosion fuses Tesseract energy with Carol Danvers's DNA, granting her immense superhuman powers.

questions.question: What technology allows Scott Lang to shrink and grow in size as Ant-Man?
questions.explanation: Hank Pym's discovery, Pym Particles, allows the Ant-Man suit's wearer to change size at will.

questions.question: A car accident that damages his hands leads surgeon Stephen Strange to seek healing where?
questions.explanation: After a crash ends his surgical career, Stephen Strange travels to Kamar-Taj in search of a cure.

questions.question: Exposure to what type of radiation causes Bruce Banner to transform into the Hulk?
questions.explanation: A lab experiment exposes scientist Bruce Banner to gamma radiation, triggering his transformation into the Hulk.

questions.question: Which Titan seeks to erase half of all life in the universe to restore balance?
questions.explanation: Thanos believes wiping out half of all life will save the universe from overpopulation and scarcity.

questions.question: Loki is the adopted son of which Asgardian king?
questions.explanation: Loki was taken in as an infant and raised by Odin as a prince of Asgard.

questions.question: Which Hydra leader becomes banished to Vormir as its stonekeeper after touching the Tesseract?
questions.explanation: The Tesseract's power disfigures Red Skull and banishes him to Vormir to guard the Soul Stone.

questions.question: Which rogue artificial intelligence, built to protect Earth, decides humanity itself is the threat?
questions.explanation: Ultron concludes humanity must be wiped out for the planet to survive, turning against its creators.

questions.question: Erik Killmonger seeks Wakanda's throne as the son of which relative of T'Challa?
questions.explanation: Killmonger is the son of N'Jobu, T'Chaka's brother, which gives him a legitimate claim to the throne.

questions.question: Hela, the Goddess of Death, reveals herself to be whose long-imprisoned firstborn child?
questions.explanation: Hela is Odin's banished firstborn, once his instrument of conquest before he imprisoned her.

questions.question: Adrian Toomes becomes the villain Vulture after losing what kind of business contract?
questions.explanation: Toomes turns to crime after a government agency takes over his salvage and cleanup contract.

questions.question: Ronan the Accuser is a fanatical military zealot belonging to which alien empire?
questions.explanation: Ronan the Accuser is a radical Kree commander who defies his own empire's truce with Xandar.

questions.question: Quentin Beck, the illusionist Mysterio, previously worked as an employee for which company?
questions.explanation: Quentin Beck is a disgruntled former Stark Industries employee before becoming the illusion-weaving Mysterio.

questions.question: Which Titan personally commands the Black Order, the alien warriors who serve him?
questions.explanation: Thanos leads the Black Order, his adopted alien children, on his mission across the galaxy.

questions.question: Who serves as Tony Stark's loyal driver and eventual head of security?
questions.explanation: Happy Hogan works as Tony Stark's bodyguard, driver, and later head of security at Stark Industries.

questions.question: Which SHIELD director recruits Carol Danvers and later helps assemble the Avengers?
questions.explanation: Nick Fury, longtime director of SHIELD, plays a central role in forming and coordinating the Avengers.

questions.question: Which trusted SHIELD deputy remains a key operative and fights beside the Avengers in Endgame?
questions.explanation: Maria Hill, Nick Fury's trusted deputy, remains a key SHIELD operative throughout the Avengers' battles.

questions.question: Who is Peter Parker's best friend who accidentally discovers he is Spider-Man?
questions.explanation: Ned Leeds becomes Peter's trusted confidant after accidentally learning that he is Spider-Man.

questions.question: Which sorcerer serves as librarian and closest ally to Doctor Strange at Kamar-Taj?
questions.explanation: Wong is a skilled sorcerer who guards the Kamar-Taj library and fights alongside Doctor Strange.

questions.question: Who is the all-seeing gatekeeper of Asgard who guards the Bifrost Bridge?
questions.explanation: Heimdall's heightened senses let him watch over the Nine Realms and operate the Bifrost Bridge.

questions.question: What is the name of Tony Stark's AI assistant before Vision is created?
questions.explanation: JARVIS manages Tony Stark's technology and suits until part of his consciousness becomes Vision.

questions.question: Which Stark Industries CEO eventually marries Tony Stark and dons her own Rescue armor?
questions.explanation: Pepper Potts rises from Tony's assistant to CEO of Stark Industries and later wears the Rescue armor.

questions.question: Which young Wakandan genius designs the technology behind Black Panther's suit?
questions.explanation: Princess Shuri leads Wakanda's technology lab and engineers the vibranium-weave Black Panther suit.

questions.question: What name does Peter Quill's ragtag group adopt to protect the galaxy?
questions.explanation: Peter Quill, Gamora, Drax, Rocket, and Groot band together as the Guardians of the Galaxy.

questions.question: What is the collective name for Thanos's adopted alien children who serve as his enforcers?
questions.explanation: The Black Order, including Ebony Maw and Proxima Midnight, carries out Thanos's mission to gather the Stones.

questions.question: What is the name of Wakanda's elite, all-female royal bodyguard unit?
questions.explanation: The Dora Milaje, led by Okoye, serve as Wakanda's fierce and loyal royal bodyguards.

questions.question: What is the name of Steve Rogers's elite WWII squad that fights behind enemy lines against Hydra?
questions.explanation: The Howling Commandos are the handpicked special forces unit Captain America leads against Hydra.

questions.question: What trio of Asgardian warriors frequently accompanies Thor on his adventures?
questions.explanation: Fandral, Hogun, and Volstagg make up the Warriors Three, longtime friends and allies of Thor.

questions.question: What secretive council of alternate-universe heroes does Doctor Strange meet on Earth-838?
questions.explanation: On Earth-838, Strange encounters the Illuminati, a hidden council including alternate versions of familiar heroes.
questions.sourceTitle: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness

questions.question: What group of interstellar outlaws and smugglers once included Yondu and Peter Quill?
questions.explanation: The Ravagers are a band of galactic outlaws and smugglers, formerly including Yondu and Peter Quill.

questions.question: Which law-enforcement organization patrols and protects the planet Xandar?
questions.explanation: The Nova Corps serves as the intergalactic police force protecting the planet Xandar and its people.

questions.question: What name does Valentina de Fontaine give the covert team of antiheroes she assembles?
questions.explanation: Valentina de Fontaine recruits antiheroes like Yelena Belova and John Walker into a team called the Thunderbolts.

questions.question: What hidden African nation holds the world's largest vibranium deposit?
questions.explanation: Wakanda has thrived in secret for centuries thanks to its vibranium-rich meteorite impact.

questions.question: On which scrapheap planet ruled by the Grandmaster does Thor become a gladiator?
questions.explanation: Thor is captured and forced to fight as a gladiator on the trash planet Sakaar.

questions.question: What is the name of the mining colony built inside a severed Celestial's head?
questions.explanation: Knowhere is a bizarre outpost carved into the enormous severed head of a long-dead Celestial.

questions.question: In which country do the surviving Asgardians establish the settlement of New Asgard?
questions.explanation: The Asgardian refugees settle in the coastal town of New Asgard, located in Norway.

questions.question: What is the name of Doctor Strange's mystical headquarters in Greenwich Village, New York?
questions.explanation: The New York Sanctum Sanctorum is one of three sanctums that use mystical wards to protect Earth.

questions.question: Which realm is the fiery homeland of the demon Surtur, prophesied to destroy Asgard?
questions.explanation: Muspelheim is the fire realm ruled by Surtur, whose prophesied return brings about Ragnarok.

questions.question: At which iconic New York City monument does Spider-Man face a multiversal battle in No Way Home?
questions.explanation: The film's climactic battle against villains from other universes unfolds at the Statue of Liberty.

questions.question: What is the name of Thanos's ruined homeworld, where the Avengers first confront him together?
questions.explanation: Titan is Thanos's decimated home planet, where the Avengers and Guardians first battle him as a team.

questions.question: Which secret monastery in Kathmandu, Nepal, trains sorcerers in the mystic arts?
questions.explanation: Kamar-Taj is the hidden school where the Ancient One trains sorcerers like Stephen Strange.

questions.question: What is the name of Thor's enchanted hammer, which only the worthy can lift?
questions.explanation: Mjolnir is Thor's iconic hammer, forged from the heart of a dying star and enchanted by Odin.

questions.question: What special material makes up Captain America's iconic round shield?
questions.explanation: Howard Stark forged Captain America's shield from a rare and nearly indestructible vibranium-steel alloy.

questions.question: What hand-worn device lets Thanos wield the power of all six Infinity Stones at once?
questions.explanation: The Infinity Gauntlet is a specially forged glove designed to channel the combined power of the Stones.

questions.question: What mystical amulet worn by Doctor Strange conceals the Time Stone?
questions.explanation: The Eye of Agamotto is a mystical amulet that conceals and protects the powerful Time Stone.

questions.question: What smart glasses does Tony Stark bequeath to Peter Parker, granting control of a drone network?
questions.explanation: EDITH, standing for "Even Dead I'm The Hero," grants Peter access to Stark's global defense network.

questions.question: What handheld device lets TVA agents and variants like Loki travel through time and space?
questions.explanation: A TemPad is a handheld device that allows TVA agents and variants to travel between timelines.

questions.question: What ancient alien weapons grant Xu Wenwu near-immortality and mastery of combat?
questions.explanation: The mysterious Ten Rings grant Xu Wenwu vast power and centuries of extended life.
questions.sourceTitle: Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings

questions.question: What shrinking technology, developed by Hank Pym, powers the Ant-Man and Wasp suits?
questions.explanation: Pym Particles allow the wearer of the Ant-Man and Wasp suits to shrink or grow in size.

questions.question: What sentient magical garment often acts on its own to aid Doctor Strange?
questions.explanation: The Cloak of Levitation is a sentient relic that grants flight and often acts with its own personality.

questions.question: What type of magic does Wanda Maximoff use to warp reality as Scarlet Witch?
questions.explanation: Wanda Maximoff wields chaos magic, an exceptionally rare and powerful form of reality-altering sorcery.

questions.question: What causes scientist Bruce Banner to transform into the Hulk?
questions.explanation: An experiment gone wrong exposes Bruce Banner to gamma radiation, giving him his Hulk transformation.

questions.question: What ability warns Spider-Man of incoming danger just before it strikes?
questions.explanation: Peter Parker's spider-sense alerts him to danger just before it happens, letting him react instinctively.

questions.question: What powers let Captain Marvel fly and fire energy blasts from her hands?
questions.explanation: Carol Danvers's body absorbs and channels photonic energy, letting her fly and fire powerful blasts.

questions.question: What unique ability lets Vision walk through solid walls and objects?
questions.explanation: Vision can alter his molecular density, allowing him to phase intangibly through solid matter.

questions.question: What ability does Pietro Maximoff, Quicksilver, gain from Hydra's experiments?
questions.explanation: Hydra's experiments involving the Mind Stone grant Pietro Maximoff extraordinary superhuman speed.

questions.question: What ability does the Mind Stone in Vision's forehead give him in battle?
questions.explanation: The Mind Stone embedded in Vision's forehead lets him fire a concentrated beam of solar energy.

questions.question: How does the sentient tree-like being Groot typically recover after being destroyed?
answers: By regrowing from a small fragment
questions.explanation: Groot's species can regenerate an entirely new body from even a small severed piece of itself.

questions.question: What power lets Doctor Strange briefly view millions of possible future outcomes during a battle?
answers: Viewing timelines with the Time Stone
questions.explanation: Using the Time Stone, Doctor Strange views over fourteen million possible futures to find the path to victory.

questions.question: What 2012 New York battle marks the Avengers' first fight together as a team?
questions.explanation: The Chitauri invasion of Manhattan, led by Loki, becomes known as the Battle of New York.

questions.question: What nickname is later given to the event where Thanos's snap erases half of all life?
questions.explanation: Thanos's snap causes an event later nicknamed "the Blip," instantly erasing half of all life.

questions.question: What plan do the surviving Avengers use to travel back and retrieve the Infinity Stones?
questions.explanation: The remaining Avengers carry out "the Time Heist," traveling to the past to collect the Infinity Stones.

questions.question: Who secretly bombs the Vienna conference and frames Bucky Barnes in Captain America: Civil War?
questions.explanation: Helmut Zemo bombs the Vienna conference and frames Bucky Barnes to turn the Avengers against one another.

questions.question: Which covert organization is revealed to have secretly controlled SHIELD for decades?
questions.explanation: Captain America: The Winter Soldier reveals that Hydra had secretly infiltrated and controlled SHIELD for decades.

questions.question: During the Battle of Wakanda, what are the combined armies trying to protect from Thanos's forces?
