questions.explanation: Boba Fett becomes the new crime lord of Jabba's former territory in The Book of Boba Fett.

questions.question: Which small, green Jedi Master trains generations of Jedi for over 800 years?
questions.explanation: Yoda is the diminutive, wise Jedi Master who trains generations of Jedi for over 800 years.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Who is the Jedi Master that trains both Anakin and later Luke Skywalker?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan Kenobi trains Anakin Skywalker as his Padawan and later mentors Luke Skywalker.

questions.question: Which Jedi Council member is famous for wielding a distinctive purple lightsaber?
questions.explanation: Mace Windu is a senior Jedi Council member famous for his distinctive purple lightsaber.

questions.question: What title is given to a Jedi student training under a Jedi Knight or Master?
questions.explanation: A Padawan is a Jedi apprentice who trains directly under a Jedi Knight or Master.

questions.question: Who was Qui-Gon Jinn's Jedi Master before Qui-Gon trained Obi-Wan?
questions.explanation: Count Dooku trained Qui-Gon Jinn before Dooku later left the Jedi Order and turned to the dark side.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: What signature weapon do Jedi Knights traditionally build and carry?
questions.explanation: Jedi construct their own lightsabers, energy-bladed weapons that become an extension of themselves.

questions.question: What color is Yoda's lightsaber blade?
questions.explanation: Yoda wields a green-bladed lightsaber, as seen in his duels throughout the prequel films.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: What ancient rule limits the Sith to only two members at any given time?
questions.explanation: The Rule of Two states there can only ever be a Sith Master and a Sith apprentice at one time.

questions.question: What injures Anakin so badly on Mustafar that he requires his iconic black armor?
answers: Severe burns from lava and lightsaber wounds
questions.explanation: Anakin suffers devastating burns and injuries on Mustafar, requiring the life-sustaining armor of Darth Vader.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: What is the Sith name of Emperor Palpatine, revealing his true identity as a Dark Lord?
questions.explanation: Emperor Palpatine's secret Sith identity is Darth Sidious, mastermind behind the fall of the Jedi.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: What is Count Dooku's Sith name after he leaves the Jedi Order?
questions.explanation: Count Dooku takes the Sith name Darth Tyranus after becoming Darth Sidious's apprentice.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Which horned Sith apprentice wields a red double-bladed lightsaber in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Darth Maul, Darth Sidious's fearsome apprentice, fights with a distinctive double-bladed lightsaber.

questions.question: What color do Sith lightsabers traditionally glow?
questions.explanation: Sith lightsabers glow red because Sith users bleed their kyber crystals through the dark side.

questions.question: Which protocol droid is fluent in over six million forms of communication?
questions.explanation: C-3PO is a protocol droid famously fluent in over six million forms of communication.

questions.question: Which astromech droid is Luke Skywalker's loyal companion throughout the Skywalker Saga?
questions.explanation: R2-D2 is the resourceful astromech droid who accompanies Luke Skywalker on many adventures.

questions.question: What reprogrammed Imperial security droid aids Cassian Andor in Rogue One?
questions.explanation: K-2SO is a reprogrammed Imperial security droid who aids Cassian Andor in Rogue One.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: Which reprogrammed assassin droid protects and cares for Grogu in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: IG-11 is a reprogrammed assassin droid that protects and cares for Grogu in The Mandalorian.

questions.question: What type of droid is BB-8, distinguished by its ball-shaped body?
questions.explanation: BB-8 is a spherical astromech droid that debuted in Star Wars: The Force Awakens.

questions.question: Who builds the protocol droid C-3PO out of spare parts as a young boy on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: A young Anakin Skywalker builds the protocol droid C-3PO on Tatooine in The Phantom Menace.

questions.question: What is the name of the desert planet where Luke Skywalker grows up?
questions.explanation: Tatooine is the harsh desert planet where Luke Skywalker is raised by his aunt and uncle.

questions.question: Which ice planet hosts the Rebel Echo Base at the start of The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: The Rebel Alliance hides its Echo Base on the frozen planet Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What forest moon is home to the small, furry Ewoks?
questions.explanation: The forest moon of Endor is inhabited by the Ewoks who help the Rebels defeat the Empire.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which lush, watery planet is the peaceful homeworld of Padme Amidala?
questions.explanation: Naboo is the green, watery homeworld of Padme Amidala, seen in The Phantom Menace.

questions.question: What is the name of Princess Leia's peaceful home planet, destroyed by the Death Star?
questions.explanation: The Death Star destroys Leia's home planet, Alderaan, to demonstrate its power in A New Hope.

questions.question: Which city-covered planet serves as the capital of the Galactic Republic and later the Empire?
questions.explanation: Coruscant is the ecumenopolis, or city-covered planet, that serves as the galaxy's capital.

questions.question: What desert planet does scavenger Rey call home before joining the Resistance?
questions.explanation: Rey lives as a scavenger on the desert planet Jakku before the events of The Force Awakens.

questions.question: What is the name of Han Solo's famous ship, said to make the Kessel Run in under twelve parsecs?
questions.explanation: The Millennium Falcon is Han Solo's beloved and speedy ship, famed for its Kessel Run boast.

questions.question: What starfighter does Luke Skywalker fly during the attack on the first Death Star?
questions.explanation: Luke Skywalker pilots an X-wing starfighter in the Rebel attack on the Death Star.

questions.question: What is the standard starfighter flown by Imperial pilots, known for its twin wings?
questions.explanation: The TIE fighter, short for Twin Ion Engine fighter, is the Empire's standard starfighter.

questions.question: What starship is used by both bounty hunter Jango Fett and his son Boba Fett?
questions.explanation: Slave I is the distinctive starship used by both Jango Fett and his son, Boba Fett.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What massive Imperial superweapon can destroy entire planets in A New Hope?
questions.explanation: The Death Star is a moon-sized battle station capable of obliterating entire planets.

questions.question: What is Darth Vader's personal Super Star Destroyer flagship called?
questions.explanation: The Executor is Darth Vader's massive Super Star Destroyer flagship in The Empire Strikes Back.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What First Order superweapon, built into an entire planet, destroys the Hosnian system?
questions.explanation: Starkiller Base is a planet converted into a superweapon that fires on the Hosnian system.

questions.question: What towering, hairy creature serves as Han Solo's co-pilot and best friend?
questions.explanation: Chewbacca is a Wookiee warrior who serves as Han Solo's loyal co-pilot on the Millennium Falcon.

questions.question: What species is Chewbacca, known for great height, strength, and loyalty?
questions.explanation: Chewbacca belongs to the Wookiee species, native to the forest planet Kashyyyk.

questions.question: What giant, slug-like crime lord rules Tatooine's underworld and imprisons Han Solo?
questions.explanation: Jabba the Hutt is a massive gangster who holds Han Solo captive in Return of the Jedi.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: What large, furry creatures do Tusken Raiders ride across the deserts of Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Banthas are massive, shaggy creatures traditionally ridden by the Tusken Raiders of Tatooine.

questions.question: What snow creatures do Rebel troops ride for patrols on the ice planet Hoth?
questions.explanation: Tauntauns are cold-adapted creatures ridden by Rebel scouts on Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What giant creature living inside an asteroid nearly swallows the Millennium Falcon?
questions.explanation: The Millennium Falcon narrowly escapes a giant space slug living inside an asteroid field.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Which smuggler administers Cloud City before joining the Rebels as a general?
questions.explanation: Lando Calrissian administers Cloud City and later becomes a Rebel general who helps destroy the Death Star II.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which centuries-old pirate runs a castle sanctuary on the planet Takodana?
questions.explanation: Maz Kanata is a centuries-old pirate who runs a castle sanctuary on the planet Takodana.

questions.question: Who is Luke and Leia's mother, seen in the prequel trilogy as a senator of Naboo?
questions.explanation: Padme Amidala, senator of Naboo, is the mother of both Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which moisture farmers raise young Luke Skywalker as their own on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Owen and Beru Lars are the moisture farmers who raise Luke as their own on Tatooine.

questions.question: Which Mon Calamari admiral is famous for shouting 'It's a trap!'?
questions.explanation: Admiral Ackbar is the Mon Calamari commander famous for his warning cry, 'It's a trap!'
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which princess-turned-general later founds the Resistance against the First Order?
questions.explanation: Leia Organa serves as a princess, Rebel leader, and general, later founding the Resistance.

questions.question: Which Sullustan pilot co-pilots the Millennium Falcon during the Battle of Endor?
questions.explanation: The Sullustan pilot Nien Nunb co-pilots the Millennium Falcon with Lando during the Battle of Endor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: During the Battle of Endor, what does Han Solo's strike team destroy on the forest moon?
questions.explanation: Han Solo leads a strike team to destroy the shield generator protecting the second Death Star at Endor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: What event forces the Rebel Alliance to evacuate their base on Hoth?
questions.explanation: The Empire's AT-AT walkers launch a ground assault on Echo Base, forcing the Rebels to evacuate Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What galaxy-changing declaration does Palpatine make at the end of Revenge of the Sith?
questions.explanation: Palpatine declares the Republic reorganized into the first Galactic Empire, with himself as Emperor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: What daring mission do Rebel spies undertake in the events of Rogue One?
questions.explanation: Rogue One follows a group of Rebels who steal the technical plans for the first Death Star.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: What ceremony closes out Star Wars: A New Hope on the Rebel base at Yavin 4?
answers: A medal ceremony honoring Luke and Han
questions.explanation: A New Hope ends with a ceremony where Princess Leia awards medals to Luke and Han for their heroism.

questions.question: What causes Anakin Skywalker to turn to the dark side and become Darth Vader?
questions.explanation: Anakin turns to the dark side, driven by fear of loss and manipulated by Palpatine's lies.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: In A New Hope, which desert city does Obi-Wan call a wretched hive of scum and villainy?
questions.explanation: Mos Eisley is the rough Tatooine spaceport where Luke and Obi-Wan hire Han Solo in A New Hope.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, in what substance is Han Solo frozen on Cloud City?
questions.explanation: Vader freezes Han Solo in carbonite on Cloud City, and Boba Fett carries him to Jabba the Hutt.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, over what desert pit is Jabba the Hutt's sail barge destroyed?
answers: The Great Pit of Carkoon well
questions.explanation: Luke's rescue at the Great Pit of Carkoon ends with Jabba's sail barge exploding above the Sarlacc.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, which floating city does Lando Calrissian administer?
questions.explanation: Lando Calrissian runs the Bespin mining colony of Cloud City before helping the Rebels escape.

questions.question: In A New Hope, what color is the lightsaber Luke inherits from his father?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan gives Luke his father's blue-bladed lightsaber, saying it once belonged to Anakin Skywalker.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, which bounty hunter does Vader warn with 'no disintegrations'?
questions.explanation: Vader hires several bounty hunters to find the Falcon and tells Boba Fett he wants no disintegrations.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, what unfinished Imperial station orbits the forest moon of Endor?
questions.explanation: A second, larger Death Star is under construction above Endor when the Rebels launch their final assault.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, which clumsy Gungan befriends Qui-Gon Jinn and Obi-Wan?
questions.explanation: Jar Jar Binks, a Gungan exile, guides the Jedi through Naboo's underwater city after Qui-Gon saves him.

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, which bounty hunter is the genetic template for the clone army?
questions.explanation: The Kaminoans build the Republic's clone army using bounty hunter Jango Fett's genetic template.

questions.question: In Revenge of the Sith, what Jedi rank does the Council deny Anakin even after seating him?
questions.explanation: The Jedi Council lets Anakin sit on the Council but refuses to grant him the rank of Jedi Master.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, what royal title does Padme Amidala hold on Naboo?
questions.explanation: Padme Amidala serves as the elected Queen of Naboo before later becoming the planet's senator.

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, which Jedi investigates the secret clone army on Kamino?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan Kenobi tracks a poison dart to the rainy world of Kamino, uncovering the hidden clone army.

questions.question: In Revenge of the Sith, which cyborg general leads the Separatists and collects lightsabers?
questions.explanation: General Grievous, a lightsaber-hoarding cyborg, commands the Separatist droid army in Revenge of the Sith.

questions.question: In Revenge of the Sith, what are the names of the twins Padme gives birth to?
questions.explanation: Padme dies giving birth to twins Luke and Leia, who are hidden apart to protect them from the Empire.

questions.question: In The Force Awakens, what does the map carried by BB-8 lead the Resistance to?
questions.explanation: The Resistance and First Order both hunt a map fragment inside BB-8 that reveals Luke Skywalker's location.

questions.question: In The Last Jedi, on what ocean island world does Rey find Luke Skywalker in exile?
questions.explanation: Rey journeys to the remote water world Ahch-To, site of the first Jedi Temple, to find Luke.

questions.question: In The Rise of Skywalker, which Sith Emperor returns as the story's true mastermind?
questions.explanation: A resurrected Emperor Palpatine is revealed to have secretly controlled the First Order from Exegol.

questions.question: In The Force Awakens, which masked warrior leads the Knights of Ren?
questions.explanation: Kylo Ren, born Ben Solo, leads the Knights of Ren and idolizes his grandfather Darth Vader.

questions.question: In The Last Jedi, which chrome-armored First Order captain does Finn battle?
questions.explanation: Finn duels the silver-armored Captain Phasma aboard a First Order dreadnought in The Last Jedi.

questions.question: In The Rise of Skywalker, what hidden Sith world does Palpatine hide on?
questions.explanation: Palpatine hides his Sith fleet on the shrouded Unknown Regions planet Exegol in The Rise of Skywalker.

questions.question: In The Last Jedi, on what red-soiled mineral planet is the final battle fought?
questions.explanation: The Resistance makes its last stand at an old Rebel outpost on the salt-and-crystal world Crait.

questions.question: In The Clone Wars, what nickname does Ahsoka Tano give her master Anakin?
questions.explanation: Ahsoka teasingly calls Anakin 'Skyguy,' while he nicknames his young Padawan 'Snips.'

questions.question: In Star Wars Rebels, which grumpy astromech droid serves the Ghost crew?
questions.explanation: The cantankerous astromech Chopper, also called C1-10P, is a member of the Ghost crew in Star Wars Rebels.

questions.question: In Star Wars Rebels, what is the name of the purple-armored Lasat warrior on the Ghost?
questions.explanation: Garazeb 'Zeb' Orrelios, a Lasat and former honor guard, is the muscle of the Ghost crew in Star Wars Rebels.

questions.question: In Star Wars Rebels, which Mandalorian artist and weapons expert joins the Ghost crew?
questions.explanation: Sabine Wren, a colorful Mandalorian graffiti artist and explosives expert, flies with the Ghost crew.

questions.question: In The Clone Wars, what is the name of the clone captain who serves under Anakin Skywalker?
questions.explanation: Captain Rex leads the 501st Legion under Anakin and becomes one of the most loyal clone troopers.

questions.question: In The Bad Batch, what is the name of the young clone the squad protects?
questions.explanation: Clone Force 99 protects Omega, a genetically unaltered young clone, throughout The Bad Batch.

questions.question: In The Clone Wars, which Sith survivor returns with mechanical legs seeking revenge on Obi-Wan?
questions.explanation: A vengeful Darth Maul, thought dead, returns with spider-like mechanical legs to hunt Obi-Wan Kenobi.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, from what valuable metal is Din Djarin's armor forged?
questions.explanation: Mandalorian armor is forged from beskar, a rare metal strong enough to deflect blaster bolts.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, what short nickname is the bounty hunter Din Djarin known by?
questions.explanation: Most characters simply call the helmeted bounty hunter Din Djarin 'Mando' throughout the series.

questions.question: In Obi-Wan Kenobi, which young princess does Obi-Wan set out to rescue?
questions.explanation: In Obi-Wan Kenobi, Obi-Wan is drawn out of hiding to rescue a kidnapped young Leia Organa.

questions.question: In Andor, what is the name of Cassian Andor's home planet?
questions.explanation: Cassian Andor grows up on the working-class junkyard world of Ferrix in the series Andor.

questions.question: In Ahsoka, which orange-skinned former Jedi is the title character?
questions.explanation: The series Ahsoka follows former Jedi Ahsoka Tano as she hunts for the missing Grand Admiral Thrawn.

questions.question: In The Book of Boba Fett, which desert planet does Boba Fett rule as a crime lord?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett seizes Jabba the Hutt's old territory to rule the underworld of Tatooine as a crime lord.

questions.question: What energy field gives the Jedi their powers?
questions.explanation: The Force is the mystical energy field that binds the galaxy together and grants the Jedi their abilities.

questions.question: What microscopic life forms connect a being to the Force, as Qui-Gon explains?
questions.explanation: Qui-Gon explains that midi-chlorians are microscopic organisms whose count reflects one's Force potential.

questions.question: Which Jedi Master leads the Jedi Council alongside Yoda in the prequels?
questions.explanation: Mace Windu is the senior Jedi Master who guides the High Council with Yoda during the prequel era.

questions.question: What kind of crystal powers a Jedi's lightsaber and focuses its blade?
questions.explanation: Every lightsaber is powered by a Force-attuned kyber crystal that gives the blade its color and energy.

questions.question: What Jedi power can influence a weak mind with a wave of the hand?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan uses the Jedi mind trick on a stormtrooper, saying the droids are not the ones they're looking for.

questions.question: In the prequels, what is the Jedi Order's headquarters on Coruscant called?
questions.explanation: The Jedi Temple on Coruscant houses the Council, the archives, and generations of Jedi younglings.

questions.question: What crackling dark-side power does Emperor Palpatine shoot from his hands?
questions.explanation: Palpatine unleashes Force lightning, a signature Sith attack, against Luke in Return of the Jedi.

questions.question: What honorific title precedes a Sith Lord's chosen name, like Vader or Maul?
questions.explanation: Sith Lords take a new identity marked by the title 'Darth,' such as Darth Vader or Darth Maul.

questions.question: What is Anakin Skywalker's Sith name after he turns to the dark side?
questions.explanation: After falling to the dark side on Mustafar, Anakin Skywalker becomes the Sith Lord Darth Vader.

questions.question: Which strong emotion do the Sith embrace as the source of their strength?
questions.explanation: Unlike the calm Jedi, the Sith draw power from passion, anger, and other intense emotions.

questions.question: Which Sith Master trains Darth Vader and rules the Galactic Empire?
questions.explanation: Emperor Palpatine, the Sith Lord Darth Sidious, rules the Empire and commands his apprentice Darth Vader.

questions.question: In The Force Awakens, which fallen Sith Lord's melted mask does Kylo Ren keep as a relic?
questions.explanation: Kylo Ren treasures the charred mask of his grandfather Darth Vader, vowing to finish his dark work.

questions.question: What Separatist foot soldiers march to battle answering commands with 'Roger, roger'?
questions.explanation: Thin B1 battle droids, famous for replying 'Roger, roger,' form the bulk of the Separatist army.

questions.question: What rolling, shield-generating droids corner the Jedi aboard the Trade Federation ship?
questions.explanation: Droidekas, or destroyer droids, roll into battle and deploy energy shields against Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan.

questions.question: What kind of droid is R2-D2, built to repair starships and store data?
questions.explanation: R2-D2 is an astromech droid designed for starfighter repair, navigation, and computer interface.

questions.question: What kind of droid is C-3PO, built for etiquette and translation?
questions.explanation: C-3PO is a protocol droid fluent in millions of forms of communication and obsessed with proper etiquette.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, what floating Imperial droid discovers the Rebels on Hoth?
questions.explanation: An Imperial probe droid launched across the galaxy lands on Hoth and detects the Rebels' Echo Base.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, which tall assassin droid hunts the Falcon alongside Boba Fett?
questions.explanation: IG-88, a spindly assassin droid, is among the bounty hunters Vader gathers to track the Millennium Falcon.

questions.question: What swampy planet is the exile home of Jedi Master Yoda?
questions.explanation: Yoda hides from the Empire on the misty swamp world of Dagobah, where he later trains Luke Skywalker.

questions.question: What forested planet of giant wroshyr trees is the Wookiee homeworld?
questions.explanation: Kashyyyk, covered in towering wroshyr trees, is the lush homeworld of Chewbacca and the Wookiees.

questions.question: What gas giant hosts the floating Cloud City in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: Cloud City is a tibanna-gas mining colony floating in the clouds of the gas giant Bespin.

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, what rainy ocean world is home to the clone army's makers?
questions.explanation: The stormy water planet Kamino is where the Kaminoan cloners secretly grow the Republic's clone army.

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, what red, rocky planet hosts droid factories and the first battle?
questions.explanation: The Clone Wars ignite on the dusty world Geonosis, home to Separatist droid foundries and an arena.

questions.question: In Star Wars Rebels, what grassy Outer Rim planet is Ezra Bridger's home?
questions.explanation: Ezra Bridger grows up as an orphan on the Empire-occupied farming world of Lothal in Star Wars Rebels.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, what volcanic world serves as Din Djarin's early base of operations?
questions.explanation: Nevarro, a lava-scarred planet, hosts the Bounty Hunters' Guild hall Din Djarin frequents early on.

questions.question: What wedge-shaped Imperial capital ships hunt the Rebel fleet across the galaxy?
questions.explanation: Massive wedge-shaped Star Destroyers form the backbone of the Imperial Navy that pursues the Rebels.

questions.question: What twin-engined Rebel fighter is flown by Gold Squadron in A New Hope?
questions.explanation: The sturdy Y-wing bomber-fighter, flown by Gold Squadron, joins the trench run on the first Death Star.

questions.question: What fast, wedge-shaped Rebel starfighter debuts at the Battle of Endor?
questions.explanation: The speedy A-wing interceptor helps the Rebels take down the Super Star Destroyer Executor at Endor.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, what chrome starship carries Queen Amidala off blockaded Naboo?
questions.explanation: Queen Amidala escapes the Trade Federation blockade aboard her gleaming chrome Naboo Royal Starship.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian's first season, what gunship does Din Djarin pilot?
questions.explanation: Din Djarin travels the galaxy in his pre-Empire patrol gunship, the Razor Crest, in early Mandalorian episodes.

questions.question: In A New Hope, what corvette carries Princess Leia when Vader captures her?
questions.explanation: Leia flees with the stolen Death Star plans aboard the corvette Tantive IV before Vader boards it.

questions.question: What small, hooded scavengers with glowing eyes sell droids on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Jawas are short, robed desert scavengers who collect and resell droids from their massive sandcrawlers.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, what horned beast does Luke fight beneath Jabba's palace?
questions.explanation: Jabba drops Luke into a pit where he must battle the towering, clawed rancor to survive.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, what white-furred beast attacks Luke on the ice planet Hoth?
questions.explanation: A wampa, a shaggy white predator, ambushes Luke on Hoth and drags him back to its icy cave.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, what giant sand-burrowing beast threatens a Tatooine town?
questions.explanation: Din Djarin helps townsfolk and Tusken Raiders slay a colossal krayt dragon terrorizing Mos Pelgo.

questions.question: In The Last Jedi, what big-eyed seabirds live on the cliffs of Ahch-To near Luke?
questions.explanation: Porgs are wide-eyed seabird creatures that nest on Ahch-To and take a curious interest in Chewbacca.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, what monster living in a desert pit slowly digests its prey?
questions.explanation: The Sarlacc is a tentacled creature buried in the Tatooine sands that traps and slowly digests victims.

questions.question: Which Rebel pilot and friend of Luke survives the battles of Yavin, Hoth, and Endor?
questions.explanation: Wedge Antilles is an ace Rebel pilot who flies in all three major Death Star and Endor battles.

questions.question: In A New Hope, which Imperial governor commands the first Death Star?
questions.explanation: Grand Moff Tarkin commands the first Death Star and orders it to fire on Princess Leia's homeworld.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, which junk dealer owns young Anakin and his mother on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: The winged Toydarian junk dealer Watto owns Anakin and Shmi Skywalker as slaves in Mos Espa.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, which tough former Rebel shock trooper helps Din Djarin?
questions.explanation: Cara Dune, a battle-hardened ex-Rebel shock trooper, becomes an ally of Din Djarin in The Mandalorian.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, which Bounty Hunters' Guild leader hires Din Djarin on Nevarro?
questions.explanation: Greef Karga runs the Bounty Hunters' Guild on Nevarro and assigns Din Djarin the bounty on Grogu.

questions.question: In The Force Awakens, which First Order general commands Starkiller Base's forces?
questions.explanation: The ambitious General Hux oversees the First Order's planet-sized superweapon, Starkiller Base.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, which Ewok befriends Princess Leia in the Endor forest?
questions.explanation: The young Ewok scout Wicket discovers Leia in the forest and helps the Rebels win the Battle of Endor.

questions.question: In A New Hope, which planet does the Empire destroy to demonstrate the Death Star's power?
questions.explanation: Grand Moff Tarkin orders the Death Star to obliterate Leia's peaceful homeworld, Alderaan.

questions.question: In Rogue One, on what tropical planet do the Rebels steal the Death Star plans?
questions.explanation: Rogue One climaxes with the Rebels raiding the Imperial data archive on the beach world Scarif.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, to what powerful office is Senator Palpatine elected?
questions.explanation: Palpatine manipulates the crisis on Naboo to be elected Supreme Chancellor of the Galactic Republic.

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, what galaxy-wide conflict begins with the Battle of Geonosis?
questions.explanation: The Battle of Geonosis, where clones first fight droids, marks the start of the Clone Wars.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, what does Luke lose in his lightsaber duel with Darth Vader?
questions.explanation: Vader severs Luke's right hand during their Cloud City duel, just before revealing he is Luke's father.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, whom does Luke refuse to kill despite the Emperor's urging?
questions.explanation: Luke throws aside his lightsaber rather than kill his father, Darth Vader, resisting the dark side.

questions.question: In The Rise of Skywalker, what hidden fleet does Palpatine reveal above Exegol?
questions.explanation: Palpatine unveils the Final Order, a massive fleet of Star Destroyers hidden on the Sith world Exegol.

questions.question: What title does Lando Calrissian hold on Cloud City in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: Lando Calrissian governs the Tibanna gas mining colony of Cloud City as its Baron Administrator before the Empire arrives.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Which unique lightsaber blade color belongs to Jedi Master Mace Windu?
questions.explanation: Mace Windu wields a distinctive purple-bladed lightsaber, a color unique to him among the Jedi Order.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Bo-Katan Kryze is a warrior and eventual ruler from which planet?
questions.explanation: Bo-Katan Kryze hails from Mandalore and later becomes its ruler after the fall of Darth Maul's rule.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, Grogu belongs to the same mysterious species as which legendary Jedi Master?
questions.explanation: Grogu is a member of Yoda's unnamed species, though his exact relation to Yoda remains unrevealed.

questions.question: Which frozen planet hosts the secret Rebel base seen in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: The Rebel Alliance establishes Echo Base on the ice planet Hoth before the Empire discovers and attacks it.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: The Millennium Falcon began as which type of Corellian freighter?
questions.explanation: The Millennium Falcon is a heavily modified YT-1300 light freighter originally built by Corellian Engineering Corporation.

questions.question: What signature weapon does Darth Maul wield in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Darth Maul fights with a double-bladed lightsaber, spinning it to battle two Jedi at once on Naboo.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: Padmé Amidala serves as the elected queen of which planet?
questions.explanation: Padmé Amidala is elected Queen of Naboo and later becomes one of its senators in the Galactic Senate.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: On which desert planet does Rey work as a scavenger before joining the Resistance?
questions.explanation: Rey scavenges fallen Star Destroyer wreckage on the desert planet Jakku before meeting BB-8 and Finn.

questions.question: Chewbacca belongs to which tall, hairy species native to Kashyyyk?
questions.explanation: Chewbacca is a Wookiee, a species of tall, hair-covered warriors native to the forest planet Kashyyyk.

questions.question: On which planet does Obi-Wan Kenobi defeat Darth Maul in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan Kenobi cuts Darth Maul in half and he falls down a reactor shaft during their duel on Naboo.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: What Sith name does Count Dooku take as Darth Sidious's apprentice?
questions.explanation: Count Dooku becomes Darth Sidious's second apprentice under the Sith name Darth Tyranus.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Boba Fett is raised as an unaltered clone of which bounty hunter?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett is raised by Jango Fett as his unaltered son, cloned to be genetically identical to him.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, which bounty hunter captures Han Solo?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett delivers a carbonite-frozen Han Solo to Jabba the Hutt.

questions.question: Which astromech droid carries the stolen Death Star plans aboard the Tantive IV?
questions.explanation: R2-D2 secretly carries the stolen Death Star plans aboard the Tantive IV at the start of A New Hope.

questions.question: The first Death Star is destroyed during which climactic battle?
questions.explanation: Luke Skywalker destroys the first Death Star during the Battle of Yavin by firing a torpedo into its exhaust port.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, what protects the second Death Star's shield?
questions.explanation: A shield generator on the forest moon of Endor protects the second Death Star.

questions.question: Ahsoka Tano serves as the Padawan learner of which Jedi Knight?
questions.explanation: Ahsoka Tano is assigned as Anakin Skywalker's Padawan during the Clone Wars.

questions.question: Darth Sidious is the secret Sith identity of which Galactic Senate figure?
questions.explanation: Chancellor Palpatine secretly rules the galaxy as the Sith Lord Darth Sidious.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which blue-skinned bounty hunter frequently works alongside Count Dooku in The Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Cad Bane, a Duros bounty hunter, is hired by Count Dooku for several missions during the Clone Wars.

questions.question: What phrase do followers of the Mandalorian Creed often say to affirm their code?
answers: May the Force be with you
questions.explanation: Mandalorians who follow the Creed, including Din Djarin, affirm their code by saying "This is the Way."

questions.question: Cassian Andor works as an intelligence officer for which organization?
questions.explanation: Cassian Andor serves as an intelligence officer for the Rebel Alliance in Rogue One and Andor.

questions.question: Jyn Erso leads the mission to steal the plans for which Imperial weapon?
questions.explanation: Jyn Erso leads a team of Rebels to steal the Death Star's technical plans on Scarif.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: Qui-Gon Jinn discovers young Anakin Skywalker enslaved on which planet?
questions.explanation: Qui-Gon Jinn meets the enslaved boy Anakin Skywalker while stranded on Tatooine.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: The Gungans build their underwater city of Otoh Gunga on which planet?
questions.explanation: The Gungan city of Otoh Gunga lies beneath the swamps and lakes of Naboo.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: Which planet houses the cloning facilities that produce the Republic's clone army?
questions.explanation: The oceanic planet Kamino hosts the facilities where clone troopers are grown from Jango Fett's genetic template.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: What is the name of the secret command that turns clone troopers against the Jedi?
questions.explanation: Order 66 is the secret directive that causes clone troopers across the galaxy to execute their Jedi commanders.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which cyborg Separatist commander collects the lightsabers of Jedi he defeats?
questions.explanation: General Grievous, the Separatist supreme commander, keeps a trophy collection of lightsabers taken from fallen Jedi.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: After the fall of the Jedi Order, Yoda goes into exile on which swamp planet?
questions.explanation: Master Yoda hides in exile on the remote swamp planet Dagobah after Order 66.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Han Solo makes his living as a smuggler and captain of which starship?
questions.explanation: Han Solo captains the Millennium Falcon, using it for smuggling runs before joining the Rebel Alliance.

questions.question: Princess Leia Organa is the adoptive royal daughter of which planet?
questions.explanation: Leia Organa is raised as the princess of Alderaan by Bail and Breha Organa.

questions.question: Which four-legged Imperial walker attacks the Rebel base during the Battle of Hoth?
questions.explanation: Imperial AT-AT walkers march on Echo Base during the Battle of Hoth in The Empire Strikes Back.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Boba Fett is nearly killed by which creature living in a pit on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett falls into the Sarlacc's pit at the Great Pit of Carkoon during the battle over Jabba's skiff.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Jabba the Hutt keeps which large creature in a pit beneath his throne room?
questions.explanation: Jabba the Hutt keeps a Rancor in a pit beneath his palace and feeds prisoners to it for entertainment.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which ice creature drags Luke Skywalker into its lair on Hoth?
questions.explanation: A Wampa captures Luke Skywalker and drags him to its cave on the ice planet Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Who serves as Jabba the Hutt's Twi'lek majordomo at his palace?
questions.explanation: Bib Fortuna acts as Jabba the Hutt's majordomo, managing visitors at his Tatooine palace.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Who serves as the chief political leader of the Rebel Alliance in the Original Trilogy?
questions.explanation: Mon Mothma leads the Rebel Alliance as its chief spokesperson and strategist during the war against the Empire.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which Rebel pilot survives the trench runs at both the first and second Death Stars?
questions.explanation: Wedge Antilles is the only Rebel pilot to survive the attack runs on both the first and second Death Stars.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which Mon Calamari admiral leads the Rebel fleet at the Battle of Endor?
questions.explanation: Admiral Ackbar commands the Rebel fleet at the Battle of Endor, famously warning "It's a trap!"
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Kylo Ren was born with which name before turning to the dark side?
questions.explanation: Kylo Ren is born Ben Solo, the son of Han Solo and Leia Organa, before falling to the dark side.

questions.question: Who leads the First Order as its Supreme Leader before Kylo Ren?
questions.explanation: Snoke rules the First Order as Supreme Leader until Kylo Ren kills him in The Last Jedi.

questions.question: Finn is introduced as a First Order stormtrooper with which designation?
questions.explanation: Finn begins the story as First Order stormtrooper FN-2187 before deserting during a raid on Jakku.

questions.question: Poe Dameron serves the Resistance primarily as which type of specialist?
questions.explanation: Poe Dameron is the Resistance's best X-wing pilot, leading squadrons against the First Order.

questions.question: Which round astromech droid belongs to Resistance pilot Poe Dameron?
questions.explanation: BB-8 is Poe Dameron's loyal astromech droid, known for its spherical, rolling design.

questions.question: Which pirate leader operates a castle stronghold on the planet Takodana?
questions.explanation: Maz Kanata runs a castle on Takodana that serves as a watering hole for smugglers and travelers.

questions.question: What is the name of the First Order superweapon that drains a star for power?
questions.explanation: Starkiller Base is a First Order weapon built into an ice planet that drains a sun's energy to fire.

questions.question: The Resistance makes its last stand against the First Order on which crystalline planet?
questions.explanation: The Resistance's remaining fighters make a desperate final stand on the salt-crusted planet Crait.

questions.question: Ahsoka Tano leaves the Jedi Order after being falsely accused of which crime?
answers: Betraying the Republic to the Separatists
questions.explanation: Ahsoka Tano is falsely accused of bombing the Jedi Temple and leaves the Order even after being exonerated.

questions.question: During which event does Darth Vader reveal to Luke that he is his father?
answers: Their duel on the second Death Star
Their duel on the first Death Star
questions.explanation: Darth Vader reveals he is Luke's father during their lightsaber duel above Cloud City on Bespin.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Emperor Palpatine meets his death by being thrown down a reactor shaft during which battle?
questions.explanation: Darth Vader hurls Emperor Palpatine down a reactor shaft aboard the second Death Star during the Battle of Endor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which Hutt crime lord controls much of the criminal underworld on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Jabba the Hutt rules the criminal underworld of Tatooine from his palace outside Mos Eisley.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: What type of crystal focuses the energy inside every lightsaber blade?
questions.explanation: Every lightsaber is powered by a kyber crystal, which focuses energy into the weapon's signature blade.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Which ancient Sith Lord established the Rule of Two, limiting the Sith to a master and apprentice?
questions.explanation: Darth Bane created the Rule of Two, ensuring only one Sith master and one apprentice exist at a time.

questions.question: Palpatine tells Anakin the tragedy of which Sith Lord who could manipulate midichlorians?
questions.explanation: Palpatine recounts the tragedy of Darth Plagueis, a Sith Lord rumored to influence midichlorians to prevent death.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: The Clone Wars are fought primarily between the Galactic Republic and which faction?
questions.explanation: The Clone Wars pit the Galactic Republic's clone army against the droid forces of the Separatist Alliance.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: The first battle of the Clone Wars takes place on which planet?
questions.explanation: The Clone Wars officially begin with the Battle of Geonosis, where clone troopers first fight for the Republic.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Anakin and Obi-Wan fight their climactic duel on which volcanic planet?
questions.explanation: Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi battle to near-death on the lava-covered planet Mustafar.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which planet serves as the capital of the Galactic Republic and later the Empire?
questions.explanation: Coruscant, a city-covered planet, serves as the seat of the Galactic Senate and Republic capital.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: The Jedi Order maintains its central temple on which planet?
questions.explanation: The Jedi Temple, home of the Jedi Order and its Council, stands on the capital planet Coruscant.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: As a boy on Tatooine, Anakin Skywalker builds which protocol droid?
questions.explanation: Young Anakin Skywalker builds C-3PO from spare parts while enslaved on Tatooine.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: Which Toydarian junk dealer owns Anakin and Shmi Skywalker as slaves?
questions.explanation: Watto, a Toydarian shop owner, holds Anakin and his mother Shmi as slaves on Tatooine.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: The Republic's entire clone army is genetically templated from which bounty hunter?
questions.explanation: Every clone trooper in the Republic's army is grown using the genetic template of bounty hunter Jango Fett.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Which clone trooper captain becomes a trusted friend of Ahsoka Tano during the Clone Wars?
questions.explanation: Captain Rex, a clone trooper of the 501st Legion, fights alongside Ahsoka Tano throughout the Clone Wars.

questions.question: Which jovial pirate captain frequently clashes and allies with the Republic's heroes?
questions.explanation: Hondo Ohnaka, a Weequay pirate captain, alternates between rivalry and uneasy alliance with the Republic's heroes.

questions.question: In Star Wars: Rebels, Darth Maul survives and seeks revenge against which former Jedi?
questions.explanation: Darth Maul survives his defeat on Naboo and pursues a long grudge against Obi-Wan Kenobi in Star Wars: Rebels.

questions.question: Which Jedi survivor of Order 66 mentors Ezra Bridger aboard the starship Ghost?
questions.explanation: Kanan Jarrus, a Jedi who survived Order 66 in hiding, trains young Ezra Bridger in Star Wars: Rebels.

questions.question: Which young Force-sensitive street orphan becomes the central hero of Star Wars: Rebels?
questions.explanation: Ezra Bridger, a Force-sensitive orphan from Lothal, is recruited by the crew of the Ghost in Star Wars: Rebels.

questions.question: Which Mandalorian artist and explosives expert serves aboard the Ghost in Star Wars: Rebels?
questions.explanation: Sabine Wren, a Mandalorian artist skilled with explosives, is a founding member of the Ghost crew.

questions.question: Which Twi'lek pilot captains the starship Ghost in Star Wars: Rebels?
questions.explanation: Hera Syndulla, a skilled Twi'lek pilot, captains the Ghost and leads its crew of rebels.

questions.question: Which calculating Chiss officer serves as a Grand Admiral in the Imperial Navy?
questions.explanation: Grand Admiral Thrawn, a Chiss tactical genius, rises through the Imperial Navy and battles the Ghost crew in Rebels.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, which Imperial remnant leader wields the ancient Darksaber?
questions.explanation: Moff Gideon commands Imperial remnants in The Mandalorian while wielding the legendary Darksaber.

questions.question: The Darksaber is a unique lightsaber distinguished by which feature?
questions.explanation: The Darksaber is famous for its unusual black blade, unlike the colored blades of typical lightsabers.

questions.question: Which black-clad dark side agent hunts surviving Jedi after Order 66?
questions.explanation: The Grand Inquisitor leads a group of dark side agents tasked with hunting down Jedi who survived Order 66.

questions.question: In Obi-Wan Kenobi, the Inquisitor known as the Third Sister goes by what name?
questions.explanation: Reva, also called the Third Sister, is an Inquisitor who relentlessly pursues Obi-Wan Kenobi.

questions.question: Which former Rebel shock trooper serves as marshal of Nevarro in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: Cara Dune, a former Rebel shock trooper, becomes the marshal of the town of Nevarro.

questions.question: Who leads the Bounty Hunters' Guild on Nevarro in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: Greef Karga runs the local Bounty Hunters' Guild chapter on the planet Nevarro.

questions.question: In Ahsoka, Sabine Wren searches the galaxy for Ezra Bridger and which exiled Imperial officer?
questions.explanation: Ahsoka Tano and Sabine Wren search for Ezra Bridger, who vanished into hyperspace along with Grand Admiral Thrawn.

questions.question: Andor's early episodes center on Cassian's search for parts on which industrial planet?
questions.explanation: Cassian Andor's story begins on the industrial planet Ferrix, where he searches for a missing part.

questions.question: In The Book of Boba Fett, Boba Fett claims the former throne of which crime lord?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett takes over Jabba the Hutt's former criminal territory on Tatooine in The Book of Boba Fett.

questions.question: Which secretive rebel operative funds and coordinates spies against the Empire in Andor?
questions.explanation: Luthen Rael quietly builds and funds a network of rebel spies years before the Rebel Alliance forms in Andor.

questions.question: Darth Vader personally pilots which advanced Imperial starfighter?
questions.explanation: Darth Vader flies a specialized TIE Advanced x1 starfighter, more heavily armed than standard TIE fighters.

questions.question: Boba Fett's personal starship is which Firespray-class patrol craft?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett flies Slave I, a Kuat Systems Firespray-class patrol and interrogation vessel.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Rebel pilots at the Battle of Yavin fly which starfighter into the Death Star trench?
questions.explanation: Luke Skywalker and fellow Rebel pilots fly T-65 X-wing starfighters during the trench run at the Battle of Yavin.

questions.question: What is the standard single-pilot starfighter of the Imperial Navy called?
questions.explanation: The TIE fighter, short for Twin Ion Engine fighter, is the Empire's mass-produced standard starfighter.

questions.question: Anakin Skywalker flies which starfighter when he destroys the droid control ship?
questions.explanation: Anakin Skywalker accidentally destroys the Trade Federation's droid control ship while piloting a Naboo N-1 starfighter.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace

questions.question: Mandalorian armor is traditionally forged from which rare, nearly indestructible metal?
questions.explanation: Beskar, a rare and nearly indestructible metal, is the traditional material used to forge Mandalorian armor.

questions.question: Which small, round-eyed creatures live on the island planet Ahch-To?
questions.explanation: Porgs are small seabird-like creatures native to the remote island planet Ahch-To.

questions.question: Which mystical creatures are closely tied to the planet Lothal and the Force?
questions.explanation: Loth-wolves are mystical, Force-connected creatures native to the planet Lothal, appearing in Rebels and Ahsoka.

questions.question: Which shaggy pack animals do Rebel troops ride for patrols on Hoth?
questions.explanation: Rebel soldiers ride tauntauns, cold-adapted reptomammals, to patrol the icy surface of Hoth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What creature lurks in the Death Star's trash compactor and grabs Luke Skywalker?
questions.explanation: A tentacled Dianoga hides in the Death Star's garbage masher and drags Luke Skywalker underwater.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, at which floating city is Han Solo frozen in carbonite?
questions.explanation: Darth Vader tests the carbon-freezing chamber on Han inside Cloud City above the gas planet Bespin.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: What does Luke switch off before firing the shot that destroys the first Death Star?
questions.explanation: Trusting the Force and Obi-Wan's guiding voice, Luke turns off his targeting computer to make the winning shot.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, Leia infiltrates Jabba's palace disguised as which bounty hunter?
questions.explanation: Leia wears the armor and helmet of the Ubese bounty hunter Boushh while pretending to collect Chewbacca's bounty.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, who severs Luke Skywalker's right hand during their duel?
questions.explanation: Darth Vader cuts off Luke's hand on Cloud City just before revealing that he is Luke's father.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: In A New Hope, the main Rebel base sits on a moon orbiting which gas giant?
questions.explanation: The Rebels operate from an ancient temple on Yavin 4, the fourth moon of the gas giant Yavin.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, how do the Ewoks initially treat the golden droid C-3PO?
questions.explanation: The Ewoks worship C-3PO as a deity, and he uses his status to help free his captured friends.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: Which clumsy Gungan befriends Qui-Gon Jinn in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Jar Jar Binks, banished from Otoh Gunga, becomes a loyal if accident-prone companion to the Jedi.

questions.question: Anakin wins his freedom by winning which podrace in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Young Anakin wins the Boonta Eve Classic on Tatooine, earning his freedom and funds for the Jedi's ship.

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, the heroes are sentenced to die in an execution arena on which planet?
questions.explanation: Anakin, Padmé, and Obi-Wan are chained in the Geonosis arena before the Battle of Geonosis erupts.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, which raiders capture and kill Anakin's mother, Shmi?
questions.explanation: Tusken Raiders abduct Shmi Skywalker, and Anakin arrives too late to save her, slaughtering the tribe in anger.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: In Revenge of the Sith, Padmé gives birth to which twins before dying?
questions.explanation: Padmé delivers twins Luke and Leia on Polis Massa, and they are hidden separately to protect them from the Emperor.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: In Revenge of the Sith, which Jedi Master nearly defeats Palpatine before Anakin intervenes?
questions.explanation: Mace Windu disarms and corners Palpatine, but Anakin severs Windu's hand, allowing the Sith to strike him down.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: Which Trade Federation viceroy leads the invasion of Naboo in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Neimoidian viceroy Nute Gunray, secretly serving Darth Sidious, directs the blockade and occupation of Naboo.

questions.question: In The Force Awakens, both the Resistance and First Order search for a map leading to whom?
questions.explanation: The film's central quest is a partial map revealing the location of the self-exiled Luke Skywalker.

questions.question: In The Force Awakens, who kills Han Solo on a walkway inside Starkiller Base?
questions.explanation: Kylo Ren runs his father Han Solo through with his lightsaber over a reactor chasm on Starkiller Base.

questions.question: In The Last Jedi, Vice Admiral Holdo rams her ship at lightspeed into which fleet?
questions.explanation: Holdo sacrifices herself, jumping the Raddus to lightspeed through Snoke's First Order flagship to save the Resistance.

questions.question: In The Last Jedi, which Resistance mechanic stops Finn's suicide run and shares his cause?
questions.explanation: Rose Tico crashes into Finn's speeder on Crait to stop his sacrifice, saying they win by saving what they love.

questions.question: In The Rise of Skywalker, Rey discovers she is the granddaughter of which Sith Lord?
questions.explanation: Rey learns her father was a failed clone son of Palpatine, making the Emperor her grandfather.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker

questions.question: In the sequel trilogy, Kylo Ren is the son of Han Solo and which Resistance leader?
questions.explanation: Kylo Ren, born Ben Solo, is the son of Han Solo and General Leia Organa, and grand-nephew of Luke.

questions.question: What are Kylo Ren's masked warrior enforcers collectively called?
questions.explanation: The Knights of Ren are a band of dark-side marauders led by Kylo Ren throughout the sequel trilogy.

questions.question: In The Bad Batch, which member of Clone Force 99 stays loyal to the Empire as a sniper?
questions.explanation: Crosshair, the squad's marksman, initially serves the Empire while his brothers desert after Order 66.

questions.question: In The Clone Wars, which bald Nightsister serves as Count Dooku's assassin?
questions.explanation: Asajj Ventress, a dark-side warrior from Dathomir, wields twin curved lightsabers as Dooku's apprentice.

questions.question: In The Clone Wars, which pacifist duchess rules Mandalore and loves Obi-Wan?
questions.explanation: Duchess Satine leads pacifist Mandalore and shares a deep history with Obi-Wan Kenobi before Maul kills her.

questions.question: In The Clone Wars, which horned Nightbrother becomes Darth Maul's brother and ally?
questions.explanation: Savage Opress, empowered by the Nightsisters, is revealed as Maul's brother and fights at his side.

questions.question: In Star Wars Rebels, the warrior Garazeb 'Zeb' Orrelios is one of the last of which species?
questions.explanation: Zeb is a Lasat, a species nearly wiped out by the Empire, and serves as the Ghost crew's muscle.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, the villagers of Mos Pelgo need help slaying which giant desert beast?
questions.explanation: Din Djarin and the Tusken Raiders help the townsfolk kill an enormous krayt dragon terrorizing Tatooine.

questions.question: In The Book of Boba Fett, which desert people rescue and shelter Boba after the Sarlacc?
questions.explanation: A Tusken Raider tribe pulls Boba Fett from the desert, and he lives among them and earns their respect.

questions.question: In Obi-Wan Kenobi, whom does Obi-Wan rescue after she is kidnapped as a child?
questions.explanation: The series follows Obi-Wan leaving Tatooine to rescue a young, kidnapped Princess Leia Organa.

questions.question: In Andor, on which planet is Cassian imprisoned in a sterile factory prison?
questions.explanation: Cassian is sentenced to hard labor in the Imperial prison complex on the water world Narkina 5.

questions.question: In Ahsoka, Thrawn and Ezra are stranded on which planet in a faraway galaxy?
questions.explanation: Peridea, an ancient world in a distant galaxy, is where Ahsoka's heroes find the exiled Thrawn and Ezra.

questions.question: In The Book of Boba Fett, which skilled assassin becomes Boba Fett's trusted partner?
questions.explanation: Fennec Shand, an elite mercenary, serves as Boba Fett's right hand as he claims the Tatooine underworld.

questions.question: In Andor, which ambitious ISB supervisor becomes obsessed with hunting the rebels?
questions.explanation: Dedra Meero, a rising Imperial Security Bureau officer, pieces together the growing rebel network.

questions.question: What title is given to a Jedi apprentice training under a Knight or Master?
questions.explanation: A Padawan is a Jedi apprentice paired one-on-one with a Knight or Master to complete their training.

questions.question: How many Jedi Masters traditionally sit on the Jedi High Council?
questions.explanation: The Jedi High Council on Coruscant is composed of twelve senior Jedi, including Yoda and Mace Windu.

questions.question: What color is the lightsaber Luke Skywalker builds and wields in Return of the Jedi?
questions.explanation: Having lost his blue saber, Luke constructs a new green-bladed lightsaber for the events of Return of the Jedi.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: In Star Wars Rebels, the Jedi Kanan Jarrus was originally known by which name?
questions.explanation: Kanan Jarrus was born Caleb Dume, a Padawan who survived Order 66 and hid his Jedi identity.

questions.question: In Rebels and Ahsoka, Ahsoka Tano wields lightsabers of which color?
questions.explanation: After leaving the Order, Ahsoka carries two white-bladed lightsabers created from purified kyber crystals.

questions.question: In Ahsoka, which fallen orange-saber mercenary allies with Morgan Elsbeth and Thrawn?
questions.explanation: Baylan Skoll, a former Jedi turned mercenary, seeks power beyond the galaxy while training apprentice Shin Hati.

questions.question: In Revenge of the Sith, which Jedi duels General Grievous and calls his tactics uncivilized?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan Kenobi defeats General Grievous on Utapau, remarking 'so uncivilized' after blasting the cyborg.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, Count Dooku's lightsaber has what distinctive hilt shape?
questions.explanation: Count Dooku wields an elegant curved-hilt lightsaber suited to his refined Makashi dueling style.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: In Star Wars Rebels, which Pau'an leads the Inquisitors hunting Jedi for Darth Vader?
questions.explanation: The Grand Inquisitor, a former Jedi Temple guard, commands the Inquisitorius in tracking down survivors.

questions.question: What Sith title does Palpatine give Anakin Skywalker in Revenge of the Sith?
questions.explanation: Upon Anakin's fall to the dark side, Palpatine christens him Darth Vader, his new Sith apprentice.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: In The Rise of Skywalker, Palpatine commands a hidden armada built by which fanatical cult?
questions.explanation: The Sith Eternal, a secret cult on Exegol, builds and crews Palpatine's fleet of Star Destroyers.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker

questions.question: In Revenge of the Sith, Anakin kills which captured Sith Lord at Palpatine's urging?
questions.explanation: Aboard Grievous's ship, Anakin beheads a defeated Count Dooku after Palpatine encourages the execution.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: In Revenge of the Sith, Darth Vader requires his life-support suit after burning on which planet?
questions.explanation: Severely burned during his duel with Obi-Wan on Mustafar, Anakin is encased in Vader's armored life support.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith

questions.question: In Star Wars Rebels, the Inquisitors' lightsabers are notable for what unusual feature?
questions.explanation: Inquisitor lightsabers have double blades on a spinning circular hilt, letting them fly and rotate in combat.

questions.question: What is the name of Cassian Andor's tall, reprogrammed Imperial droid in Rogue One?
questions.explanation: K-2SO is a blunt, reprogrammed Imperial security droid loyal to Cassian throughout the Scarif mission.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: Which reprogrammed assassin droid helps protect Grogu in The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: IG-11, a former bounty-hunting droid reprogrammed by Kuiil, sacrifices itself to protect Din Djarin and Grogu.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, which rolling Separatist droids unfold to reveal blasters and shields?
questions.explanation: Droidekas, or destroyer droids, roll into battle then unfurl with deflector shields and twin blaster cannons.

questions.question: In Ahsoka, which ancient architect droid helps build lightsabers and instruct Padawans?
questions.explanation: Professor Huyang, a centuries-old droid, guides Sabine's training and lightsaber construction aboard Ahsoka's ship.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, R2-D2 repairs which system to help Queen Amidala's ship escape Naboo?
questions.explanation: R2-D2 braves enemy fire to fix the royal starship's deflector shield generator during the blockade escape.

questions.question: Which forest moon is the woodland home of the Ewoks in Return of the Jedi?
questions.explanation: The Ewoks live in tree villages on the forest moon of Endor, where the second Death Star is defended.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: In Rogue One, the Rebels steal the Death Star plans from an Imperial base on which tropical world?
questions.explanation: The climactic battle unfolds on the beach planet Scarif, where the Death Star archives are stored.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: The Nightsisters, a clan of dark-side witches, hail from which fog-shrouded planet?
questions.explanation: Dathomir is home to the Nightsisters and Nightbrothers, including Darth Maul and Savage Opress.

questions.question: Which Outer Rim planet under Imperial occupation is Ezra Bridger's home in Star Wars Rebels?
questions.explanation: Lothal, an occupied farming world, is Ezra's homeworld and the base of operations for the Ghost's rebels.

questions.question: Which planet is the homeworld of the Twi'leks, including pilot Hera Syndulla?
questions.explanation: Ryloth, a harsh world of caves and cliffs, is the Twi'lek homeworld and the birthplace of Hera Syndulla.

questions.question: In The Rise of Skywalker, Emperor Palpatine hides his armada on which shrouded Sith world?
questions.explanation: Exegol, a hidden Sith planet in the Unknown Regions, conceals Palpatine and his Final Order fleet.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker

questions.question: Which planet, homeworld of the Mandalorians, was devastated during the Empire's Purge?
questions.explanation: Mandalore, the Mandalorian homeworld, was ravaged and glassed by the Empire in the Great Purge.

questions.question: What is the name of the Corellian corvette carrying Princess Leia at the start of A New Hope?
questions.explanation: The Tantive IV is the blockade runner boarded by Darth Vader while Leia carries the stolen Death Star plans.

questions.question: What is the standard large, wedge-shaped capital ship of the Imperial Navy called?
questions.explanation: The Imperial Star Destroyer is a massive triangular warship that projects the Empire's power across the galaxy.

questions.question: What is the name of Din Djarin's gunship in the first two seasons of The Mandalorian?
questions.explanation: The Razor Crest is Din Djarin's pre-Imperial patrol gunship until it is destroyed by Moff Gideon's forces.

questions.question: Which slower Rebel bomber flies alongside X-wings at the Battle of Yavin?
questions.explanation: The Y-wing is a rugged Rebel bomber used in the trench run against the first Death Star at Yavin.

questions.question: Clone troopers deploy into Clone Wars battles aboard which Republic dropship?
questions.explanation: The LAAT/i, or Republic gunship, ferries clone troopers into combat zones throughout the Clone Wars.

questions.question: At the Battle of Endor, which nimble Rebel starfighter is known for its speed?
questions.explanation: The fast, wedge-shaped A-wing sees heavy action at Endor, where one crashes into the bridge of a Star Destroyer.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: In Rogue One, the Rebels reach Scarif aboard which troop transport shuttle?
questions.explanation: The U-wing is a versatile Rebel troop transport and gunship that carries Rogue One's team to Scarif.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: In A New Hope, which scaly reptilian mounts do Imperial sandtroopers ride on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Dewbacks are large desert lizards ridden by sandtroopers searching Tatooine for the missing droids.

questions.question: Which large, shaggy, horned beasts do Tusken Raiders ride across Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Banthas are massive furry, spiral-horned beasts of burden long associated with the Tusken Raiders.

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, Obi-Wan battles which clawed beast in the Geonosis arena?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan faces the crab-like acklay, while Anakin fights the reek and Padmé the feline nexu.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Which giant space-dwelling creatures can leap through hyperspace in Rebels and Ahsoka?
questions.explanation: Purrgil are whale-like creatures able to travel through hyperspace, inspiring early hyperdrive technology.

questions.question: Inside an asteroid in The Empire Strikes Back, the Falcon hides within which giant creature?
questions.explanation: Han lands inside a cave that proves to be the mouth of a giant space slug, or exogorth, and flees quickly.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: Which tall, long-necked species creates the Republic's clone army on Kamino?
questions.explanation: The Kaminoans are expert cloners who grow the Republic's clone troopers in their ocean-world facilities.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: Which small, hooded scavengers sell salvaged droids from a sandcrawler on Tatooine?
questions.explanation: Jawas are small desert scavengers who collect and resell droids and scrap from their towering sandcrawlers.

questions.question: Which blind warrior devoted to the Force joins the mission in Rogue One?
questions.explanation: Chirrut Îmwe, a blind guardian who trusts in the Force, chants 'I am one with the Force' during the Scarif battle.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: Which defecting Imperial cargo pilot delivers Galen Erso's message in Rogue One?
questions.explanation: Bodhi Rook defects from the Empire to carry Galen Erso's warning about the Death Star's hidden weakness.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: Which Imperial director oversees the Death Star and clashes with Grand Moff Tarkin in Rogue One?
questions.explanation: Director Orson Krennic drives the Death Star project but is sidelined by the ambitious Grand Moff Tarkin.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: Which chrome-armored First Order officer commands stormtroopers in the sequel trilogy?
questions.explanation: Captain Phasma, clad in distinctive silver armor, oversees First Order stormtroopers, including the trooper Finn.

questions.question: What are Emperor Palpatine's crimson-robed bodyguards called in Return of the Jedi?
questions.explanation: The Imperial Royal Guard, in red robes and helmets, stands watch over the Emperor aboard the second Death Star.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: In Andor, which grieving adoptive mother of Cassian inspires an uprising on Ferrix?
questions.explanation: Maarva, Cassian's adoptive mother, delivers a defiant funeral message that sparks a rebellion against the Empire.

questions.question: In The Force Awakens, what does the droid BB-8 carry that both sides desperately seek?
answers: A piece of the map to Luke
questions.explanation: BB-8 safeguards a data fragment completing the map to Luke Skywalker's hidden location.

questions.question: In Attack of the Clones, Count Dooku severs which of Anakin's limbs in their duel?
questions.explanation: Dooku cuts off Anakin's right arm during their lightsaber duel, and it is replaced with a mechanical prosthetic.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones

questions.question: In The Last Jedi, Luke Skywalker confronts Kylo Ren on Crait using what?
questions.explanation: Luke projects an image of himself across the galaxy to Crait, buying the Resistance time to escape.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, what does Luke reveal about his connection to Princess Leia?
questions.explanation: Luke tells Leia that she is his twin sister, both children of Anakin Skywalker hidden at birth.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: In Rogue One, the Death Star's first test-fire destroys the holy city on which moon?
questions.explanation: The Empire tests the Death Star by obliterating the sacred city on the desert moon of Jedha.
questions.sourceTitle: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

questions.question: In Andor, the rebels raid an Imperial garrison to steal a payroll on which planet?
questions.explanation: Cassian joins a rebel cell to rob an Imperial sector payroll from the garrison on the highland world Aldhani.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, what is the capital city of Naboo that the Gungans help liberate?
questions.explanation: Theed, Naboo's elegant royal capital, is where Queen Amidala retakes the palace and captures Viceroy Gunray.

questions.question: In The Empire Strikes Back, what does Yoda lift from the Dagobah swamp to teach Luke about the Force?
questions.explanation: Yoda effortlessly raises Luke's sunken X-wing from the bog, showing that size does not matter to the Force.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, what markings distinguish the Sith apprentice Darth Maul's face?
questions.explanation: Darth Maul, a Dathomirian Zabrak, has horns and intricate red-and-black tattoos covering his entire face.

questions.question: In Return of the Jedi, what two-legged Imperial walker do the Ewoks and Chewbacca capture at Endor?
questions.explanation: Chewbacca and two Ewoks seize a two-legged AT-ST scout walker during the ground battle on the forest moon.
questions.sourceTitle: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi

questions.question: In A New Hope, whose holographic distress plea does R2-D2 secretly carry to find Obi-Wan Kenobi?
questions.explanation: R2-D2 hides Princess Leia's holographic message begging Obi-Wan for help, sparking Luke's journey off Tatooine.

questions.question: In The Mandalorian, roughly how old is Grogu said to be despite looking like a toddler?
questions.explanation: Grogu is said to be around fifty years old, since his species matures very slowly like Grogu's kin Yoda.

questions.question: What do the Rebels call their hidden headquarters built into the ancient ruins on Yavin 4?
questions.explanation: The Rebel Alliance's Yavin 4 base is built inside the Great Temple, an ancient structure left by the Massassi people.

questions.question: What is the name of Boba Fett's Firespray-class starship?
questions.explanation: Boba Fett pilots the modified Firespray-31 patrol craft known as Slave I throughout the original trilogy.

questions.question: Which Trandoshan bounty hunter joins the hunt for the Millennium Falcon in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: Bossk is the reptilian Trandoshan hunter seen among the bounty hunters Darth Vader assembles aboard the Executor.

questions.question: What creature living inside an asteroid swallows the Millennium Falcon in The Empire Strikes Back?
questions.explanation: The Falcon crew unknowingly lands inside the mouth of an exogorth, a massive space slug dwelling in the asteroid field.

questions.question: On which forest moon do the Ewoks help Rebel commandos destroy the second Death Star's shield generator?
questions.explanation: The strike team led by Han Solo teams up with the native Ewoks on the forest moon of Endor to disable the shield generator.

questions.question: What is the name of the droid supervisor who oversees the droid pool inside Jabba the Hutt's palace?
questions.explanation: EV-9D9 is the eager droid overseer shown assigning newly arrived droids to their duties in Jabba's palace.

questions.question: What is the name of Darth Vader's massive Star Dreadnought flagship?
questions.explanation: The Executor is Darth Vader's personal Super Star Destroyer, seen commanding Imperial fleets in the original trilogy.

questions.question: What is the name of the settlement nearest the Lars homestead where Luke buys power converters?
questions.explanation: Luke mentions going into Anchorhead, the moisture-farming settlement nearest his aunt and uncle's homestead.

questions.question: In The Phantom Menace, what type of Trade Federation vessel does Anakin accidentally destroy above Naboo?
questions.explanation: Anakin's stray shot ignites a chain reaction inside the Droid Control Ship, shutting down the battle droid army on Naboo.

questions.question: What is the name of Padmé Amidala's decoy handmaiden who impersonates the queen in The Phantom Menace?
questions.explanation: Sabé poses as Queen Amidala for public appearances while the real Padmé travels disguised as a handmaiden.

questions.question: What is the name of Anakin Skywalker's mother, a slave on Tatooine freed by Qui-Gon's wager?
questions.explanation: Shmi Skywalker is Anakin's mother, whose death at the hands of Tusken Raiders pushes him toward the dark side.

questions.question: On which planet does Obi-Wan Kenobi discover the secret clone army being grown for the Republic?
questions.explanation: Obi-Wan tracks a bounty hunter's trail to the stormy ocean world of Kamino, home to the cloning facilities.

questions.question: Who is the Kaminoan prime minister who proudly shows Obi-Wan the clone army's progress?
